authorBio:
I attempt to write books, which, considering where you're reading this, makes perfect sense.

Why are you still reading this? No one reads bios anymore.

Okay, I got it, you're nosy.

I'm a lawyer--although I also have an specialization in creative writing--with a fervent but not always executable passion for writing, I do always try my best to keep my work flowing.

I did not expect this book to be noticed by anyone before it was finished, but it did to some extend and I am glad because the people reading on the way were a huge booster to help me finish writing it. If you are new here though, I hope you enjoy the story.

There it is, this was my introduction to you. I just hope you like my book, and if you do like it, please don't forget to press on the star, but only do it if you really like my stuff, let's keep it honest, okay? No pressure though.

title: Lucius
description:
To save her brother, Veronica decides to dig up a vampire's grave and must grapple with the dangers that come with fraternizing with a killer.
 
                                                                      *****
 
There's a reason buried things should stay buried. Desperate to save her dying brother, Veronica digs up Lucius' grave--a notorious vampire with endearing charm and a thirst for redemption. Ignorant to the spotlight now on her family after releasing a killer back into the world, Veronica must grapple with her new reality while Lucius is forced to finally face the ghosts from his past, pulling him into the hell he helped create. As enemies begin to draw closer, Veronica finds herself having to choose a side, and leaning toward one she never thought she would.

title: Peaked in High School
description:
Everything changes after high school.

Former star of the football team, Beau Coleman, has been on a downward spiral after failing to graduate from high school five years ago. Once cocky and sure of himself, Beau now struggles to find a steady job as well as a purpose in life.

He thought that he finally hit rock bottom with no way out when he suddenly runs into his childhood neighbor, Everett Fowler. Can Everett provide a sense of direction for Beau and his derailed life? More importantly, should he?

After all, the quarterback used to be his bully.

title: Bound To The Seduction
description:
Betrayed by the men in her life, Sarah must come to terms with her past and learn to trust again in order to get the future she deserves. Will she give herself a second chance? 

***
Meet Sarah Suarez, a talented young woman at the start of her career doing all she can to provide for her family. With a sick mother, a little brother to provide for, a runaway dad, and an unreliable fiancé, her life is anything but easy. She braves through the storms that life throws her to get what she deserves. This comes at the expense of a broken heart. 

Henry Salva is the youngest CEO of Xian Enterprises and the heir to Salva Corporation. Don't be fooled by his gentle and harmless demeanor. He is a ruthless businessman. His heart had died once. 
What will happen when the two of them cross paths? Will they learn to trust again? And when Henry's first love returns, who will he choose?


*trigger warning: has minor PTSD episodes.

title: I Wish You Would | Lando Norris
description:
I wish you would come back
Wish I never hung up the phone like I did, I
Wish you knew that I'd never forget you as long as I live and I
Wish you were right here, right now, it's all good 
| I Wish You Would by Taylor Swift 


----------------------

Esme Leclerc thought she could outrun her past-fleeing to France, leaving behind the roar of engines and the ache of Lando Norris's love. In the quiet of her studies, she rebuilt herself, shaping a life away from the chaos.

But now, with her degree in hand and the racing world calling her back, Esme steps into the spotlight she once avoided. Among familiar faces and distant memories, one question lingers: can love, like a race, ever truly end-or does it simply wait for a new beginning?

title: A Pucking Mistake
description:
Roxanne Hartley, a top-tier figure skater, has always kept her focus on winning. But when she enters a no-strings-attached fling with Elliot "Blaze" Carter, a hotshot hockey player, things quickly spiral out of control. What was meant to be a casual distraction turns into a fiery, unpredictable connection neither can ignore. With emotions running high and boundaries blurring, Roxanne sticks to one rule:

Keep it simple, no complications. 

But when she finds out she's pregnant, everything changes. As jealousy and possessiveness take hold, Roxanne is torn between her career, her heart, and the man who may be more than she ever expected. In this high-stakes romance, both must confront their deepest fears and desires.

This is no fairy tale. This is a Pucking Mistake.

title: Flashing Lights
description:
Twenty-six year old Millie has it all planned out. 

Career now, love later. 

She's young, ambitious and always professional - unlike her new boss: Hunter Rivers, the super famous pop star. 

When she joins him and his crew on tour across the US as his Personal Assistant, she gradually learns that being professional all the time can be a little overrated. 

Especially when she finds herself falling for her superstar boss.

----------

Started this story in the summer of 2020. Life happened and after a while it felt like I lost inspiration to finish the story. But it always stuck with me. Hunter and Millie never left my mind and I really thought they deserved a proper ending to their story. So I am now republishing the chapters I've written almost 4 years ago and am trying to add some new chapters. 

----------
If you are reading this story on any other platform other than Wattpad you are very likely to be at risk of a malware attack. If you wish to read this story in its original safe, form, please go to https://www.wattpad.comhttps://www.wattpad.com/user/amanda_668 

Thank you

title: Hold a Ghost
description:
Paige de Haan believes in a lot of things, but ghosts aren't one of them. Keane Mahoney would just like her to believe in herself.

                                                                  	*****
After a devastating summer, Paige De Haan is determined to cut ties with her old life--no more parties, no more attention, and definitely no more old friends. Her plan seems to be working until an unexpected run-in with her former best friend, Keane Mahoney, throws a wrench in her plans.

The universe pushes them together, forcing them to partner up for their senior project: a ghost-hunting web series where skeptic meets believer. The sudden closeness stirs up unresolved feelings and urges them to confront the past they've been avoiding.

Now, Paige and Keane must decide if their relationship is destined to stay buried . . . or be brought back to life.

                                                                  	*****
BENNINGTON UNIVERSITY SERIES #2

title: A praia dos Corações Partidos Vol.1
description:
Elisa Pellegrini, uma jovem adulta de 22 anos, ainda está se adaptando com a vida no Brasil após ter sido abandonada pelo marido. Seus dias ainda se parecem um caos, mas, só de estar em um ambiente novo a deixa muito mais feliz do que se permanecesse na Itália. Voltar para as origens de sua mãe faz com que ela possa encontrar novamente um sentido para a sua vida. 

Elisa mora no litoral do Rio Grande do Sul em uma casinha amarela perto da praia, trabalha como professora em uma escola de ensino médio e cuida de uma gatinha folgada. Ela é muito feliz com seus amigos e colegas, porém, sua vida está prestes à mudar quando um paulista misterioso aparece em sua cidade.

Bruno é um adulto de quase 26 anos que acaba de chegar em Torres, no Rio Grande do Sul para fugir de seus problemas. Ou melhor, do problema. O relacionamento com Bárbara já não estava mais dando certo, mas descobrir uma traição, foi a gota d'água para que ele decidisse começar uma nova vida.

Dois corações partidos e uma praia confortante. Será que isso pode dar certo?

title: Silent Waiting
description:
Years later, we finally realize the worth of what we once had. 
  A missed chance turns into a lost opportunity，
  meeting again brings only regret. 
  Some people, once missed, are no longer part of our lives.
    After many twists and turns, we come to understand the depth of true affection. 
  I'm willing to wait in silence, holding on to that everlasting love.
  
  Cheng Yi returns to her hometown, burdened by unresolved heartache. Once, she shared a passionate and unforgettable love with Fang Zhiyuan, only to be torn apart by fate. Six years later, their unexpected reunion brings back a flood of emotions long buried. Fang Zhiyuan, still deeply in love with Cheng Yi, tries to rekindle the flame, but she is no longer the naive girl he once knew. Cheng Yi now stands at a crossroads, torn between the lingering pain of her past and the hope of a new future. In this delicate moment, she must make a choice that will define more than just her heart's desires; it will set the course for her entire life, leading her down paths she never imagined possible.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi everyone, I work in the aviation industry, and writing is my only way to unwind from a busy schedule. This is a Chinese novel I began writing in 2017, which I translated into English during the pandemic. If you notice any awkward phrasing or spots where the English feels off, please feel free to leave comments so I can make improvements.
Hi everyone, 我是航空从业者，写作是我繁忙工作唯一放松的爱好。这是我2017年开始写的中文小说，在疫情期间翻译成英文。如果大家发现有英文不通顺的地方，请多多留言，以便改正。

title: The Assassin of Time
description:
Carried to a fantasy future by a dark-eyed, time-traveling stranger, can Leonor overcome the guilt that haunts her and fulfill her destiny... while navigating her growing attraction to her newfound protector?     


Leonor, a student at present-day Harvard, would do anything for the people she holds dear: her roommates, her beloved little brother - and the brilliant but eccentric Professor Mosey, the mentor to whom she faithfully delivers meals three times a day while he conducts secret chemistry experiments that have earned him the nickname The Batty Professor.

One night, Leonor's world is shattered when mysterious and deadly spies arrive at Professor Mosey's office to steal the discovery he made just hours earlier: a chemical solution that, when consumed, allows humans to time-travel.

When Leonor becomes the spies' next target, she has no escape - until a man with midnight-black eyes whisks her three hundred years into the future. There, she discovers a world whose most powerful figure harbors dark plans to use Professor Mosey's time-travel solution to transform all of reality: past, present, and future. Plans that can be stopped, if at all, only by a secret that Leonor possesses.

To prevent her enemy's designs from taking shape, Leonor will need the help of the newfound protector who carried her to the future, a man defined by his rigidly disciplined nature. Together, the two must navigate a city of elites, servants, mysteries, and masquerade balls. Their quest will require them to confront painful secrets from their own pasts, but Leonor is determined to do whatever it takes to save the world from doom. To save her family and friends.

And to save the man with whom she has begun to share an attraction as unexpected as it is undeniable and irresistible.


New parts post every Friday. The very first two parts run long, then the parts become shorter. If you enjoy the story, your votes would mean the world to me. Looking forward to seeing you around!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi, everyone! I'm Red Petal, and I'm so happy you stopped by.

I write to express love. I hope my characters bring you some joy.

Currently, I'm excited to share The Assassin of Time with you. New parts post every Friday morning at 9am, USA East Coast time.

To my wonderful followers: you're the best!  ❤️  Please consider my messageboard your space to share your writing updates and triumphs, story recs, or just to come chat and fangirl together! 

With love and good vibes for all my fellow readers and storytellers,

RedPetal49 ❤️

title: Falling For The Game
description:
Falling For The Game

Selene Hartley moved to Boston to escape the wreckage of her past in Los Angeles-a broken family, an abusive ex, and a version of herself she no longer recognized. Focused on protecting her heart and supporting her younger brother Ethan, she's determined to keep her new life simple: no risks, no distractions, and definitely no romance.

But fate has other plans. A chance encounter at a Brown University frat party throws Selene into the path of Dominic Kingsley, the star of the college ice hockey team. With his easy charm, undeniable talent, and a determination that matches her own, Dominic is everything she's sworn to avoid. Yet their meeting is anything but simple, and as Dominic continues to cross her path-on and off the ice-Selene finds herself drawn into a game she never intended to play.

As the layers of their lives unravel, Selene struggles to balance the weight of her past with the possibility of a future. Can she trust herself to let someone in, or will the fear of being hurt again keep her from taking the ultimate shot at happiness?

Falling For The Game is a heartfelt tale of healing, resilience, and the unexpected moments that force us to confront the walls we've built around our hearts.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Anna Fu is an aspiring writer diving into the literary world for the first time. With a love for storytelling and a flair for romance, Anna is passionate about bringing complex characters and compelling relationships to life. Her debut novel, *Falling for the Game*, explores the tension and attraction between powerful, independent protagonists from different worlds, drawing on themes of ambition, love, and personal growth. Anna hopes her stories captivate readers and offer an escape into a world of passion and drama.

title: Food Courting
description:
In a war over the food court, an eager barista battles the confident competitor--and her own heart.

***

Young barista Cora Chun takes pride in being a Cool Bean, even after years without a promotion. So when Farron Kam, the younger assistant manager of the competing smoothie shop, flaunts her hatred for her job, Cora is determined to crush her to a pulp.

What she doesn't expect is for Farron to take her up on the challenge.

With that declaration of war, the two begin a battle over the food court: who can serve the most customers, who can close up the fastest, who can grab the last loaf of bread at the supermarket...

But as the rivalry begins to blend with romance, Cora has to decide if she is fighting a battle over beverages, or one over her own heart.

***

title: PERFECT MATCH
description:
She had everything while growing up only that her parents couldn't give her the life she wanted. It was the life of freedom: to do and be anything. Her rebellion and self willed nature led to her marriage to a total stranger. It was her father's best way of protecting her, his antidote to tame her. For Mabel, she had no choice but to walk into it but she did have an escape plan. 

He is handsome, sexy, rich and everything an eligible bachelor should be; only that he had no plans in mind for himself. He couldn't go against his father's decisions and commands, the whole purpose of his existence was loyalty for the sake of his family and the business. That was what his father had taught him, he was his father's shadow. 

Their parents thought they would match each other. 
Let's see if they are right after all.

title: Strach w oczach wczoraj
description:
Mathilda zaczyna staż w agencji marketingowej, jednocześnie walcząc z odpowiedzialnością za chorą matkę. Landon, doświadczony fotograf, zmaga się z wypaleniem twórczym i brakiem weny. Ich drogi krzyżują się w pracy, a wkrótce oboje postanawiają sobie pomóc. Ona chce odnaleźć równowagę między obowiązkami a marzeniami, a on pragnie odzyskać pasję.

title: Siren Call (Mount Olympus Tale)
description:
Deinera is a Siren. Different than her sisters, the urge to kill consumes her. She doesn't need to drink the blood of her prey. Instead, she seeks their souls. title: To vše mezi námi: Zakázané pouto
description:
Emma Carter má svůj život dokonale naplánovaný - poslední ročník vysoké školy, titul z ekonomie na dosah, a nový začátek v rušném New Yorku po boku své matky Elizabeth a jejího snoubence Roberta. Ztráta otce ji naučila držet si emoce na uzdě a soustředit se na budoucnost. Ale všechny její plány se otřesou v základech, když poprvé potká Robertova syna.

Ethan Taylor je všechno co si Emma nikdy nedokázala představit - úspěšný, charismatický podnikatel s nebezpečným pohledem a úsměvem, který jí proniká až do duše. 

Zakázané city je svedou na cestu plnou touhy, tajemství a morálních dilemat. Jak daleko jsou ochotni zajít, aby se vzájemně nezničili - a přitom nezničili rodinu, která má teprve vzniknout?

Láska je krásná, ale někdy stojí příliš vysoko. Je to pouto, které si nesmí přiznat - a přesto ho nemohou popřít.

title: The Heartbreak Hypothesis
description:
[2022 Wattys Winner] When love cynic Madison Watson starts university, she vows to follow three simple rules.

     One: Work out at least twice a week.
     Two: Get an internship.
     Three: Stay away from men.

But after a chance encounter with three guys in the dorm halls, Madi's enlisted to transform a shy and love-sick hopeless case into the perfect boyfriend. Unbeknownst to her optimistic accomplices, she's out to prove a hypothesis of her own - love is a construct, and heartbreak is inevitable. 

♡

A college story about first love and first heartbreak, reflecting on the ins and outs of dating in the age of technology.

title: REGGIE AND BEKAH
description:
Bekah, a determined dreamer from Ravel Creek, is set on chasing her ambitions, but her life takes an unexpected turn when she crosses paths with the powerful and dangerous Caruso family. Known as both the wealthiest family in Bay View City and a feared mafia dynasty, the Carusos are surrounded by mystery and risk.

When Marci's death sparks suspicion, Reggie Caruso is sent to uncover the truth about Bekah's possible connection. Bound by his family's expectations, Reggie is drawn into a tangled web of secrets and the guarded truths Bekah fights to keep hidden.

Two lives on opposite sides of the spectrum collide, pulling them into a journey of hidden truths and self-discovery. As Bekah and Reggie's worlds become inseparably linked, they must face their deepest fears, question their loyalties, and challenge everything they thought they knew about themselves and each other.


©All rights reserved

This is my first story here on Wattpad. I hope you can vote, like, add to library, and drop your honest comments.

title: Faded Inks
description:
A school where rivalry is a tradition. Not even tradition- it's a way of life. It's not just a school- it's a battlefield. A world where rivalry rules everything, divided between two factions who would do anything to win. It's all tradition, they say. 

But..

They didn't ask for this. They who exactly?

𝘾𝙡𝙖𝙧𝙖 𝙎𝙞𝙣𝙘𝙡𝙖𝙞𝙧, focused solely on her academics and her dream of getting into Yale, hates being the centerpiece. But here she was, being everyone's center of attention, while she was supposed to be invisible. 

𝘼𝙨𝙝𝙚𝙧 𝙠𝙣𝙞𝙜𝙝𝙩, the only guy she ever knew. Now, the boy she's supposed to hate but can't seem to stay away from. 

But there are secrets. Secrets they need to uncover, together. Secrets that could shatter the foundation of this school, and maybe themselves in the process.

The stakes? Their future. 

The cost? Everything.

Welcome to St. Ardent. You'll either fight... or fall.

It's a fight for freedom, and trust me-no one's playing fair.

title: The Destruction of Angels - An Urban Fantasy
description:
I had one job to do. Only one, and that was to protect him. And through all his lifetimes and for thousands of years that's exactly what I did. 

Until I started visiting Hell. I knew it was something I should not have done. I had no business there. But memories from the past pulled me in. And I started spending more and more time in Hell with my old acquaintances who'd fallen. And it rekindled a centuries-old obsession I thought was long dead.

title: Abstract Shadows and Painted Stars
description:
Book blurb:

Ashlyn works for a Paranormal Investigation Agency. One day, she and her partner, Percy, discover a mind-reading alien hidden inside a very restricted part of the building. 

                                                                        ...

"Ignorance is safety," Percy reminded me. 

I perked up, before I let a long sigh escape me. "Control feeds on ignorance, Percy," I reminded him in a hushed voice that only I could hear.
	
You shouldn't burn the book before you obtain its knowledge, I thought to myself. Throughout history, too many have been forced to follow leaders without questioning why these self-proclaimed kings wear the crown. You shouldn't obey sightlessly just to follow the masses. I, for one, refuse to conform and join the human sheep. I'll be the one to chain myself to the tree and riot in the streets hoping for change. I'll fight for what I think is right. And if I am hunted down like some graceful deer wandering the clearing as twilight breaks? So be it. 

Tomorrow, I'm going to sneak into that vault and free that Alien, because it's the right thing to do according to my heart. And I'm not going to let anyone stop me.

Screw ignorance. It was never meant for me. 

                                                                    ...



NOTES:
1) This is an original story. The narrative and characters are owned by the Author (me).
2) It's a cute human + alien love story.  
3) CAUTION, some chapters will address the impact of trauma. And this book will have instances of ghost possession, violence and strong language. 
5) Book art was drawn by me - the author.

P.S. As you scroll through this book, please feel free to leave any comments or feedback along the way. It's always appreciated ^-^ 

Now, grab yourself a warm drink, find someplace comfortable and get ready to dive in.

Happy reading, my little bookdragons! :D
Tous Droits Réservés

title: From Heartbreak to Payback: The Billionaire's Ex
description:
Bailee Johnson was sick of always being second best. After her husband cheated on her and lied during their divorce, leaving her and her daughter with nothing but the clothes on their backs and the small business she had worked so hard to start, Bailee shrugged off everyone's suggestions to put him in her past and move forward.
Oh, she was going to, but not until after she took him down, even if it meant using his business rival to do so. Unbeknownst to her, that business rival just so happens to be her brother's best friend, the first man to have ever broken her heart. The closer she gets to him, the more feelings resurface from their past, and the harder it is to lie.
She wants revenge, but at what cost?

title: Bottled Up
description:
Louise Bentley is a feisty, wild, 'let's-go-to-Capri-for-the-weekend-yeah?' kind of girl. She spends her days working at a party-planning company. Oh, and she never wants kids. Ever.

Ben Langford is a studious, quiet, 'I'm-busy-reading' sort of man. He spends most of his days practicing law and avoiding Louise Bentley. Oh, and he wants a truckload of kids one day. Just not yet.

But when Louise's sister and Ben's brother die in a car wreck, they name the pair of them as legal guardians of their two children. Suddenly, Louise and Ben are living in the same house, up to their ears in nappies and lingering resentment. With so much tension brewing between them, how long can they keep it bottled up?

*FOURTH IN THE TORONTO GIRLS SERIES*

title: When the Star Falls for Clover
description:
Clover Duology #2. Clover Delight Peewee never imagined that a single direct message would change her life forever. When Kim Taehyung of BTS unexpectedly notices her online, it sets off a chain of events that catapults her into a world she once only dreamed of―a world of glitz, music, and unimaginable connections.

As Clover finds herself unexpectedly tied to BTS, she navigates the exhilarating highs and daunting challenges of life in the spotlight. But beyond the glamour and chaos, something even more surprising happens: Clover begins to fall in love. Not just the adoration of an ARMY for her idols, but the kind of love that feels real, raw, and deeply personal.

For the first time, love doesn't scare her―it just feels right. But what terrifies her now is the thought of breaking the heart of the man she loves and facing the consequences of an unpredictable life that she never asked for. One thing is certain―Clover's life will never be the same.

Disclaimer: This story is in English
Status: Ongoing (New Edition)

authorBio:
Hi! I'm Tiana, a 25-year-old published author from the Philippines, with books available nationwide. I write novels in both English and Taglish, bringing diverse narratives to life. I've been writing since I was 13, so I apologize if some of my older works make you cringe―I was just starting to find my voice back then! Writing has always been my way of giving voice to emotions, experiences, and stories that often go unheard, allowing me to explore the human soul and connect with others on a deeper level. If you want to read my most wonderfully written works, I highly recommend checking out my latest releases, especially those written in 2024.

title: The Last She (Books 1-3, the Last She Series)
description:
Ara, the only woman left alive after a plague, is searching for a way to save humanity. She thinks there isn't a man she can trust, until she meets Kaden.
 
                                                                      *****
 
A plague has swept over the Earth, killing the majority of the population and every female. Except one. Ara witnessed the horror and destruction, but for the last three years she has survived. Now, desperation and hunger force her out of the mountains and onto a dangerous path; across the flooded downtown and through the gangs of survivors is hope. Ara's father spoke of a clue that could save not just her, but humanity. Then she is captured by a group of men. Despite the seeming kindness of Kaden, a young man her own age, Ara doesn't know if she can trust them. Then again, there's no way she can cross the plague-ridden city on her own. Men. Monsters. Is there a difference? This is the story of The Last She.

(This book contains all of The Last She Series - Book 1: The Last She, Book 2: The Last City and Book 3: The Last Creation)

[[word count: 250,000-300,000 words]]

A bit about me....

I love volleyball, white-water rafting and poking dead things with a stick. Oh, and writing.

My favorite books are Where the Red Fern Grows, The Princess Bride and the Harry Potter series. My husband tells me I have extremely poor knife safety skills, but he has no idea what he's talking about. *Juggles knives in background.* I graduated from the University of Idaho and the University of Wisconsin with degrees in Wildlife Biology and Creative Writing. I have backpacked through Europe, lived on a boat in the British Virgin Islands, rode elephants through the jungles of Laos, but no matter where I travel, the mountains of Idaho will always be home.

I've always loved to read and write, but Wattpad was the first place I found the courage to share my stories with the world. It has been the greatest adventure, and honor, to find that others enjoy them too.

Thanks for stopping by ;)
- Hannah

title: Magic Heist
description:
In a Southwestern desert where magic pulses through neon signs and runs hot in young blood, sixteen-year-old Maya Vargas faces an impossible choice. After Rangers burn down her orphanage and steal an ancient protective crown, she and her magic-wielding brother Makale find themselves running with the Cerberus Gang - a found family of outlaws who fight back against magical authority with modified walkmans, obsidian daggers, and rebellious spirit.

But as her brother's raw power grows and their charismatic leader Adrian plots escalating acts of resistance, Maya must decide where revolution ends and revenge begins. With Rangers hunting them, rival gangs closing in, and dark magic leaving its mark, she'll need more than her daggers to protect what matters - especially when the real trap might be the choices they make in the name of justice.

A genre-bending tale that blends Western grit with magical punk rock rebellion, weaving together themes of family, power, and the price of revolution against a backdrop of desert magic and neon-lit ruins.

title: Backroom Deal [ongoing]
description:
Nova Akhran and Julian Maxwell can't stand each other. At all. As CEOs of rivaling Fortune 500 companies, they've been at each other's throats for long enough. Since they want nothing to do with each other, they're also incapable of ever seeing eye to eye on anything. 

However, things take a turn when a frustrating ultimatum threatens their coveted CEO positions. Forced to scramble and protect everything they've worked for, they're cornered with a desperately volatile solution: holy matrimony.

But sharing temporary and meaningless vows shouldn't be a problem since it's mutually beneficial. Right? Because when one really and truly wants something, they must take risks and sacrifices along the way...even if some of those risks are costly. 

If these two knew what they were really getting from the start, maybe things would've been different. Because they're surely in for a ride when fate has a cruel sense of humor. After all, you can't avoid what is inevitable in matters of the heart.

Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I've been writing for quite a few years but only just started to write historical fiction. It's been an amazing journey immersing myself in another time, particularly one as interesting and consequential as the Gilded Age (or the Late Victorian, or the Belle Époque, take your pick).

It's much more than fine clothes, mansions and the other trappings of wealth. The means by which people amassed so much wealth - and changed the world in the process - have had a much greater impact.

I'm using this period and these people as a backdrop to a new series of stories that I hope will be as much fun to read as they are to research and write.

So please let me introduce Celestia Dodd.

Read about her adventures in New York in 1889 and see how the bright lights and glittering jewels of the Gilded Age had a very dark side.

New chapters weekly.

Cover art by the author, with help from Jackie Reeves https://www.jackiereeves.com

title: Cows, Chaos and Chemistry (English)
description:
Finn Cooper thought he had his life perfectly planned-a loving boyfriend, a promising career in hospitality management, and the dream of becoming a chef just within reach. But when his estranged father dies, Finn is forced to return to Forestville, the small, conservative village he left behind years ago.

Faced with the crumbling remains of his father's farm, Finn discovers he's not the only heir. Noah Moreno-the infuriatingly smug, yet maddeningly attractive owner of a local dairy empire-has a claim to the property too. With nowhere else to stay, Finn is reluctantly taken in by the Moreno family. Forced to work alongside Noah to prepare the farm for sale, their constant bickering ignites a fiery tension Finn can't ignore-and one that might not just be anger.

As Finn uncovers long-buried secrets about his father and battles the unexpected chemistry with Noah, he must confront his past, navigate his heart, and decide if his future lies in the chaos of Forestville-or somewhere he never imagined.

A heartwarming, slow-burn romance packed with culinary dreams, tangled emotions, and the beauty of finding yourself where you least expect it. Perfect for fans of Red, White & Royal Blue and The Hating Game.

title: Emperor of Light. Volume 1: Prince of Dawns.
description:
"Prince of Dawns" is a book that transports the reader into a world of fables and magic. The main character is Andre, a young half-elf, who longs to uncover the mysteries of his origins. Surrounded by both friends and foes, he faces numerous challenges while trying to find his place in a world filled with dangerous creatures and complex intrigues.

In the background unfolds the story of Queen Mora, whose ambition and cruel rule lead to a monumental tragedy. Her son, Navi, known as the "Reaper," wrestles with an inner conflict between loyalty to his mother and his own sense of justice. Prince of Dawns is a tale of love, betrayal, and the search for identity that lingers in the memory long after the final page is turned.

authorBio: Nazywam się Karolina Joanna Poniatowska. Urodziłam się 2 września 1989 roku i mieszkam w Płocku. Jestem absolwentką Uniwersytetu Wrocławskiego. Tworzenie opowiadań i ich spisywanie zawsze było moją pasją. Poza pisaniem jestem szczęśliwą żoną i mamą dwójki dzieci. Uwielbiam grafikę i malowanie na szkle. To tyle, co o mnie 🙂 Planuję wyciągnąć z szuflady moją serię fantasy i się nią podzielić ze światem. Myślę, że będzie dostępna w wersji papierowej od przyszłego roku. title: Precious Chase of Hearts (Devotion Series #1)
description:
She was like a rose who came into nothingness.

🥀🥀🥀

One summer morning of the month of May, where flowers bloom magnificently, Precious accidentally pricked her fingers from the thorns of roses because of a certain man who accidentally bumped her. The man took responsibility of her wounds and treated it in a gentle manner. That one incident turns into a blooming moment of her life, entering to the world she had never fathomed to be possible, pouring red into her world full of blues.

🥀🥀🥀

All men are the same, as what Precious Mae Damien believes. They are cheaters, players, and would combine any number of dishes to their liking at the same time. Her views about men were not like this before, but because of a certain man who has significance in her life, everything changed and it was her father who hurt her and her mother.

After her father left them with broken promises and for another woman, everything changed in her life. She lost everything and she never found her way again. However, meeting Chase Haven Collins was certainly different. She slowly changed her views about men. He was like an effigy of light of hope and freedom who let her experience unfamiliar things and feel emotions she had never fathomed to be possible again.

Yet, something happened that made her build a barrier for everything including Chase. Only darkness started engulfing her sight and embraced her body. She never knew her way to escape from it again and something pierced her heart like how the thorns of the roses pricked her fingers before. She realized that some things came into nothingness.

🥀🥀🥀

CURRENTLY REVISING
Date Started Revising: December 22, 2022

title: The Wishing Games
description:
Six contestants compete for the ultimate prize: one wish.

When reclusive billionaire, Dorian James, decides to host a game show, he promises that the contestant who completes three trials will earn one wish from him. Nothing is off limits.

Calliope has no memory prior to her accident, no luck and, since she can't keep a job, no money. She's plagued by a reoccurring dream of an empty field, so unlike the crowded world she lives in. When a man begins to invade her dream claiming to love her, she grows suspicious of her own mind and desires. The suspicion only grows as thoughts of hellish demons begin to haunt her at every turn. Out of sheer desperation, she auditions for The Wishing Game, hoping to gain a cure for her sanity or the money to have herself committed. With little hope in being cast and even less hope in winning, Calli can only hope to stay sane long enough before her mind consumes her.
 
But behind the movie magic of the gameshow, a sinister plot is in play and humanity is at stake.

Each contestant will be tested. The line between what is real and what is movie magic will blur. 
In the end, one wish is at all it takes. 

To either save them or damn them all to hell.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I enjoy reading mostly fantasy romance, whether mild or spicy, and spend my free time writing it as well.
I plan on trying to do at least weekly chapter drops.
I have three novels I'm currently working on. That's right! Currently. . . as in I can't help but bounce back and forth. I know focusing on one would get the story out faster but it's the only way I know how to do things.
The first novel is loosely titled "Red". It's a first-person narrative about a girl who suffers tragic loses and discovers she's a werewolf while navigating grief, love and prophecy. It's a bit on the mature side.
"New Planet," that is more dystopian romance.
And "The Wishing Games," this one is light dystopian and very early stages.
I have a few other story ideas I'm milling around that I'll hopefully get around to writing this year, so be on the lookout.
I am not great with the whole "read for read" scene.  I enjoy happily stumbling into a great read. That being said, I don't mind read requests but I might not read it if it's not the genre I prefer. I don't read fanfiction at all.
I am open to criticism, however I'm not looking to undo main themes, etc. I have posted to sites in the past where people have been a little hypercritical. I'm not looking to be the next Neil Gaiman or Sarah J Maas. I'm not even looking to be the next Stephanie Meyer. I'm just looking to write what I love and share it.
XOXO JG 11/30/24

title: Monsters Are Forever
description:
The fourth and final book in the You Were What You Eat series.
It's finally senior year, and Anna, Mina, and Carmine are hoping for a normal year of high school. But the monsters they've defeated over the years seem to be coming back. Now they have to find out why they're here, and how to stop the demons they thought they'd left behind.

🔸Note: This is the fourth and final book in the You Were What You Eat series. You don't have to have read any of the previous books before you read this one, but since the central theme of this book is that the monsters in the previous three are coming back, the more of those you've read, the more you'll enjoy this one.🔸
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi! My name is Stephanie.  I was born in California, but I currently live in the Czech Republic.

I enjoy writing stories almost as much as I love reading them.  My favorites have a little bit of the paranormal/magic and a little bit of snark. I tend to write high school stories with a mythical twist, but I've recently branched out into more fantasy-oriented stories as well due to all the amazing competitions being held.

title: Na Jaane Kya Meri Pehchan Hai
description:
"In the glittering world of Delhi's elite, 20-year-old Aaradhya Oberoi is trapped in a life of luxury and deceit. Married to the charismatic and powerful Anurag Oberoi, 20 years her senior, Aaradhya must navigate the treacherous landscape of her new family's secrets and lies. But as she struggles to find her place in the world, Aaradhya begins to uncover the dark truth about her husband, her family, and herself. Will she find the courage to break free from the shackles of duty and tradition, or will the weight of her new life crush her identity forever?"

description:
I've heard stories before, stories about people losing their loved ones, grieving, healing. And that was the end of it. Comforting tales were these, and yet they left one thing to be desired: reality. In my world, people can't move on so easily. 

The dead don't let us.

writer, digital artist, coffee lover ♡︎

I write mostly fantasy stories with a hint of reality, as I love getting lost in mythical yet familiar worlds. But of course, I throw in the occasional romance ;)

title: Born In The Palace
description:
**Spin-off of Born In The Dungeons**

My mother birthed me in a palace. For nineteen years the boundaries of my title as a princess caged me in, not letting me see the world as I wanted, to go on wild adventures without servants following me everywhere I went or mother's dragon watching my every move. When a ghost visited my dreams one night, I got my wish.


***
(Book cover designed and created by me)

authorBio:
Hi there :)

Welcome to my fictional world. You'll only find happy endings here.

I've been reading stories on Wattpad for a while now and one day decided to write my own. My mind is always filled with random ideas for books, so I thought, why not make them come to life? Hope you enjoy reading them as much as I've enjoyed writing them!

title: HIDE AND SEEK
description:
Falling in love with your childhood friend is troublesome, especially when he treats you like his special someone but he falls in love with another girl. All I can do is hide my feelings for him for our friendship's sake and to make him happy with his true love. But what is this? After I left and decided to move on from my feelings for him, he suddenly appeared in my life once again after so many years. Will the feelings that I thought I forgot will come back? Can he seek the feelings that I hide from him for so long?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: When the Sun Fell |✔|
description:
When Summer Princess Lumikki is offered to the Winter King as payment for a debt, the Winter court is dragged into chaos. Alone in a foreign land, with no one but herself to rely upon, Lumi is quick to adapt in order to survive. 
But the longer the winter king stays with her, the more he is unable to let her go. 
Like the sun and moon, fate continuously has them moving towards each other- yet apart. 
As her life unfolds in unexpected ways, Lumi realizes that love can only be found, if all else is sacrificed. But are they willing to pay such a price? And are some loves worth fighting for? 
This is a story of redemption. This is a story of strength. This is a story of revolution.
This is a story, of when the sun fell.

title: Touch of Power
description:
Over seventy years ago, before the Great War of Regrets, humans began mutating randomly to have what is known as elemental powers, primarily showing in young children. Of the powers shown amongst humans, a few rare powers emerge causing rifts within the Kingdom of Alytha and the School for the Gifted: Glasswood.

Freya Ellis discovers one fateful night to have the most rare power among everyone: the power to steal another's power. With the threat that she can take anyone's gift away at any moment, Freya is shunned within Glasswood because of her gifts.

When the Royal Family of Alytha visit Glasswood for a festival and stay longer than normal, Freya's world of insecurity comes crashing down. With rising tensions within the kingdom, Freya must choose to work with the people who have casted her aside or get caught up with the threat of power.

{{NEW CHAPTERS EVERY MONDAY & FRIDAY CST}}

authorBio:

If you have somehow stumbled here, welcome!

I have been writing since middle school which has been well over a decade ago and my current projects are posting stories I have kept to myself this whole time. I have never shared my stories with anyone before so it's a little nerve-racking doing this, but I would like a way to preserve my writing as these are stories I've had for so long.

I categorize my writing based on the pairings I have. Down below I have the order in which I created them, from oldest to newest and it is QUITE evident that I've grown with my writing and the maturity with the writing. title: The Black Herons
description:
Optima. A nation of prosperity, peace, and control. As life goes on within the island's perimeter, so do the forces that keep the mysterious country in power.

The Black Herons, a team of agents working for an underground Optiman agency, are tasked by their nation's vice president to retrieve a relic linked to the country's first president. The prized artifact was given away to the American government decades ago, and the Optiman vice president is eager to have it back.

Viv West has been in this business for over twenty years alongside her partner, Fern Undergrove. The two co-founded the Black Herons long ago and have since seen a constant change in their roster.

Cato Rose, the team's weapons specialist, and Naomi Hale, the resident hacker, work alongside Viv and Fern through dozens of missions every year, yet these heists have never tired them. But their lives are about to take a turn, for better or worse.

For the herons, this task is no harder than all the other heists they have completed in the past. That is until the team of four is forced to train a new member. Enter Emaline Kit, a teenage agent with an attitude and attachment issues.

Despite a road of obstacles ahead of them, the Black Herons must prepare for anything that could lead them astray-even if these problems may involve the other members of their own agency.

New chapters updated every Friday!

Cover Art - @/pandaparadise (on Linktree)

title: Research: Romance
description:
𝐖𝐡𝐞𝐧 𝐟𝐢𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐰𝐫𝐢𝐭𝐞𝐫, 𝐋𝐞𝐚𝐡 𝐀𝐩𝐥𝐢𝐧, 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐢𝐬𝐞𝐬 𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐧𝐞𝐱𝐭 𝐛𝐨𝐨𝐤 𝐰𝐢𝐥𝐥 𝐛𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐞 "𝐑𝐨𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐍𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐥 𝐨𝐟 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐂𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐲" 𝐨𝐧 𝐧𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐭𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐯𝐢𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧, 𝐬𝐡𝐞 𝐟𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐬 𝐭𝐨 𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐲 𝐝𝐞𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐥: 𝐬𝐡𝐞 𝐡𝐚𝐬 𝐧𝐨 𝐢𝐝𝐞𝐚 𝐡𝐨𝐰 𝐭𝐨 𝐰𝐫𝐢𝐭𝐞 𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞. She never has. What she did know, however, was how to conduct extensive research on any topic she desired.  So, if research is what it took to keep her promise... That's exactly what she would do.  Besides, with a movie deal on the line...how hard could it be? 

𝐑𝐨𝐛𝐢𝐧 𝐌𝐨𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐢𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐡𝐨𝐫𝐫𝐨𝐫 𝐟𝐢𝐥𝐦 𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐲'𝐬 𝐝𝐚𝐫𝐤 𝐡𝐨𝐫𝐬𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐫. 𝐁𝐮𝐭 𝐟𝐚𝐦𝐞 𝐚𝐥𝐰𝐚𝐲𝐬 𝐡𝐚𝐬 𝐚 𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐞... After the release of his last movie Robin woke to find his "rising star's" status had fallen to "reckless rover" overnight. So, when he heard that his studio was forming a film contract with a budding Romance writer, one the public adored, it sounded like the perfect opportunity to get back in everyone's good graces. Besides, he had been acting his whole life. How hard could a little romance be?

𝐖𝐡𝐞𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐮𝐧𝐥𝐢𝐤𝐞𝐥𝐲 𝐩𝐚𝐢𝐫 𝐭𝐞𝐚𝐦 𝐮𝐩 to write the "romance novel of the century" what ensues is chaos, confusion, and endless comedy... but that's to be expected in Research: Romance.

title: Saudade
description:
Their past draws them closer but their present pulls them apart.

Everyone longs and yearns for something. From some people it could be love and in some odd cases, hate but for Chidera Olivia Maduka, it was her past and the questions that she probably never asked. 

She lost her Father at a very early age or maybe that was what she was told when she moved to America. She came back to Nigeria Ten years later and her past comes rushing to her like a storm but can she handle it? 

Hezekiah Zephyr Uzama is just a chill guy who loves living life to the fullest as it comes. He's liked Chidera since they were kids, maybe as a friend but as she came back to Nigeria, his feelings hit him with full force but Dera has a lot of Demons that she's constantly fighting. Would they scale through?

title: Stealing Stars - Stealing #1 (Complete)

Jessica has learned that the right choices are often the hardest ones to make. It takes a marriage proposal to know she's made the wrong one.

But before she can look to her future, she'll need to confront her past. 

Three brothers. One taught her to love, one taught her the depths of friendship and one taught her the true heartache of loss.

Jessica has a secret that will tear them all apart.

Will she risk it all, even the brother who owns her heart, to do what she knows is right?

title: Someone Else
description:
After moving to London with her best friend, the last thing Elle expects is to fall for a celebrity - though it may be more trouble than it's worth.
 
                                                                      *****
 
Elle Robinson never thought the man she's loved for nearly her entire existence would leave her, but when he does, she sees no other alternative than to run away to London. It wasn't the best laid plan for someone who typically thinks through every little detail, but when she meets screen and stage actor Jude Anderson, who never fails to bring a blush to her cheeks, she believes her life is finally on the right track again - new love included. But no romance is complete without a little drama, anxiety, and miscommunication - leaving Elle to learn how to take her life into her own hands and separate fact from fiction when her relationship hits the public eye.

Someone Else is the first book in a trilogy following Elle and Jude's love story. 

[[word count: 100,000-150,000 words]]

Cover designed by Moe Sangster

title: Beneath the Surface
description:
UPDATES FRIDAYS || After Kenna claims revenge on her cheating fiancée and so-called sister at the altar, the last thing she expects is a tidal wave of long-buried feelings for her brother's best friend when they run away together.
                                                     *****
Kenna Taylor's life has never been easy; her dad is high up in politics, her family is well known, and her past is full of tragedy and secrets that led Kenna to leave home when she was nineteen.

Six years after her boyfriend died, Kenna has found love again with her fiancée, Courtney, and she's excited for her wedding. That is, until the night before the wedding, she gets a tip that Courtney's cheating. 

Kenna flees, getting help from her brother's best friend, Cameron; the man who once saved her life. With a lot of history to uncover and hurt feelings to wade through, Kenna and Cameron find that sometimes feelings and secrets are always better uncovered.

title: A Forbidden Finale (Student/Teacher Romance)
description:
Thrown in at the deep-end when she gets a scholarship to an elite ballet Academy, Carly's only saving grace is her handsome personal tutor, Mr. Langley. 

Her ballet is below par, her classmates dislike her, and her only friend cares more about the environment than her.

title: A Deadly Bond
description:
Willow Ashen is a white wolf and never thought it was possible for her to get a mate as no one would be able to match her power... or so she thought. One day upon running in the deep forest she stumbles across five unknown wolves, one of which is Alpha King Legion.

King Legion is the alpha of all alphas, and also just so happens to be the mate of Willow.

---

"No." He speaks.

Is that all this man can say?

So I do another stupid thing... I punch him. Or I try. Just as my hand is about to collapse with his face, he catches it. Electricity sparks between us.

How did he do that? I'm too fast for most people!

He locks my hand against the tree behind me. "Don't you know who I am?" 

---

title: Match Made in Quarantine
description:
[NOW A FREE STORY!]
***
Aimee is a hardworking med student. Maddox is a wild business major. Together they share an apartment and absolutely nothing else. What happens when these two roommates are put on a 20-day lockdown during quarantine?
***
When a nationwide lockdown traps two dysfunctional roommates together, there's nothing they can do... except get to know each other better. This is a total nightmare situation for Aimee, who has successfully avoided doing exactly that for the past few months of living with Maddox, her playboy roommate. 

While neither of them expects it, they might end up finding friendship, comfort, and maybe even love, at a time when they need it the most. 

~~~~~~

title: The Queer Rebels
description:
In a society where technology enhances conformity, Charlie defies expectations by requesting to transition to male. But when the system wants to change his brain rather than his body, he and the woman he loves must join forces with a group of Queer Rebels to fight for their freedom. 

Season 1 of The Queer Rebels 

***

Charlie has always been told that on his twentieth birthday, he can choose to be anything he wants. Most people choose to be beautiful, or smart, or funny, but on his Choosing Day, Charlie asks for a male body to fit his mind. 

But when he realizes that authorities aren't going to accept his request and he's in grave danger, his only choice is to escape with Marcy, the woman he loves. Together, Marcy and Charlie give up everything they've ever known to escape the city for the Queer Rebels, who for decades have been providing refuge to runaways. 

At first, Charlie and Marcy's relationship blooms as Charlie finds a community he never knew existed and harnesses advanced tech the government's always hidden from them. However, nothing is quite as it seems, and things get complicated as they are forced to navigate ideological factions within the Queer Rebels. Charlie is drawn into a struggle for liberation, while Marcy urges caution. Their love was born in a repressive regime, but will it survive in the freedom beyond the city's borders?

Content warning: This story contains violence and mentions of homophobia and/or transphobia that may be upsetting for some readers. Reader discretion is advised.

***

Weekly updates on Thursdays. Wait & read for free, or unlock with coins-the choice is yours!

title: Awake | Book 1 of the AWAKE Series | (BWWM)
description:
At twenty-five Karter Jarreau finds himself as the Alpha of the Cynwulf Wood Pack. He is one of the most feared Alpha wolves in the South and his pack is full of warriors with a fierce loyalty to their Alpha. Karter's life is flipped upside down in one night, filled with bullets and blood. In desperate need of help he stumbles onto the porch of a woman with eyes like honeysuckle and the face of an Angel. When twenty-three year old Dylan Trevino answers her door and sees the man in need she relies on her profession as a nurse to get him back to health not knowing the man she's nursing is her mate. Things only get more difficult for the pair when Karter realizes that Dylan has no idea who or what she truly is. Can they hold the balance between love, lies, and loyalty? Or will it all come crashing down?

title: Ace Of Hearts(#Book1 in ACE series)
description:
#BOOK1 in 'ACE' SERIES
  He was like storm.
  He liked silence.
  He had looks which could kill.
  He is cold , ruthless and arrogant as hell.
  He had a past which forced him to become what he is.
  He was a typical billionaire.
  Ace Parker.
  
  She is clumsy.
  She likes talking.
  She was beautiful.
  She was selfless and kind.
  She had a secret no one knew.
  She was an ordinary girl.
  Eva Johns.
  
  
  Polar opposites right? 
  Ace needed a girl who would marry him for 1 year and then leave and all this for a stupid deal that his father made with him. Eva needed money because she had just run away from her home and something else also. two people in need meet in circumstances and maybe will be able to help each other ......
  
  "She met him.
  She married him.
  She hated him
  Yet she knew he was somewhat lost.
  So she swore to find the Ace of hearts .
  Not caring what it cost.."
  
  But the questions is, will they be able to live with each other? Or will their destiny play games and sparks will fly?

title: His Beauty & Her Beast
description:
Legend says a beast like no other was sent from the depths of the underworld to conquer and destroy all life on earth... stories of the evil and monstrous creatures roamed throughout the lands. Tales were told to children about a dark forest that must never be ventured for the creatures within will devour whatever is in its sights ruthlessly.

He was a beast but he was not cursed as one he was created as one. He could transform into a vicious monster; he had large wings that allowed him to sore through the sky along with incredible strength and speed that strikes fear and death into anyone before him. He stood nearly 7 feet tall with large rippling muscles making him appear larger and even more frightening in his beast form. He could transform from a beast to a human.

He was feared.

He had power.

....

She was soft and gentle. She walked with grace and elegance. Her kindness would melt the heart of any evil and her beauty was like no other.

She was the most gorgeous woman he had ever seen.

And the beast wanted her.

"P-please... don't hurt them" I shakingly stood in front of the petrified young children.

"You do not worry about yourself?" He spoke, and his deep and dark voice sent shivers down my body.

"Please they are just children they don't mean no harm" his eyes held adoration and something else.

"What's your name...."


"Elaine"

title: Royally Flushed
description:
When a broken Malia meets playboy Prince Louis at boarding school, past secrets emerge and a dangerous threat against the monarchy arises, but as they grow closer will their bond survive or will it be destroyed in the plot against the reigning family?

                                                       ***


Malia Spencer jumps at the chance to get away from her evil stepfather after her mother's death and finds herself situated at a nice prep school for the exorbitantly rich and famous in England after her aunt on her mother's side rescues her from America. 

Little did she know, though, that she was among royalty. 

Enter Prince Louis: the sexy and enigmatic bad boy player of Wilmington Prep that stumbles into her life without warning, opening her mind to his sarcastic remarks and smart ass ways. She realizes that he's someone she will have to endure if it means staying in England and as far away from her step father as possible. 

But what happens when the complexities of his royal life interfere into her own, digging into her past and the tragedies that accompany it?

Will she be able to pick up the pieces of her heart or will it forever be royally flushed?

title: Taunt
description:
"Can we stop feeling guilty, Amelia? Guilty for all the things that weren't our fault."

"We can Leo. Maybe someday."

"That day isn't far off Amelia. I'll make sure of it."


___________________________________ 


There is a lot to think about when you find out your best friend has been raped and murdered. There is even more to think about when you're the last person she saw the night she died.

But that's not what caused me to black out in the middle of a rocking party scene, surrounded by all the people I had known all my life. 


It was when I saw who had killed her. 



Hilarious, charming, the guy with the perfect quiff, and star quarter-back of the football team. He was loved by everyone. He was the guy you couldn't stay away from. 

Levi Harrison. 





My brother.

authorBio:
I have a dirty little secret...

I use way too much tissue. Well, you see...(rambles on and on about saving trees but then fails to). I can use up one tissue box in less than a week. Each meal I have, you will see at least four or five tissue balls beside me plate. And this is a conservative number :3 Okay why am I talking about tissue.

WARNING: Unhealthy obsession with sweet stuff like cupcakes and waffles and chocolate and honey milk and...did I mention cupcakes?
Another unhealthy obsession with cats =＾● ⋏ ●＾=
I read ALL of the comments on my books and ALL the messages in my inbox :3



Family! ✿ :
My sunshines, Papa and Ruka-san @4510471P ℒℴѵℯℒᎥѵℯ


This place, here, gives me all the happiness in the world. And I have no one else to thank but you Bakers for it.
As for my readers who read my other books and not the Baked series, the love is really not any less. I'm very glad that it's not just the popular ones that shine.
There are many people here, on Wattpad, that have made me the way I am and have helped me in my journey. But there is no way I can ever make up to them; only to press on and continue being who I am, write without regrets, and do my best. That way, I won't disappoint them.

It is very easy to be bad sometimes; to give in to the temptation of hurting others because you feel that the world is just so unfair to you. I guess true strength is when you  willingly choose not to do so; and perhaps wish them all the happiness in the world;


Even if you don't have it.




I am rather a people person. Message me, follow if you want to, I'll be happy to make new friends. ^^




Love comes with stupidity. So does bravery. And many other good things in life.

title: Urban Wolf | ✓
description:
Len has found his mate, but there's an unexpected obstacle.

He's recessive.

Len thought that he would always love Ahote, and all he had to do was grow up and claim him.

Before he could come of age and confess his feelings to the man he loved, a Siberian wolf from Russia had beat him to the task. Lost, confused, and not knowing how to handle his dreams being crushed, Len decides to pursue an architecture degree in Toronto to get away from his pack in Alberta when he turned eighteen.

That's where he met Adyen. His mate, and recessive werewolf that thinks he's a human.

[Wattpad Editor's Pick.]

title: and we hated
description:
APRIL
There's one thing I know for sure: I hate Noah Coin. I hate him. He's the guy who broke my heart years ago. The guy I'd rather never have to see again. But he's my brother's best friend. And he was invited by him to spend the summer in Spain with us. One summer wouldn't be enough for me to stop hating him.
Would it?

NOAH
Ever since I know I have only been in love once. With her. April Davis. My ex-girlfriend. My best friend's sister. I know I did a mistake. I let her go. But this summer, she's so close. I have a chance to win her back again. April hates me. She wants nothing more to do with me.
Can I convince her how much I love her?

Book 3 of and we series

description:

19-year-old Ella Walker has spent her whole life backstage. While her older brother Rory commands the spotlight as part of a world-famous band, Ella spends her time scribbling lyrics in her notebook where no one can see. And she's okay with that - mostly. But when Ella tags along on the band's next tour, she realizes maybe she doesn't want to just be known as Rory's sister anymore. Especially when it comes to Max Bentley, Rory's hot best friend and bandmate who Ella has had a crush on for years. So when Ella gets the chance to step into the spotlight herself, she takes it, throwing her life (and the band) into unexpected chaos. Ella has never had the courage to tell Max how she feels, but the tension is building on tour, and neither of them are prepared for what will happen when it breaks.

title: His Dreamer
description:
Book 2 of the Jackson Series!

With a family that wants nothing to do with her and nobody by her side to pick her up when she falls, Zoe Miller is struggling to make her dreams a reality. 

But things change when she runs into Hunter Jackson. Both hate each other with a burning passion from the start but that quickly changes as Hunter starts to care for the sweet yet sassy redhead. 

As they fall for each other, a family ridden with greed and ill intentions threaten to break them apart. But somewhere along the way, Zoe finds everything she's looking for in Hunter. 

It's now a test of whether their love will survive. 

***

"Did you really have to hit him?" I ask quietly as I move to clean the cut on his lip and cheekbone.
 
"Yes."

I smack his chest lightly with a glare. "All we had to do was walk away, Hunt. You can't just go around hitting people, especially at someone else's house!"

"Zoe, he's a sleaze bag! He harasses women every chance he can get!" He argues as I apply ointment to everywhere besides his lip. 

"Still Hunter, you shouldn't have -"

"He deserved it and I'm not sorry about ruining his stupid face!" He crosses his arms with an adamant huff. 

I close the kit with a slam before standing and making my way back to the bathroom. "I can't believe I'm in love with an idiot."

"Wait...you love me?" I freeze before turning to face him slowly. Fuck me, did I say that out loud?! I think to myself in horror. 

"Uh...it depends..." 

"On what?" He frowns in confusion as he stands.
 
"If you love me too?" I ask bravely while my poor heart hammers away in my chest. 

He shakes his head with an amused chuckle before staring at me with...adoration? "I love you too."

I blink in surprise before nodding my head dazedly. "Good." 

"Great." He grins widely as we just stand there staring at each other. "Can I have a kiss now?"

"What for? Breaking someone's nose? I don't think so."

After being trapped in the cursed town of Du Ciel for seven years, Isabelle's life was only going to get worse. Because she is turning eighteen, which puts her in danger of being sent in the next Offering to the Beast, her father pushes her to marry without love to save herself.

description:
It's not often I turn my back to the moon. But for him, I'd make friends with the darkness.

Or I'd fight it and all of its monsters.

There, in the luxurious Opulence Rose hotel, hundreds of wolves gather to celebrate the exposition.  But a time for festivity could soon become the era of a new war.

Will Jaylin be able to heal from the emotional lacerations of his recent hardships?  Will he manage to find his way over the pain of his past to find happiness with Quentin Bronx, or will the beast in him only bring new chaos over his life?

title: Dead If You Do
description:
A campus thriller: suspense, murder & one handsome roommate.
 
                                                                      *****

When Haley Bell is offered a scholarship to study at the exclusive Woodcreek College, famous for moulding the world's brightest thinkers, politicians and entrepreneurs, she jumps at the opportunity. 

Except when she arrives, the murders start.

In a campus hidden from civilisation in the mountains of Colorado, Haley's classmates are slowly turning up dead. As the bodies pile up and eyes of suspicion turn on her, Haley finds that there's a reason why she was brought to Woodcreek. 

And it wasn't to study.

title: Royally Screwed
description:
Alana has always found comfort in her bedroom, especially now with the Crown Prince of Greece warming her bed, but she never thought it'd spark disaster. 

                                                                            ***

Alana dislikes change. She's perfectly happy with her life until her father decides to ship her and the family off to Australia. In an act of rebellion, Alana refuses to find a job, instead choosing to spend her time sleeping with Phillip, a man with a body of a Greek God. But when things turn sideways and she ends up pregnant with the prince's baby, Alana realizes she's stumbled upon a lot more change and responsibilities than she has bargained for.

Content/Trigger Warning: this story contains mentions of violence and abortion

title: All This Time
description:
Christmas Break spent in the Netherlands sounds like the perfect way for Charlotte Wright to relax with her best friend - until she sees the family that they'll be spending Christmas with! Wolfram van der Waals makes no secret of the fact he isn't Charlotte's biggest fan, even though he's never met her before. A quitter may have given up on getting Wolf to like her, but Charlotte is determined to make it a very merry Christmas - and that includes getting Scrooge to crack a smile!

Her efforts blow up in her face and with Christmas soured, she has no reason to think of Wolf in the ensuing five years that she's spent establishing her matchmaking business in New York City. Until one day he makes her an offer too good to refuse...

title: An Aimless War (Greatest Thief 2)
description:
A year and a day is a long time to think about a single kiss.

But that's what Finn thought about, every day, until finally Tannix rescues him and sweeps him off to West Draulin. Finn quickly realizes that he likes West Draulin. He likes the good food and the expensive clothing. He even likes Tannix's knights. West Draulin seems like a place he'll really enjoy living.

Until one night, when everything changes. The kingdom of Zianna finds itself at war.

And Finn learns that being in a relationship with a lord isn't going to simply be the life of luxury he was starting to enjoy.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello!

I'm Julie, and I'm pretty much always working on multiple things at once! I love fantasy and anything historical, and I'm putting my Classical History degree to work with my worldbuilding! My main set of books stems from an almost ten year span of worldbuilding and writing. Currently I'm fixing up my old work and posting it as I go along.

'Without a King', the first book in the Greatest Thief series, has been self-published and is available for purchase! Information on where to find it can be found on my website!

The Greatest Thief Series and the Wanderlust Trilogy, take place in the same world. Although the two series can be read separately, chronologically the Wanderlust trilogy takes place first. For anyone interested in the world as a whole, I would suggest this reading order:
- Wanderlust
- Wayfarer
- Waterborne
- Without a King
- An Aimless War
- For a Year (novella)
- A Country Falls
- Through the North
- In Ink and Wine
- A Guide to Zianna (for bonus, but possibly spoiler filled, world information!)


My side project is The Ghosts of Akre Island series of novellas. I self published the first book (The Memory of Simon Battle) in 2019 with illustrations by my mother, Leslie Côté.

Links to how to buy my books can be found on my website!

title: The Divorce

Bella's main concern in life is taking care of her son Trent and providing the best childhood for him possible. title: Young Immortals
description:
The fae are closer to gods than humans -- immortal, divine, lethal. Most people wouldn't go anywhere near them, but magic-bound servants like eighteen year old Isobel don't have a choice.

To survive life at the Green Court, Isobel keeps her head down, living by the motto rarely seen, never heard. That is until a fae prince stumbles upon her committing a treasonous crime. 

The prince, Silas, will keep his mouth shut -- for a price. But soon, small favours turn into ruinous secrets, and Isobel begins to question Silas' true motives. There's a rotten core behind the glitz and glamor of the Green Court -- one full of ambition, lust, and betrayal.

title: Confessions of a Teenage Caffeine Addict
description:
"No amount of coffee could keep me awake like you do."

Jake is the hockey player with the hot girlfriend. 
Katie is the girl with a name no one remembers. 
Jake is used to getting what he wants. 
Katie is used to getting coffee for her hungover mother. 

Until one night, one chance meeting between two strangers changes everything. No words, no stories to share, and above all, no names. Just two people who don't know each other, a hot string of kisses in bathroom, and a mutual goodbye. 

Except there's one problem: Katie felt something.

title: Mistaking A Billionaire For A Gigolo
description:
At her engagement party, her fiancé had betrayed her.She announced she wanted to take revenge on her fiancé.

--------

A man's icy lips covered hers as he devoured her, giving her temporary respite from the heat. She reached out and flung her arms around his neck, sucking his lips greedily.
Loud moans and pants soon resounded around the room. Their shadows on the wall opposite overlapped with a burning passion.
As the light was dim, Charlotte couldn't see the man's face clearly. The only thing that occurred to her was how beastly he was in bed. He savagely took her until dawn.

title: Smitten Kitten
description:
When Vika gets kicked out of her flat, she moves in with her friend under one condition--she must babysit Cleo--the friend's best man's cat! She doesn't expect Cleo's owner to be the cold but delectably sexy Noel. And it turns out they'll be spending a lot of time together...

                                                                      ***** 

Self-proclaimed unambitious Vika is down on her luck. She's been fired from her job, kicked out of her apartment, and now she finds herself on her best friend's fiance's couch facing writer's block and a dreary future. To top it all off, she has to earn her keep by taking care of her friends' best man's cat. Vika's their maid of honour, so she can't exactly say no to such a simple request, especially when the best man in question is the drop-dead gorgeous Noel. Soon, sparks fly between Noel and Vika, but their chemistry is put to the test as wedding duties get underway. Can they keep the fire burning long enough not to make a scene at their friends' wedding?

description:
Alexander Remington is the CEO of a financing company, who despite his better judgment, lends out a considerable sum to a desperate man. Sure enough the man is injured, and with no assets, and no property offers up his only daughter as collateral. Alexander is hesitant to take her, not wanting to be apart of such a shady arrangement. title: KIARA: HIS JUNOON
description:
Kiara lived a quiet life in her small town, her days were filled with routines and simplicity, until one fateful night when she was attacked by a notorious serial killer. Miraculously, she survived the harrowing ordeal, but was left with more questions than answers. The killer spared her life, whispering chillingly in her ear that he would come back for her. Haunted by his words and the uncertainty of his motives, Tara's once serene world spirals into chaos as she delves into the mystery of why she was spared and what fate awaits her when he returns.
"I will be back for you, my diamond."

title: Chasing Grace
description:
{completed}

It isn't easy having non-supportive parents especially when you are caring for a two-year-old. Grace Foster, moves halfway across the country to live with her brother, to get away from her parents who could care less about her and her two-year-old. What she didn't know is that her older brother is living with a very famous and handsome rockstar.

Grace has to find her way into her new life, with a boy on her hip and a handsome rockstar.

Connor Cage, lead singer of the band Blimp is not only dealing with his management being down his throat about wanting new songs almost immediately but when it comes to his attention that his father's way of being a parent to his stepsister is not ideal. He has to manage a whole new album and take his father to court.

Connor has to learn how to balance his already busy life with personal and business matters, especially when his best friend's younger sister comes to live with them.

(Trigger Warning for sexual assault, abuse, and suicide)

title: Lucky For You
description:
After losing a friend, Clover Fields finds comfort in the one person who understands her feelings-Jared, her best friends brother.

                                                  xxx

After Clover Fields loses her best friend to a tragic accident, she enters her first year of university without a friend or a care in the world. She's alone, and she wants to keep it that way-it's easier that way.

But when she finds herself bumping into her school's wide receiver and ultimate flirt, she does her best to keep him at arms length. Because even though they have chemistry and a past alongside it, Clover knows that mixing with Jared Harvey can only lead to trouble. 

Because despite having a friendly persona and  seemingly bruised knuckles every time they meet, he's her best friends brother, and the last thing Clover wants is to be reminded of her guilt.

But with an unidentifiable past that ruined her life, only Jared can bring the pieces back together-even if that means learning something unexplainable.

title: His Playboy Ways
description:
"Please don't leave." he pleaded. His once arrogant, obnoxious, confident gaze looked so vulnerable, helpless and most of all like the young little boy I once knew. 

"I have to, I've warned you time and time again you will regret your playboy ways one day and it seems that day has come." I said softly looking into his lost looking, soft orbs of blue and grey. 

Meet Carly Isabelle Edwards, once was a rebellious badgirl now is the passive good girl who only worries about her grades and getting into a renowned college. When she moves back to California with her mom, she meets her once sweet, naïve and caring childhood friend after almost four years; to only find out that he had grown to be the biggest, obnoxious playboy.

Despite tons of arguments, fights and banter Carly and Mason are still best friends. Carly, however hates Mason's playboy ways and tries to change him but fails because of Mason's non-belief in real relationships and love. 

Carly's days of just worrying about school are gone. Her life has started revolving between relationships, feelings, love, hatred, old crushes, her past and even death.

Will Carly succeed in changing Mason's point of view or will it be too late when he realizes it himself?

title: Going 78 Miles Per Hour | ✓
description:
Dahlia Gray has the opportunity to leave. In a home that leaves her mentally exhausted at every small occurrences, she manage to snag a once-in-a-lifetime internship that could potentially fund her escape. It meets all her needs: housing, a full-ride scholarship, and if she sticks around long enough-a paid six-figure salary. The only requirement that threatens her chances? Her ability to drive. 

Reid Harlow has no aspirations in his life. Bound to a lifetime of bouncing from foster home to foster home, when he lands on the steps of the Soberano-Godfrey residence, he believes this one isn't any different. In an effort to get away from bubbly greetings, and a family that doesn't know when to shut the hell up, he found himself settle on a park bench with a cigarette for comfort. What he doesn't know is this specific bench happens to belong to a girl that doesn't like to share. 

He refuses to leave. She refuses to back down. 

Their instant love-hate relationship takes a turn when he offers to teach her how to drive.

This is dual perspective.

         ✗ 𝐜𝐚𝐥𝐥 𝐦𝐞 ✗
a young woc who is trying her best to bring alive characters that has been living in her head. she loves complicated family dynamics, found families, and philosophies about life and love. she is just trying to take it one day at a time <3


𝑾𝑯𝑨𝑻 𝑻𝒀𝑷𝑬 𝑶𝑭 𝑺𝑻𝑶𝑹𝑰𝑬𝑺 𝑫𝑶 𝑰 𝑾𝑹𝑰𝑻𝑬?
→ i write stories that contradict the norm. i write three-dimensional characters with flaws, personalities and rich backstories. i write justified antagonists and relatable protagonists. character developments, plot twists, and exploration of philosophies. i write bipoc and lgbtq+ characters as a whole-i don't use sexuality or ethnicity as a plot device nor a means to add. i explore their cultural/environmental/religious factors to make them who they are. i write complex characters with expositional plots and impactful themes.


𝑾𝑯𝑨𝑻 𝑰𝑺 𝑴𝒀 𝑼𝑷𝑪𝑶𝑴𝑰𝑵𝑮 𝑺𝑻𝑶𝑹𝒀 𝑨𝑩𝑶𝑼𝑻?
→ 𝘉𝘰𝘳𝘯 𝘞𝘳𝘰𝘯𝘨 is a novel about how life is still worth living despite its cruelty. It is a coming of age story between two polar opposites-a boy who doesn't want to live anymore and a girl who refuses to die. It will explore the complications of living in a world that has been nothing kind to you, and choosing to be kind, and complicated family dynamics, battling passive suicide, and how anger is just a coat for grief.
