title: Friendly Dating - Kira
description:
For 12 years, Ethan Fletcher has been the annoying, chaotic boy next door and brother to Kira's best friend... and she hated him... at least, she thought she did.

This story is about becoming friends and falling in love one fond memory at a time... and having loads of fun along the way. 

Friendly Dating - Ethan is written from Ethan's point of view and can be read before, during or after this one, but they do contain some spoilers for each other.

Excerpt:
Ethan spills through the gap between my curtains and lands on my floor with a soft grunt.
"You shouldn't leave your window open like that, Kicks," he huffs, getting to his feet. "Something weird could get into your room."
"So I see," I blink at him.

Genre: Teenage Romance/New Adult Romance

This is a work of fiction. Any names or characters, businesses or places, events or incidents, are fictitious. Any resemblance to actual persons, living or dead, or actual events is purely coincidental.

I reserve all rights as @MaggieOHighley. Please do not copy or use my work anywhere without my permission. Thank you.

authorBio:
When I write, the people living in my head and my heart take a roller coaster ride from my fingertips through my keyboard to the screen.
Once there, they do whatever they feel like doing, and I just try to make sure that they're doing it with adequate grammar and no spelling mistakes.
Sometimes they get away from me...

My writing brings me healing, makes me giggle, and makes me cry.

I'm hoping it could someday bring others healing, too... or at least cause them to take a break and have a little laugh.

title: Rebellion
description:
Picked for the WattVamps February Showcase & now a Wattpad Dark Fantasy featured story! 

The Risen Series - Book 1
Rebellion

I've been a cardholding member of the undead for centuries, torn away from the sun by a vampire with no care for human life. From the moment I opened my eyes to the night and had my first craving for blood, my Maker twisted and moulded me into exactly what he wanted; trapping me in his hold.

Until one day he let me go. 

Content to live out eternity as no more than a shadow, I do my best to stay out of trouble. But trouble always had a way of finding me. During a hunt, I run into another vampire doing his best to go unnoticed; one so ancient the air around him reeks of power, and he claims he's just escaped imprisonment from the very council that used me to their own ends. 

Atanas demands I help him until he regains his strength so he can finish what he started a century ago, but I'm not sure that's all he wants from me. And while I'm no supporter of the council he seeks vengeance against, there are secrets that bind my life to theirs, and I know better than most that disloyalty means death.

But in the shadows, a rebellion has been brewing, and I might be more important to both sides than I could ever have imagined.

title: This Alien Soul
description:
When Amber was just an infant an alien space ship crash landed in her small lake town of Mountain Lake, Georgia. The aliens were isolated, a large settlement that was heavily guarded to protect the citizens of Mountain Lake. Now with Ambers senior year starting, the decision had been made to start integrating the aliens into the community. Amber knows she should fear the Zion Alien, Alek, who has started in her class, but instead she feels an instant connection. Soon everything she thought she knew about herself and her world changes, will Alek be the rock she can cling onto?

After her parents agreed to give her to the infamous immortal, Fate, once she reached a certain age, Zayla has accepted her life as over. But not without a fight.

For years, she has spent training to kill an immortal. To kill Fate.

title: Hidden Riches
description:
Hannah Sky was a average 22-year-old woman with a content life until the day she came home to find her boyfriend, Peyton of 3 years on top of her best friend Julia. That same day, Peyton kicked Hannah out of their home, Julia had now claimed her place.

Logan Python was the long-lost son of Reginald and Anne Python; the richest couple in the country. He was sent away as a child due to his abusive father. Logan hated his parents for sending him away to be with his Uncle when he was a child. Even though Logan loathed his parents, he knew he would have to take over his father's company one day. He was awaiting the day they would approach him once again. 

Logan never thought he'd find a drunk, broken girl in a nearby bar the night he missed the winning shot for his basketball team. The moment Logan saw Hannah, he was instantly infatuated with this crying beauty. He wanted to save her. He wanted to save his "Bunny".

Little did he know, that stubborn girl was heartbroken and was not willing to fall for a ex-player like him. She had her heart broken once and didn't want it to be broken again.

Cover by @Infectious_Mortals

Warning: This story contains mature language and mature themes. Read at your own risk.

title: Chasing Calloway
description:
They wanted nothing to do with each other. They hate each other. Now they have to fake a relationship to get what they want. 

      ✩ ✩ ✩ ✩ ✩

Annie Calloway is in love. She's been in love with her best friend for thirteen years. She's content with staying on the sidelines and watching him shine. That is until Rhys Sinclair comes around and shoves her head first into the spotlight. A fake relationship with her best friend's arch-rival was not on her college bucket list. As she gets closer to the person she never wanted anything to do with, she gets more than she bargained for, and lines begin to blur.

         ✩ ✩ ✩ ✩ ✩

Rhys Sinclair is the best hockey player at Wakeford University...and he is drowning in problems. He can't get out of Garrett's shadow, he's failing two of his classes, and he's one mistake away from being benched for the season, which means he can't be team captain. Luckily, all three of those problems have one solution, Annie. Garrett's best friend, resident know-it-all, and they key to sending the team into chaos long enough for him to get what he needs. But a fake relationship isn't cut and dry when Annie is more and more tempting by the minute.

title: His Fairy
description:
Final book of the Jackson Series! 

Faye West is struggling to find friendship in college when Noah Jackson shows up, introducing himself as her new "roomie" and potentially much more. Sparks fly and things heat up between the pair as you would expect in close quarters before things for Faye take a turn for the worst. With pressure mounting from her father and a desperate need to please she finds herself caught in a war. Say yes to love or let it go?

But maybe she won't have to make that decision on her own. Because once a Jackson boy falls in love he falls fast and the same goes for Noah. He only has one semester but can he show Faye what really matters in life before it's too late? Or is he going to lose her to someone else?

Only time will tell.

*** 

"Do you think I should give Kane a chance?"

Noah looks down at me and his smile softens. "No."

"You don't approve?" I grin as we get to our floor and start walking down the hall. 

"He's not right for you."

"Really? You happen to know who the perfect man is for me?" I snort as I walk backwards while facing him.

He grabs my hand and tugs me towards him making me yelp as I crash into him. "Noah!"

For a moment he just stares at me before tucking my hair behind my ear with a gentle smile. My poor heart races a mile a minute because I don't think he realizes that he's still holding my hand and has it placed against his chest. I realize though. I notice. Just like I notice everything he does to me and how he makes me feel like I'm on cloud nine from a single touch. 

"You deserve the best. Not idiots like Kane." He rolls his eyes and we both smile at each other. "You deserve perfection Faye...because from what I've seen you are the epitome of that."

I swoon. You're perfection to me too Noah. Can I have you? 

Published to Wattpad: 07/08/2023

title: The Taint of Wolves
description:
Nova,  a former prisoner of an anti-lupine cult, must team up with the creatures she was taught to fear to save her beloved country from war. 
                   --------------------------------------------------------

Lycans and humans live alongside each other. Peace hangs by a thread.  At every corner, a new threat seeks to break the Peace Accords that keep the land from falling into war. 

The Ravi have emerged as a fanatical organisation whose sole-purpose is the eradication of the lupine race. Their secret weapon - the Omega.  A human bitten by Lycan. A girl tainted by the bond of the wolf. 

For the past eight years, Nova has found herself the subject of cruel and inhumane experiments. She rules the patients of the asylum with tooth and claw but evil cannot be contained forever.  Freedom beckons and Nova escapes into a world totally changed.   With the Ravi hunting her, only one wolf can keep her hidden.  Her long-lost mate.

title: Cynical Souls
description:
COMPLETED✅

Two high school teenagers finding themselves, analyzing this ever changing world, and building love.

This is the type of love you wish you found in high school but probably know way too well that it only exists as fiction.
Today I'm turning my fiction to reality. 

                                                 ❣️•••❣️

Excerpt:

Just as I was about to seek shelter under some building's roof, the tires of a car come to a halt, I wonder who might pity the lonely girl walking in the rain.

The passenger window rolls down, and I spot the most unexpected person seated behind the wheel.

"Get in" comes out his voice, and I must've stood there agape for a few moments because next comes his rhetorical question.

"Are you getting in or continuing walking in the rain?" Eyebrows raised expectantly. He sounds annoyed, like he regrets his decision to ever stop and help me.


                                                  ❣️•••❣️

title: Dually Devoted ✓
description:
"Why don't you understand? I want you to be happy, you fool."

****

On the surface, Arpita was a calm, smart, independent woman, living a simple life. But inwardly, her heart was constantly in pain, waiting for her beloved to return. 

Years had passed since the day he had stepped out of her life. Her loved ones wanted her to move on, but she was determined to wait. And then entered her new boss, Mr. Siddharth Tripathi.

Without her own notice, a beautiful friendship blossomed between her and the billionaire. Siddharth was slowly, but successfully, breaking down her barriers. And, though Arpita's feelings for her first love refused to fade, she realized...

It was time. Time for her devotion to be put to the test.

title: Lost in the Castle
description:
THE AMBY AWARDS 2022 WINNER (Best Series)

Book One 
(Book Three of the trilogy is on the WATTYS 2022 SHORTLIST)

Wattpad featured story.

The Adept Pen 21 finalist.

Samara, a young woman from London, visits Bran Castle in Romania during a Halloween night.
 
Somehow, she's always felt drawn to the story of Vlad the Impaler, the historical character who allegedly inspired the writer, Bram Stoker, to write his Count Dracula.

Annoyed by her noisy friends, she strolls behind her group when they enter the castle and thus gets approached by their tall dark and handsome guide. Samara can't fight the attraction she feels for him, even after he claims to be Vlad Dracul himself, obviously making fun of her...or?

At the end of the tour, unable to resist her curiosity, she follows the guide through a dark corridor and time travels to another time,
a late medieval world populated by very unusual vampires, where she had once belonged. 

The mysterious guide turns out to be her husband, none less than Vlad III, the Prince of Wallachia, the Impaler... Dracula.

Samara's memories start to trickle back slowly, both good and bad. The man she loves so much that she feels overcome by her feelings for him is not exactly as he was when she left him before, when she... died. A lot of things have changed in her absence, in six hundred years.

But she is changed too, having grown up in the 21st century this time around, she is not quite the same girl as when she lived in Vlad's castle, in the late medievals.

Will the great love they feel for each other despite their long separation be strong enough to overcome all their differences? Will Samara and Vlad accept each other as they are now and fight for their love? Will they defend it in the dangerous world they live in, full of people, or better vampires, who would rather see them apart? In this place where nothing and no one is what they really seem to be at first sight?

title: Ad Astra
description:
[LGBTQ+ New Adult Fantasy] In the colonized country of Landiani, Fetia is no stranger to the oppressive tactics of the Magnuvians, who first conquered the nation decades prior to drain Landiani of its magical resources. When a long-awaited opportunity arises for Fetia and her younger sister, Kiana, to aid in the liberation of their country, Fetia is sent to Esterpool, where the Magnuvian royal princess, Asteria, resides. The plan is simple; under the guise of a maid, Fetia will gain valuable information of the royal family from Princess Asteria, and together, she and Kiana will use their knowledge to assassinate the royal family, and consequently destroy Magnuvia. The only problem? Princess Asteria is dangerously more beautiful and charming than Fetia expected. Will Fetia be able to follow through with the plan, or will Princess Asteria be too great of a temptation to resist? Find out in the first book of the duology, "Ad Astra."

(Published: 2023)

title: Under The Stars | on-going
description:
"You drew stars around my scars, but now I'm bleeding..."

Gaia Ashmore has lived under the radar of her strict mother all her life. Every aspect of her life - from her fashion sense to her career - is controlled by her mother. And even when Gaia moves across continents for university to somehow lessen her mother's pressure on her, it seems as if she can't escape from her family roots.

Ilkay Muller is the antonym of organised. Despite his high school grades only scraping his acceptance into his first choice of university, his intelligence stumps many. With an obscure past and severe daddy issues, Ilkay hopes to make it through without any more added trauma.

But a tiny incident can change the fate of the universe forever. And while finding running from their pasts and escaping old wounds, Gaia and Ilkay experience the unexpected. Their tiny incident. Love.

• • •

"Missing you comes in waves. Tonight, I'm drowning."

"Your beauty puts the stars to shame."

title: Crown Of Curse
description:
A girl in disguise. An heir in hunt. A world divided. 

Iris Lavera is born into the civilization of the least respected ones. The lineage where it's predicted to birth a curse. A low born who will be the downfall of an entire nation if left alive. 

For year's their fragile community has been combed by the powerful ones, treated like dirt, and tested to their strip of patience. Being called an abomination for the one person who wasn't even born yet. Or so they believed.

The glaze Antar, a magnificent realm sanctioned by tons of wealth, thousands of warriors, four supreme's, and a dominant ruler are braced to annihilate the affliction. Except for someone who seemed quite unbothered by it- the Prince himself, despite it's his head that's at stake. 

That is until he meets her, a girl forging a fictitious life.

He could sense the signs.

He should put a bounty on her head. 

Have her chained in the dungeon to see what she was capable of. 

Burn her up by the pyre at the first doubt of her being a spy.

Instead- he would escort her into his world to see if he could break her enough to make up for all the nights she haunted his dreams. 

And for all the days he craved her.

title: Hector, I Love You (International Version)
description:
Clara's journey to finding happiness again was not an easy one. After seven long years of mourning the loss of her beloved partner, Hector, she finally picked herself up and found joy in life again. Though she knew in her heart that there was no way to change the past, Clara refused to let it define her present. She had survived countless bad dreams and moments of darkness, always pulling herself together and carrying on as usual.

But fate has a cruel sense of humor, as Clara soon discovered. Just when she thought she had moved on from the pain of losing Hector, the past came back to haunt her in the most unexpected way. Her heart shattered into a million pieces as she realized that the very thing she thought she had left behind had returned to break her once again, piece by painful piece. Despite this setback, Clara remained determined to find the strength to heal and move forward again.

authorBio:

title: Beyond The Gaze: A Love Unseen
description:
Ares Simon Knight, a wealthy business magnate, is known for his expertise and ruthlessness in business. After failing in love twice, he has closed off his heart to the world, completely shutting himself. The only goal he has now is to expand his business empire. Little does he know, his plan is going to be disrupted the moment he sets foot in the office and meets his new hired executive assistant, Elysia Lawson, the best friend of his ex-girlfriend and the woman who betrayed him.

Elysia Lawson, an innocent woman, with a situation of Post Traumatic Stress Disorder (PTSD), is smart, and beautiful, but everything mess up the moment she catches a glimpse of Ares, turning into a blushing mess and a bundle of clumsiness. Unbeknownst to Ares, Elysia has silently admired him from afar for a long, long time. She had always been his silent and secret admirer, a harmless stalker, but everything changes when he started dating her best friend, Aubrey Anderson, because of a reason unknown to any of them.

Sven Neve Damaris, the notorious troublemaker and high school's ultimate playboy, stumbled upon a "little mouse", secretly following a guy named Ares Simon Knight. Sven, always up for mischief, thought it would be a game, but instead, he finds himself caught between love and friendship as he falls for a girl who's always had her heart set on someone else, leaving him in a shadow.

Their high school ended abruptly, holding within it secrets, betrayals, and lies, until they crossed paths again!

With Elysia's return to Ares' life, a Pandora's box needs to be opened, but both are reluctant to delve into the past, keeping their interactions strictly professional. But what about the hearts that have been entangled for the longest time?

Amidst their close interaction in the office, their lives are thrown into chaos with the return of Aubrey, and Sven, who had been in love with Elysia for years. 

Explore a tale of love, redemption, and long-buried truths as past and present collide!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"Not white, nor black, My stories settle in the grey zone...😉"

Hey there, I'm Arlene Rae, and Welcome to my Profile Page. ♥️

Let me mention a few things about myself. My writing journey began in 2023. I'm not the one for fancy words; I believe in the beauty of simplicity.  

I'm all about storytelling, and my heart lies in the genres of Contemporary Romance, Teen Fiction, New Adult, and Young Adult. But wait, there's more. I love to sprinkle in drama, action, thriller, mystery, and suspense to keep things interesting. 😉 

Writing started as a hobby, but it quickly blossomed into a passionate adventure. The reason being, You! All of you, my wonderful readers and fellow authors, who have fueled my creativity. Their love and support mean the world to me, and I'm forever grateful for their kind words and encouragement. 😘 

In my author's world, I welcome positive criticism, thoughts, opinions, and suggestions with open arms. But if you're here just for criticism and to spread negativity, I'd kindly ask you to take a different path. Crafting each chapter and story takes countless hours and unimaginable effort. Hence, I would not tolerate any kind of disrespect.  If you find yourself lost in my stories and the characters I've brought to life, I'd be over the moon if you could take a moment to follow, like, vote, comment, share, and leave reviews on the final chapter. Your support means everything.

If you'd like to connect further, you can find me on Instagram. Let's embark on this literary journey together! 🤗

title: Mermaid Tear (The Fated #2)
description:
Her entire life, Iliana has heard that those affected by the hands of the gods will live harsh, grand lives. Unfortunately for her, over the past month she has learned exactly how true those stories are. 

For Kain, that means learning how to deal with what it means to be a hero. Selflessness and bravery are required in equal measure, as well as the will to step into a role he has never wanted to play. As those around him begin to recognize the string of fate at play, unexpected allies arise, and take actions that will shake the world as he knows it.

For Iliana, it means navigating life among the Reotakian peerage. Given to the emperor as a plaything, she must learn to hold her tongue, or suffer at the madman's hands.

Unfortunately for both of them, games played by the gods are never easy. 

The measure of life in the eyes of an immortal will always be different than that of a human. 

And the death of a hero, necessary for the betterment of the world.

**Cover by ItalyChick**

authorBio:
Hi, Kat here~! Or, Unbound, depends on your preference.

So, about me.

I'm 27, use she/her/hers pronouns, and am a hopeless romantic when it comes to books. I enjoy cliches, books with royalty, dark magic, and world-ending stakes. Fate is another bonus for me, as well as dark fantasy. This shows a lot in my writing!

The main project I have on this account, The Fated, is a four book series full of magic, gods, royalty, and a bit of fate. There are slow burn romances, deaths, angst, and swordfights! title: His Daredevil
description:
Book 3 of the Jackson Series!

Elena Moretti is a journalist...but more importantly, a troublemaker. So, it's no surprise when she gets involved in a chase for a serial killer targeting young girls. 

Her only distraction? The ever serious and reserved, Roman Jackson.

He's leading the case and can't help but be infuriated by the woman who seems to have a death wish. But as he tries to get her to stay out of trouble he finds her growing on him along the way. 

A wild woman with no filter and a sucker for trouble. Looks like Roman Jackson has finally met his match.


***


"Do you want to move to the back to sleep?" Roman asks and I shake my head slowly. 

"I don't think that's a good idea."

"What - why?" He frowns at me in confusion before following my gaze to the rear-view mirror. "Fuck me!"

There's a large van and three cars following us. The fact that they're all blacked out and roughed up is a huge giveaway. I open the compartment in front of me and grab the gun, making sure it's loaded and the safety is off.

"Maybe after we make it out of this alive."

He rolls his eyes before accelerating.

title: The Exiled King
description:
Book 1 & 2 | Sunday Updates 
"The world will return to the nothingness that it was birthed from if the truth is not unveiled."
Guardian powers have been passed down for centuries, until they disappeared after a devastating war. Now, 50 years later the powers reappear in six unsuspecting youths who have their lives turned upside down in an instant.

Faced with their newfound powers and the responsibilities that come with them, they learn that their world may very well be destroyed if they cannot stop the enemy who wishes to destroy it.

Punished by the gods and locked away for centuries, a mysterious wizard escapes his confinement and plots to unleash hordes of demons on the mortal world. But it could all just be an elaborate ruse to cover up something more sinister brewing beneath the surface...

See the worlds through the eyes of the young guardians as they embark on an epic, world-spanning journey to discover themselves, their powers and, above all, if they will be the ones to save their world or destroy it.

But in a world where all is not as it seems, the guardians must tread carefully, or all hope may be lost... forever.

title: His Serendipity[BWWM]
description:
"I didn't know that I needed you until I met you. Clover Blossom, you're my serendipity."

••••

                                           ser·en·dip·i·ty
                                           ˌserənˈdipədē

"the occurrence and development of events by chance in a happy or beneficial way."

It wasn't a coincidence, it wasn't just a fluke. It seemed as though God Himself wanted them together, so He made a way. 

Kane DuPont and Clover Phoenix's meeting in an elevator left them both hooked, but when Kane is asked to marry someone for the sake of his sick mother's last wish, he has to forget about the woman that enchanted his heart, and pursue his marriage. 

What happens on the day of the wedding when Kane sees that his bride is none other than Clover Phoenix?

Sparks fly and Kane is on a mission to make Clover fall in love with him, he finally has the chance to have her in his arms, and he won't pass it up. 

The question is, will Clover return his feelings? 

Or,

Will her hesitance keep her from finally having a true love?

Will Clover let their serendipitous moment live?

Find out in His Serendipity

title: Not If I Date You First
description:
She's a paparazzo. He's a celebrity. And when the two of them get together, cameras will flash and sparks will fly.

The summer after she graduates from high school, eighteen-year-old Ada Datchery lands her dream internship, working as a celebrity photographer. Ada's determined to do whatever it takes to turn her internship into a permanent career. But after she gets into an altercation with Liam Anders, Hollywood's hottest young celebrity, Ada becomes the center of a tabloid scandal. When rumors about an unlikely romance between Ada and Liam fly, giving an unexpected boost to both their careers, they decide there's no harm in faking a relationship for the cameras. But as the line between what's real and what's pretend begins to blur, Ada finds herself under constant media scrutiny. And when her new boss pressures her to expose Liam's biggest secret, Ada realizes that making her dreams come true could cost her everything, including her heart.

title: MY CHRISTMAS ROMANCE
description:
Everyone knows those Christmas romances where they pretend to be a couple for the holidays and end up falling in love before Christmas Eve, right? Well, at least every hopeless romantic does. 


Penelope knows these movies by heart, watching them every cold December night as she hopelessly waits for Aden, her irresistible colleague, to get the hint and see her as more than a friend.

But this year, she won't wait for Santa to bring her the perfect romance. She is determined to take matters into her own hands and get the love story she's been waiting for too long.
She has the perfect plan for it: she will ask Aden to be her fake boyfriend for the holidays. If it works in the movies, why wouldn't it work in real life, especially when they have already so much in common? 

She has everything planned to make him fall in love before Christmas day, well, everything except a little detail... a pair of green eyes and a devious smirk that have driven her up the wall her whole childhood: Theone, her brother's best friend.

He's back for the holidays, and she knows the moment he passes the door that it means nothing but trouble. 

What she doesn't suspect, though, is that he could mess her perfect Christmas romance the only way she would have never thought of...



Join Penelope in her journey to find love, where there are gonna be all these classic Christmas romances must-haves: romantic ice-skating, cookies made with love, mistletoe kisses, adorable little kids, snow... yet maybe not as you imagine. 



Featured in Wattpad Chicklit's Four Seasons Reading List
Featured in Wattpad Stories Undiscovered's Plain Janes? Not these ladies... Reading List

title: The Perfect Match
description:
First book in the 'Match' series


Armaan Singhania

He never had it easy. Between raising his brothers and making his own identity in society, he didn't have time for anything else. It changed when he first met a certain author. 

Three years ago, he was supposed to offer a contract to her to work with his publishing firm. What he didn't know was he would offer his heart too.

The author is aloof and closed off and probably never saw him in that light. But now, he is determined to change that. He is done waiting, and maybe she would reciprocate his feelings.


Rivaah Rajput

She had always wanted to be an author but she never knew she would be left alone in the end.

She lost everything five years ago. She got responsibilities with no one on her side to help. Now, she's more independent than ever.

The only thing she craved was love and it might just knock on her door. And maybe, just maybe, she would be brave enough to let it in.

But she has secrets of her own and she'd die before letting anyone use them against her.

title: Daughters of the King (Completed)
description:
{WATTYS 2020 WINNER} {FEATURED BOOK} Paris, 1663. 500 girls selected by King Louis XIV embark on a journey across the seas from their homeland. Each is given a dowry, and the expectation that they are to marry a French settler, in order to increase the population of New France. They are the historic Daughters of the King, or "les filles du roi." 

Eighteen-year-old Celeste Dubois is a free-spirited, educated and headstrong girl. She comes from a wealthy Parisian family that has squandered their money and is subsequently forced to journey to New France. However, Celeste doesn't plan on marrying a complete stranger. She hopes to use the dowry and the free voyage as a way to escape the poverty and social ranks of Paris. Matters are complicated when against her will, she falls in love. 

Romantic, kind and stunningly beautiful Lorraine Leblanc is a girl from a large family with children to spare. Unlike Celeste, she happily dreams of the day she will meet her future husband in New France. When she marries a mysterious widower with two young children of his own and still reeling after his broken heart, she realizes that married life isn't all she had hoped it would be, and begins to question her new husband's complicated past.

- Wattpad Picks Blast to the Future Past list 2018
- The 50 Best Wattpad Stories of 2018/19 by Design Wizard
- 2018 Youngblood Awards Winner (Romance)
- 2018 True North  Awards 2nd place for Historical Fiction and 2nd place Truly Canadian special category award
- Featured by Wattpad Historical Fiction profile under Kings, Courtships and Empires, Young Adult Fiction profile under Love, Actually and Romance profile under Time will Tell

*Please be aware that since this book covers the colonial period, it does contain sensitive themes of racism and violence that readers will find disturbing. There are resources at the back of the book that prompt further learning in the Historical Notes section.*

title: Don't Fall in Love with the Flirt
description:
WARNING! Don't fall in love with the flirt. You're bound to get your heart broken...
Growing up, Jasmine Lopez has always been the pretty one. Her stunning features and natural charm have made all the boys flock at her feet and all the other girls hate her. She's that girl who'll steal your date and make your boyfriend's eyes stray.

But here's a secret - Jasmine is not the consummate flirt everyone believes her to be. 

 All the guys she dates only see her as a challenge and not as girlfriend material. So she dates a lot but never commits to one guy. It's her way of pushing them away and keeping her heart safe.

Until her childhood BFF Sebastian moves back into town.

Sebastian is the friendly guy-next-door (with six-pack abs!) who's just too good to be true. And for the first time in her life, Jasmine feels like she can be herself around someone. No games. No pretenses. 

As they spend more time together, Jasmine thinks that maybe, just maybe, she's starting to catch feelings for him.

Can Jasmine let go of her player persona and finally open her heart? Or is Sebastian just playing a game of his own?
--
This story  has 20 Chapters! (COMPLETE)

#1 BESTSTORYEVER in just 1 week! 24 June 2022 - 25 July 2022
#13 BOYNEXTDOOR - 29 June 2022

authorBio:
Hi, I'm Jeyla Lynn! Welcome to my page. I'm new to Wattpad!

I like writing love stories that are fun and sexy. I write about characters who are often misunderstood because I believe that everyone deserves a happy ending.

I'm an avid reader who loves to get lost in a good book. But I must confess that I'm a sucker for a feel-good, butterflies-in-my-stomach romance.

If you're a hopeless romantic like me, check out some of the stories I'll be publishing here on Wattpad.

I hope you enjoy my stories! Thanks for stopping by!

title: Second Lanark
description:
Drama. It was the one thing Elizabeth wanted nothing to do with during her first year of university. She'd had enough of that in high school. 

At first, it seemed like it was going to be a smooth year: she liked her roommates; the varsity swim team was fun and there was a cute British guy on her floor who made her heart sing.

Then, the British boy began spending a lot of time with another girl; the swim team took a risk that could lead to the team's cancellation and two of her roommates started to argue all the time. Suddenly, Elizabeth's first year of university becomes fraught with problems she couldn't have foreseen. 

It's going to be a heck of a freshman year. 

Warning: references to drinking/drugs, references to sex, some strong language

title: The Art of Being a F*ck Up
description:
[[SEQUEL]]
"Not Another High School Love Story" MUST be read first

▪️

*SYNOPSIS*

After suffering a serious injury on the field and being forced to put his days of playing college football behind him, Brent Fox has his own story to tell. With the help of a familiar guidance counselor, a dimwitted best friend, and an increasingly distant boyfriend, Brent must learn to navigate the rapidly changing landscape of working part-time for family, the intimidating reality of life after graduation, and the forces that could very well keep him from getting that far--even if it means coming face to face with the biggest demons from his past. Falling from grace is never supposed to be easy, but with little more than a busted knee and failing grades, it seems the former golden boy can't escape the same, gnawing question:
How the hell are you supposed to be happy when you lose everything you love?

title: Cinnamon Apple Pie
description:
Faith Peterson is known as the town's princess, legendary for clumsiness which always makes the front page of the local newspaper. After cancelling her engagement to the most eligible bachelor in town, causing an uproar and making everyone wonder what happened, Faith decides to wait for a true fairytale worthy romance. It all came down to love. She didn't love her fiancé, neither did he love her back. So, was it wrong to long for more than a convenient marriage? Was it wrong to wait for prince charming? What if he doesn't exist? What if she just threw away her one chance at happily ever after? 

Callum Grant thought he had the perfect life. Perfect job as a doctor at a big hospital, perfect girlfriend, perfect best friend, perfect apartment... Perfect everything... But then, out of the blue, it all started to fall apart. His job was making him depressed, and his girlfriend wasn't the women he thought he was going to marry after all. Lost and broken, Callum left his whole life behind, and decided to start over, in the middle of nowhere. But where was his life going to go from here? Will he ever trust anyone again? Will he ever feel happy again? Did he just threw his whole life away and started over for nothing? What is he going to do from now on?

A feel good romance, where two broken people find each other and make you believe that love is worth it.

title: Chasing Casey
description:
#1 Mystery | #1 Thriller | #1 Young Adult

Have  you ever known someone more than you know yourself? Known them so inside out that you could finish their sentences and know what they're thinking, just with a glance? 

  That was Casey and I. We were the ultimate best friends. We knew more than we should about each other. I was hopelessly and undeniably in love with him.

  I still remember the day perfectly. I wish I could say there was something to hint that it was coming. There was nothing. I thought I knew everything about him. Apparently not.

  He killed himself and a part of me died along with him.

  He was dead, and so was I. 

  Or, so I thought.

title: The Other Side
description:
Edited.
Completed
Highest ranking #4-boxing. Jun 14 2020.

Nate, a shy highschool nerd has never felt what to be loved and craved is.

Ryn a bad girl who had been sent to a military school returns back to her hometown. She is a notorious unruly girl with tattoos protruding to her arms and is a secret fighter in an underground fighting club. She is also a champion racer the boys love her. With her killer body, she is everything the boys want and everything the girls want to be.


Being the daughter of a Multimillionaire has its pros and cons as well. She has secrets and Nate's curiosity drives him to find them out. But in the process their worlds collide.

title: Star Wars: The Jedi Reborn ✓
description:
Luke Skywalker, the Last Jedi, faces his toughest challenge yet. After taking his Jedi vows, he assumes the misbelief that love has no place in his life. As a result, he denies the love he craves in order to establish the New Jedi Order and maintain peace and justice in the New Republic.

His sister's tumultuous marriage and unplanned pregnancy, disillusionment with the Jedi Code, and a sinister Empire that will not admit defeat all compound as Luke establishes the Jedi Academy.

Join him as he battles the darkness within himself, discovers the origins of the Jedi, and fulfills his destiny pursuing compassion above all else. The one thing that a Jedi is forbidden may be the only thing that saves him and the galaxy.

(A fan reboot set between Return of the Jedi and The Force Awakens in the tradition and style of the Original Trilogy.)

TRIGGER WARNINGS: Luke suffers from PTSD after the Emperor's Force-lightning attack, which is limited to his reliving the experience.

Cover by: @FayLane
Editor: @MichaelHoliday

title: Underage
description:
I feel the breath of air on the back of my neck. My limbs freeze and my breath catches in my throat. The male hands grab me by the hips. I can't move. His lips are by my ear, grazing the skin, his teeth tugging on my earlobe. His breath is hot on my skin, his lips moving down to my neck. My head tilts slightly. I shake my head. He doesn't have a weapon, I do. I turn in his grip, raising my bat. He catches the swing with one hand. He doesn't even flinch. 
  "I wouldn't do that baby." His voice is like velvet, filling up the room. His lips are back on my neck, his tongue trails over the skin. The voice, the lips, are familiar. "You might mess up my pretty face." 
  "Pretty face, my ass." I let the bat drop to the floor in-between the two of us. I should've known. "What are you doing here?" 
  "Besides scaring you shitless?" 
  "You didn't-" 
  "Don't lie, I saw what you did to those poor hangers." 
  
  ***
  
  It's a game of cat and dog.  A game that's lasted four years. A game that expires in three short months.
  
  It's a battle of wits, of sarcasm, of teasing one liners, of sloppy kisses that may lead to more but nothing passed physical.
  
  It's a game with no rules.
  And they seem to be breaking them all. 
  
  Thea Shaw and Ethan Michaels have a complicated relationship. One that neither wants to come to an end. But with college nearing and feelings developing what will come of their little game? He promises her one last summer of underage fun; parties, sunsets, long talks, sweet kisses, and no talk of college until it's time to leave. There are only two ways this summer can end. Either in each other's arms or the breaking of their hearts.
  
  #4 in New Adult

title: Pit Lane Persephone
description:
Out of all the guys in the world, why did Lauren have to fall for her own teammate?
                                                                      *****
                    
Lauren Dimas has been riding motorcycles since kindergarten, and she's pretty sure Cadmium Racing contracted her based on her technical skills. But as the first girl in international road racing, she still has to fight for respect from fans, sponsors, and the media to prove she's not just a token pretty face to drive up viewership and endorsements. 

Getting her world champion teammate and resident bad-boy Seb Bianchi to take her seriously is another matter. Seb's support could sway the rest of the paddock in Lauren's favor, but she's struggling in the middle of the field while he's hell-bent on becoming number one again. When rumors link them romantically and team bosses decide to embrace the false gossip for publicity, the lines between pretend and reality suddenly become blurred. But is putting both of their hearts and careers at risk worth it?

* Honorable Mention/Shortlist @NARomance 2021* 
For fans of A QUARTER MILE AWAY or Tamara Lush's DRIVE

title: Good Things I'll Never Do Again
description:
***THIS STORY WILL BECOME FREE ON JULY15th!***

Beverly Curie only lives for herself (and maybe ice cream). When her three nieces are suddenly put under her care, she must do the impossible: think about someone other than herself.

Beverly is the only member of her family left in Chestnut Ridge, where she's kept the same routine for eight years: do as little work as possible during the day, marathon sitcoms in the evening, and try (for the life of her) to get everyone to leave her alone.
When she loses her position at Red Ribbon's Craft Store, Beverly is left without a job and without a paycheck. 
Then her estranged sister, Aimee, calls with an impossible favor: Could Beverly take care of her three nieces for six months?
It's insane.
But then there's the thirty thousand dollars that Aimee offers to pay and Beverly can't resist.
Suddenly, she's stuck taking care of three little girls, trying not to kill the soccer moms at the snobby Percival Academy, and joining the PTO. 
Now Beverly--self-serving, sarcastic, and problematic--must take on the role of a loving parent. And she is anything but.

This story is now available on YONDER, your next-generation reading app from the Wattpad family. Join me on YONDER today! Find it now in your app store.

Cover designed by Ilafi Nastiti

Would Kaiden finally wear her down?
Would Josie take the risk again and give love a chance?

title: Mrs. Grinch In Love
description:
Victoria Jones aka Mrs. Grinch hates Winter and the holiday season. Her brother asked her to come to their hometown to meet his fiancée, the same town which she never visited after graduating.

On her way, an unexpected series of events happen to her and her dog, Mini. She meets her first love after nine years and the feelings she had for him blossom again.

Daniel Moore, the total opposite of Victoria loves Christmas and challenges Victoria that he can change her heart.

Will Victoria be able to fight her feelings or fall for the same guy again?

Can Daniel change her heart and bring her holiday spirit back?

*~*~*~*~*

"If you would let me, I can bring that holiday spirit inside you back." He offered.

I frowned and look at him. "What do you mean by that?"

"Spend this Christmas with me and you'll see." He smiled.

Spend an entire Christmas?

With him?

Hell yeah!

"Sure, I'd love to." His grin widened. "But I can't guarantee that it'll work." I grinned.

"Challenge accepted." He smirked.

We stayed like that, looking at each other with stupid smiles on our faces when unexpectedly it felt hot.

Did Mini open a heater or something?

He gazed into my eyes. Suddenly my mouth became dry and I unconsciously licked my lips, which made him look at them. I gulped.

His eyes stayed there and I saw his Adam's apple bobbed. He leaned in, making my breath hitch. My heart throbbed so fast that it might explode any second.

I looked at his lips; they look so soft, pink, and yummy.

He continued leaning his eyes darted between my eyes and lips. When our noses touched, my eyes automatically closed, and I felt his breath on my lips.

Is this happening?

Are we going to kiss?

My dream of marrying him will come true?
 
*~*~*Winterfest 2020*~*~*

HIGHEST RANKINGS:

#1 in Miracles in December 


[Words count: 20,000 - 25,000]

When they run into a suspicious armed security guard - Liv realizes something dangerous is going on and their night is about to get a whole lot more bizarre. 

From building bombs, wielding a gun and a rescue attempt, Liv and Ezra must to work together if they want to make it out of the night alive.

title: Picturesque
description:
Love was a term coined by the movement for equality beginning in the 1960's. Love was something that Rebecca Hayes never thought she would find. A young, introverted college graduate, Rebecca is commission to be a French tutor to the youngest children of the wealthy Donnelley family. In the summer of 1964, Rebecca is uprooted from her quiet life in the suburbs of New Orleans and settles in with the Donnelleys in Los Angeles, California. During this internment, Rebecca finds experience. She finds friends. She finds purpose. What she did not expect to find, was love. And the last place she ever thought she would find it was in the eldest Donnelley daughter, Joanne. Now an old woman, Rebecca recounts the passionate love affair that is still just as picturesque as it was 59 years ago, during a time when this kind of love was considered something entirely opposite.

title: Finding Heathcliff
description:
ONC 2023 Shortlist 

Astrid, the Princess of Eurovea, a country existing several centuries in the future, had led a happy and sheltered life in the castle ruled by Regent Arcturus, her uncle.

Only on reaching the age of ascension when, according to an ancient tradition, all future queens must face a trial, she realised that there were great gaps in her knowledge of the world around her, her uncle, and even the people she thought she knew well.

In a world where love doesn't exist, a young girl who understands old novels better than her reality is sent on a dangerous quest to save her country from creatures who, just like love, were not supposed to be true...

Mystery, romance, adventure, and magic combine in this tale, in which a young princess who had grown up surrounded by an impenetrable web of lies, has to find her true identity, and free her kingdom from suffering. 

A young-adult, dystopian, paranormal fantasy-romance.

The wonderful cover created by @WakeWriteWrath

title: Falling for the Seat Filler
description:
Seat filler Lincoln Parker never expected to accidentally fall on one knee in front of world-famous superstar Emily Margot. Now, with his face on the cover of every tabloid, he has to pretend to be her lover-and keep hidden his real, growing feelings as their time together starts to run out.

                                                                      *****

When 23-year-old Lincoln Parker accidentally trips over famous actress Emily Margot, he never imagines that she would ask him to be her pretend fiancé until the scandal-of being caught supposedly proposing to her-blows over in the media. Because he's a relative nobody; just an army medic on leave, moonlighting at award shows as a seat filler. But with his name on the dotted line of their contract, he has to find a way to survive in her Hollywood bubble and also bury his growing anxiety, especially as his leave from the army runs out. Can their budding relationship withstand the distance? Is their love built to last?

[ General fiction #2  chick lit #4 ]
[Wattys 2015 Winner - HQ Love)

[word count: 60,000-70,000 words]

title: ✔️ The Unwanted Bride (Book One) **UNDER EDITING**
description:
In an effort to rebuild a perfect society after the Great War, the government issued a law known as "The Marriage Process,". During this process, all women who turn 20 that year would be given 4 eligible men, hand selected by the government to ensure that their children would be perfect in the new society. These men would have to not only fight to win her heart, but they also have to fight one another to prove which is the strongest and most superior of the group. For centuries, this law has proven to make perfect marital matches, until now.

Juniper Burks is unwanted by everyone, including her own parents. From birth, everyone considered her to be a failure in the elite society, and the only mistake the government made. So when she turned 20, she expected that the government would not  include her in "The Marriage Process", but she was wrong. Not only was she included, but the government selected the 4 most attractive and strongest  men to be her potential husband. 

Are Juniper's days of being unwanted finally over, or has the government made yet another drastic mistake?

*UPDATES EVERY SATURDAY EVENING*
   -Ranked #1 in GirlxBoy 11-7-2023 - 11-9-2023
   -Ranked #1 in Dystopian Society 12-29-2022
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Sometimes life is rough. Sometimes everything comes crashing down in you and you feel like you are drowning. That you are unappreciated. That you are unloved. Maybe you want to get away, maybe you want to punch your ticket and leave the station, because you feel like this world isn't for you.

I've felt that way before too.

I cannot heal a broken heart, nor can I solve the world's problems. I can however offer you an escape into a world of fiction or fantasy.  I want to help someone with my stories the way countless stories have helped me.

Thank you.

title: Overdue - A Rockstar Romance
description:
After a disastrous end to their last tour, Elliot Hawk, lead singer of True Outlaws - a British pop rock band taking the world by storm - is determined to keep the new album release squeaky clean. 

However, he isn't counting on Phoebe, a shy librarian with a past of her own, catching his eye. She isn't interested in a quick fling with a smooth talking rockstar, but before she knows it, their two worlds collide.  

They say life can change in a moment, Phoebe and Elliott are about to find out just how true that is. But with backstabbing backing dancers, pressure from the press and a mysterious stranger with a real vendetta, will they be able to find that long overdue happily ever after, or will our star crossed lovers crash and burn in the spotlight?

(This is a standalone book, slowburn romance with a happy ending guaranteed. Some mature themes and triggers, including drinking and addiction)

-----

"I'm not one of your fan girls." I snapped, a little offended, "I haven't even heard any of your music." 
"I'm hurt love. After I just serenaded you too." 
I huffed, "I wouldn't call that serenaded, I'm pretty sure it was harassment."

She cheated on him, and he wants revenge.

title: Chance Connection
description:
Manik is a very rich and handsome young man, and he dislikes girls.
        Nandini is a kind-hearted young girl, and she prefers to stay away from rich people.
        They are different from each other in several aspects, but they do have a few things in common. One of them is that they can go to any extent when it comes to their family and friends.
        Manik and Nandini board the same train from different stations  with different mindsets. What is the purpose of their journey? Is their destination the same or different? Does this journey change the course of their lives? Join aboard if you would like to know about their journey.

authorBio:
My Journey 
                 
When I began I was no writer,
   Appreciation from you, my dear reader
Inspired me to nurture my meager skill,
   And turn writing into a thrill 

Writing for me started as a one-shot,  
  That also meant it would be my last-shot
Words of encouragement made it the first,
  One led to another, and writing became a quest 
   
Mind began to explore,
     Imagination gained wings and began to soar
Ideas sprouting in the mind,
     Along with experiences combined
A rich language and reader's words of praise,
     What more is required for a writer to raise!

In my journey as a writer
       I have managed to come so far
Continued support from you, my dear reader
       raises my hope to shoot for the star

                                               - shining_polestar

title: Coming Up For Air | ✓
description:
WATTYS 2023 & 2022 SHORTLIST | 

Stella Donahue is in dire need of a fresh start.

A break. Away from the college town that's shunned her, away from the place she once called home. Her salvation comes in the shape of an old family friend's lake house and the promise of a summer all to herself. Not to forgive. Probably not to forget - no matter how hard she tries. But to continue to heal.

The surprise comes in the shape of Jacob Wilson.

Suddenly, with her somewhat estranged childhood friend living down the hall, Stella's summer of solitude becomes anything but. Though, maybe, reconnecting with Jake is exactly what she needs.

title: The Senior Bad Boy | ✔️
description:
"My intentions would be simple," he says with a deep, heated gaze, his warm breath fanning across my face. 

He slowly moves himself even closer to me so that our bodies are mere millimeters away from touching, causing breathing to become a chore. "My intentions would be a kiss." 

"You know once we went there, we wouldn't be able to come back," I breathe, my voice barely above a whisper as my heart pounds out of my chest, adrenaline mixed with desire coursing through every cell of my being. "There are other things going on that would make even just a kiss way too dangerous."

---

title: Oblivion (Completed)
description:
{Highest rank: #151 Romance}

I don't remember my husband. A four year coma swallowed my memories and nearly my life. Now  every day I wake up in a beautiful home with photos on the wall that tell me I was loved...that I am still so loved. But the man holding man hand is a stranger. He's warm and wonderful and I'd give anything to feel like that young girl in the picture again. Even for one more day. 

Join Ryan and Henley on a wild journey through their past from the moment they met to just hours before the accident. Live their memories. See snapshots of their lives. Share their happiness, heartache and everything in between as they start their life together all over again.

title: The Fallen Fire (Royals of the Realm Series #1)
description:
In the Immortal Realm, power overruns blood. So when Fyrrah Vulcan hadn't shown any sign of manipulating fire the day she turned sixteen, her father, King Victor of the Fire Kingdom disowned her to protect the reputation of the royal family.
  
The thing is, she is so pure and good-natured that bearing grudge is never an option for her. But everything changed one night. Now, she can see their world is filled with shadows and evil lurks everywhere, making her doubt anyone who comes her way. That even the person you consider a family would throw you into the lion's den in just a blink of an eye.
  
Upon accidentally starting a riot in the Werewolf King's territory, things got a little complicated. Alpha King Romanov blames her of starting the forest fire but dismissed the idea of punishing her, and he'a always around her with the habit of rubbing off his scent on her every time a male looks her way.

***

title: Closer to the Whispers
description:
"I can disappear too. You shouldn't have to deal with all this. I...I shouldn't be here. Who are we kidding? You are one of the most powerful people, and I'm...just mediocre. Tainted." He stalked towards me, and I held my breath, unsure of what he was going to do to me. 

"You, Isabella," he said, touching my face gently and tenderly. 

"Are everything to me. How can you not see it?" He asked me, almost pained by my request to leave him. He tilted my chin up and looked in my eyes, looking through them right to my very soul. 
 ***UPDATED WEEKLY ON FRIDAY***

When Isabella realizes the new teacher at her boarding school is a fling from the summer, she thinks life can't get any more complicated. That is until she finds out she is pregnant and has to tell him. He is known to be associated with the mafia, and everyone is terrified of him. Still, she pushes forward, hoping to look past the darkness and make a future with him for their child. 

Leo thinks she is causing drama when she first tells him about their child. Once he finds out she's carrying the heir to the Grande dynasty, he will do anything to protect them, even if that means losing everything for them. 

Danger is never far away, and his dark past may destroy any chance of a happy future they have together. 

**This is a dark story; there will be violence, steamy scenes, mentions of drug use, and more. You have been warned. Isabella is 18 in this story.**

title: Black Hearted - An Enemies to Lovers Romance (Complete)
description:
When billionaire and self-proclaimed heartless Jack suffers his first loss in the boardroom his confidence is shaken. Adding to the flames, he just strike out with the fiery Solana, server at an off the strip club in Vegas. She maybe the first person to challenge him and help him discover deep down he does indeed have a heart.

This romance is for you if you like:
💏 Opposites Attract
⚖️ Wrong Side of The Tracks Romance
💋 Sharp Comebacks and Witty Banter
🙍‍♂️ Bad Boys/Villain That Might Deserve Love (You Decide)
💓 Emotional Scars
🔥Slow Burns Worth the Wait

About the Book

He's used to getting everything he wants. But he never wanted love. Until now. 

Jack Blackhorne never wants for anything. Or so he thinks. Money's not an issue, influence in the boardroom and the bedroom never a problem. But after losing (ouch!) to his ex-wife, something shifts in Jack's world. When he bumps into a firecracker of a woman in a club, his life erupts.

Solana Wilde has never met a situation she didn't have an opinion on or a bridge she didn't like to burn. But all that running is getting tiring. Will the man who lit her latest fire be the one to make her want to stay in one place for once?

Part of the Ruby Red Romances Collection but can be read as a stand alone.

title: Temporary Fix ✔️
description:
Liam Spencer is fresh out of a relationship and also a job. Not of his own accord, of course. 

His fiance called off their engagement, and since they work in the same place, Liam can't bear to see his face every day and resigned from the job himself. He is a thirty year old man and is single and without a job or a place to stay. He is definitely not where he thought he would be at this age. 

But it's okay. Liam's sister needs taking care of since she is not doing so well herself and has two kids. Liam decides to help her out, and at the same time, decides to take up on a temporary job offer while he looks for something more permanent. Just a temporary fix, if you will. 

That is until he meets this strangely enticing man named Aaron who is an absolute dickface and surprise, surprise, just so happens to be his new boss.

title: Love Rectangled
description:
You all must have seen movies and read books about Love triangles. But this is not a triangle, It's a Rec-tangled.

Lexi Wolf, Queen Bee of Pinewood High, stuck in a twisted rectangle of love, full of confusion, humor, silliness, pretense, jealousy, and heartbreaks.

* * * * *

"Stay with me, Lexi." He tucked my hair behind my ear.

I wasn't the drunk one here, but the way he gazed at me with his deep eyes was enough to make me.

I blinked my eyes at him and shook my head, trying to clear the fog in it. The fact that I was laying over him, with our chest pressed together and his hand on my waist wasn't helping either.

"I-I... I don't think that's a good idea," I whispered, finally getting my voice back.

"Why?" He looked at me intensely. "Is it because of your boyfriend?"

"No." 

"Then what's the problem?" His thumb lightly creased my back from where my top had gotten up, making me quiver. "Why can't you stay?"

"I..."

"Don't you trust me, Lexi?"

"Of course I do, I just..." I moved a little to get off him, but in a swift motion, he flipped us on the bed with him on the top this time.

Gasping in surprise, my eyes grew big and I put my hands on his strong biceps. He put his forearm on either side of my face, leaning on them. I rubbed my thighs together which were between his legs. I was trapped between him and the bed.

My breath hitched as he leaned in until our noses touched. "You just what?"

My entire body heated as I felt his muscular chest pressed against mine. I bit my lip and tried to control my stupid hormones, but it made it worse when Noah's gaze went to my lips.

I saw his Adam's apple bob as he continued to stare at my lips. My throat felt dry and my eyes darted to his. He stuck his tongue out and licked his lower lip.

OMG, I'm in deep trouble!

* * * * *

Editing.

FEATURED ON:
@Badassreads (The Badass Queen)

#2 Youngadult
#1 Teendrama

title: The Wastelands (Part II of the Runner Series)
description:
Part 2 of The Runner series.
==================================

The Runner's Rebellion was only the beginning.

Tensions run high as the City struggles to repair itself after a civil war. Intacts and Fragments fight to find themselves a place in the new order amid whispers of a Queen being unfit to rule.

The delicate balance will be upset when a new evil threatens the City, this time from outside it's walls. The war with the Wastelanders has finally begun. 

Kay and her friends are rebels transitioning into leaders. Tasked with keeping the City safe from war means forming an alliance with the enemy and going back into dangerous territory. Back into the Wastelands, into the desert where it all began.

Hey there! Thanks for stopping by :) My name is Kate (or Katie) and I am an overly-polite Canadian with an all-consuming love for stories.

My genres-of-choice are typically action/adventure and the occasional piece of science or historical fiction. I'll read pretty much anything but rarely manage to finish; that's the plight of a scatterbrained nerf-herder with a short attention span.

My YA trilogy, 'The Runner' is a dystopian tale set in a desert wasteland, 209 years after the Great Burn. If you are interested in an action-packed story filled with thieves, royalty and rebels, you should definitely check it out.

I would love to hear from you, feel free to leave any questions or comments. Nothing is off-topic, I'm an open book! [pause for laughter]

Kate

title: Kidnapped
description:

Nathaniel and Vallery Reed have never spent more than a year at the same place. Due to their father's work and their mom not wanting the family to be separated, each time Mr. Reed got reassigned, the whole family moved.

Nathaniel thought that his Junior year was going to be like any other - he'd go to school, meet new people, keep his grades up and try to keep his twin sister Vallery out of trouble. What he didn't expect was too see Hunter Harris making out with a guy and then setting his eyes on Nat himself. With Vallery's unceasing antics, Hunter hot on his trail and a new female classmate falling for him, Nathaniel's year is going to be a lot more than he'd envisioned.

title: Songbirds & Sirens
description:
Josephine's voice kills any man who hears it-except for the assassin sent to capture her for the king that's been chasing her all her life...but what happens when he decides he doesn't want to hand her over and keep her for himself instead?

                                                   ***

Josephine Raphelia is a Siren who has been running from the King of Valencia her whole life, and when the day finally comes that she is taken captive by who she believes to be one of the king's guards, she soon begins to realize that nothing is as it seems in her world. 

The people she once thought she could trust are filled with secrets and betrayals and as she meets new allies along the route to her freedom, she unravels the plots in her life while also trying to cling to a family she never knew but will fight with her last breath to protect. 

It is only when a god of old enters the fight and challenges her feelings for her captor that Josephine realizes this is much bigger than she ever could have realized, and soon finds that she might be the key to unlocking the answers of her freedom, and the freedom of her people, once and for all.

*A Dark High Fantasy Romance*

title: Grayson Smith  | ✔️
description:
Libby Johnson fantasizes of the future. Counting down the days until her high-school graduation, until the day she can whisk herself away from her small town and her nightmares of the day that almost stole her life.

Grayson Smith is glued in the past. He constantly is in search of a person to save from his own history. Every day he sits idle in hope of a troubled soul to salvage. Starting fresh in a new school away from his past peers, nightmares loom in his path. 

When Libby and Grayson meet on the first day of a new semester, Libby is adamant to keep her head down and her words bitter when his smile cuts through her. His words of pleasantries mold into something sour with each day that passes. 
Libby cannot afford anyone holding her back in the town of Plainsville where the people are drab and the forests hold a thousand secrets.
When the pair keep bumping into each other, despite Libby's disapproval, it's uncertain how Libby will escape Grayson and his stubborn ambition of saving her fate. With each coveted meeting in secret hidings, only time proves to Libby that Grayson isn't her enemy and that not every citizen in her home-town wants to suck the good out of her. 
It's only with Libby that Grayson cam begin to heal the history that wounded him. 
But as Libby and Grayson's world comes together, the sky brews a storm that only few are estimated to survive.

title: Jacob's Game ✅
description:
"LET'S PLAY A GAME TERESA. MY GAME." - Jacob Snow



                     *************





It was all a game. Jacob's sick game.

Teresa Andrew finds herself playing an act of pretence with Gideon Snow, her childhood best friend. She has to pretend being his fiancee for one week in other to keep the weak heart of his grandfather at peace.

But what she doesn't prepare for was the bad side of their agreement. And it happens to be Gideon's elder brother, Jacob Snow, the one man Teresa hasn't seen for years, the very man who she believes to be the devil himself.

He's back once again from where he stopped, but this time around he plans to make her his, by making her play his game.

What will happen when Teresa finds out it has always been a bet from the start? Will she stay through the storm or run away like always?


Maybe it wasn't a good idea to agree to Gideon's preposition, right?

Welcome to Sir Rob's Castle!
Before any of you start wondering whether you've landed on an aristocrat's profile - not really. Sir Rob is just a nickname given to me by my inventive readers because of my passion for writing historical stories (featuring feisty ladies, fearless knights, adventure, romance and a healthy dose of humor!)

In real life I'm not a brave knight, but a humble aspiring author and historian from the sunny South of Germany, where I live among the cows, spaetzels and swabians. Despite not being a native English speaker, I try to write English stories because I simply LOVE the language. I appreciate any feedback, since I'm trying to improve! :-)

The funny brown thing on my profile picture is a helmet I wear 24/7, not because I'm a cycling enthusiast, but to protect my literary skull in which a rather important bone has been missing from birth :-)

title: Finding Forever
description:
When Ella Jones' twenty-first birthday ends with a bang - literally - she never imagined it would be with her best friend since freshman year, Ryan Owen.

A year later, after their so called "mistake", they're still best friends and about to rock their Senior year at the University of San Francisco. But when Ryan returns from spending a summer in Australia and brings back a friend, Liam George, who takes an immediate liking to Ella, Ryan starts to question the Aussie's intentions with his best friend. The trouble is, Ryan has a girlfriend of his own, and Ella and Ryan swore they would never cross that line again - until they do.

They try not to let their second slip up affect their friendship, but when Spring Break forces them to vacation under the same roof; and Ryan's ex walks back into his life, Ella is shocked by a fierce stab of possessiveness. And when Ella continues to see Liam, Ryan finds himself plagued by unfamiliar jealousy. With their friendship strained for the first time, Ella and Ryan face an alarming truth: Maybe they can't be just friends. Maybe they are falling faster than expected. And maybe, deep down, they want to.

title: Secrets in Shibuya - Haikyuu [Oikawa x Iwaizumi]
description:
After a big rift in high school, Hajime Iwaizumi and Tōru Oikawa thought their friendship was permanently broken. For the rest of their teenage years, the childhood best friends no longer spoke to each other, and distance only continued to pull them apart.

Five years later, Iwaizumi is working as a struggling bartender in Tokyo. Money is tight, but he makes ends meet. Oikawa is a retired volleyball player, but his presence still covers every billboard and magazine that you can possibly find. 

In the eyes of the world, Oikawa is Japan's star athlete. Iwaizumi is a nobody...

or so it seems. 

It is just a regular Friday night for Iwaizumi, heading home from his shift. Well, it began as a regular Friday night until he finds Oikawa, drunk and passed out in front of his apartment.

It isn't the reunion Iwaizumi expected, but perhaps, this is what he's been waiting for.

[sorta-AU / fluff / angst / new adult novel]

title: Fragmented {The Reason #2}
description:
"I can't be fixed anymore cause I'm no more broken but I'm fragmented."

Meet Bree Adams, she's the most successful 25 year old woman in London. She's everything a girl would want to be. She's successful, popular, beautiful and rich. Everyone who look at her would think she has a perfect life. Do you really think being successful, popular, beautiful and rich could make her life perfect?

"The people who look the strongest in front of everybody, are sometimes the ones who cry themselves to sleep at night."

Bree is that person. If she looks back in her life then she finds nothing but emotions that did nothing but broke her forever. Mending a broken heart could be possible but mending a fragmented heart is something that may never happen. 

Meet Aiden Waters, the most successful 25 year old man in London. Everyone has a reason for making mistakes and so does he. Being successful and handsome don't make a person perfect. Maybe there is a mistake that he didn't realise he's done.

title: EPIC (Book 1 of the Soundcrush series)
description:
What if the boy you crushed on your whole life wrote a song about you, and the song blew up to become your biggest hope and your worst reminder?

Kat Ballard is fifteen when her nineteen year old best friend Trace Gallant tells her the news: his band, Soundcrush, just got signed. He's moving to Hollywood.  

Kat charms her talented boy-next-door into one kiss, to remember him by.  Trace can't resist his best girl's lips, but knowing she is too young for more, vows to keep it innocent. 

The night doesn't turn out like he planned. When Soundcrush's first hit song breaks , the whole world knows his feelings for  "Little Sister"are anything but pure.

When Kat and Trace reconnect after her high school graduation, their chemistry explodes, but Trace is still fighting it...this time for mysterious reasons that have nothing to do with her age. Trace is steamy one minute, then shady the next.  Kat can't decide...does she want a safe life at college with her new boyfriend, or should she fight for a crazy love-on-the-run with her rockstar?

The Soundcrush Series:  It's not just a love story. It's a band story.

title: Mated To My Doom
description:
Mate.
 One little word. One big concept. 
A belief that someone, somewhere, is holding the key to your heart. 

They say to keep your friends close and your enemies closer, but who's to say they're not the same.

Killers, notes, blood, and mystery. 
Love, lies, and bad history. 


Hunter Rivered is the most powerful werewolf in charge of the strongest pack. Hunter never thought much of having a mate, he'd much rather be destroying other packs, killing other wolves, and training.

Rosalyn Edwards on the other hand has always imagined her life with a mate. She was just a regular wolf in the Silver Heart Pack, who is as sweet as the name of her pack. All she wanted was to finish high school then travel the world- I know, very un-wolfish. 

What happens when the horrid Hunter Rivered decided to make a claim on Rose's Pack territory? Rose was never good at fighting. She could barely squash a spider,  so how far would she go to protect her family?
 Or herself. 

Hunter is possessive, protective, and strict.

Rose is kind, stubborn, and good-hearted. 


You know what they say, opposites attract, and mates are forever.

Read to find what happens when these two opposites find themselves connected in more than one way.

title: Requiem for a Love (Requiem #2) [ON HOLD]
description:
*Spoilers for Requiem for a Soldier, the first book in this series*
~Kinda-sorta on hiatus while I figure out where the story has been so I can figure out where it will go~

Benjamin Ramirez was sixteen years old when his twin sister was found dead in an alleyway in Phoenix. Ever since that day, he's had one goal: to find his sister's killer and bring them to justice. Fast forward ten years and Ben is one of the most dedicated officers on the force, giving up his personal life to spend years working undercover. He's investigating one of the most notorious crime syndicates in the Southwest and is closer than he's ever been to gaining the trust of those at the top. But then he meets a girl who reminds him so much of his sister that he might be willing to sacrifice his cover to save her.

After witnessing the murder of her family, Anastasia Clarence thought her life could never get any worse. But eleven months later, her world fell apart all over again. Now, kidnapped and held for ransom back in the city where it all began, she has two choices: to give up completely or to fight for the remaining fragments of her soul. There's nothing quite as formidable as a woman with nothing left to lose.

Cover Credit @bakedsausage
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi, I'm Ellie, a 23-year-old engineer who likes math, science, and problem-solving, but also reading a five-book series back-to-back in a weekend. And now, writing my own too! I've never thought of myself as a writer, but I've always had stories in my head just begging to be told. Maybe if I write them down, they'll let me have some peace. :)

I joined Wattpad back in 2018 when I wanted to start sharing my writing anonymously online. By the end of 2019, I'd finished my very first novel, won the Wattys, and become a Wattpad Star! In 2020, I started my grad degree while also working full time, so updates can't be as frequent as I'd like. For sporadic updates on how that's going, check my Instagram, where my handle is elle_lawrence

~ Do not use my message board to advertise your story~

~ If you want me to read & review your story, I will 1000% roast you on your grammar and spelling before I can even begin to process more complex story elements. It's just how my brain works. You've been warned. Don't ask me to review your work unless you can handle brutal honesty and are willing to listen to me gush about Grammarly~

|Novels|
Requiem for a Soldier [Complete] ~ YA/NA romance, first full length novel I've ever written, completed, and WON the 2019 Watty Awards (still can't believe this)

Requiem for a Love [On Hold] ~ book 2 in the Requiem series

Death of a Dream [Currently Writing] ~ prequel to Requiem for a Soldier

|Short Stories|
Escape to the Forbidden Isles ~ fourteen year old me's HTTYD fan fic

Sons of Sparta ~ fifteen year old me's Ancient Greece historical fiction story

|Other|
Unintended Consequences ~ what started as an entry for a short story contest (didn't win) but became a place to share ways to reduce single-use plastics, be more environmentally friendly, and recycle 

|Upcoming, yet Unpublished Drafts|
So many. Too many. Why do I keep making more of them?!

~ Ellie L

title: Winners Don't Have Bad Days (Watty 2020 Winner, Romance)
description:
When a total stranger knows what eats you, maybe they are your one true love. Even if you don't know it yet. ||

On Friday the 13th, two twenty-something, Daya and Mike, end up in a mutually beneficial arrangement: she is his caregiver after he breaks his foot; he provides room&board to help her out with a teeny-tiny cash flow problem. Not a whiff of a romance, strictly business.

And for a while, all is good... for about five minutes, that is.

What can an overweight man, a video game obsessed librarian, know about her quitting a challenging sport of figure skating, Daya scoffs. He needs to get off her case and sort out his binge eating!

What does a celery-chewing skating diva care about his failure as a PhD candidate, Mike wonders. She is just replacing her dreams with his non-existing problems instead of pursuing her one true passion!

With the two already teetering on the brink of mutually assured destruction, oil splashes onto the flames when Daya resumes her never-ending quest for skating triumph at Canadian Nationals. (Well, that should make Mike happy, right? Right?)

But isn't there *something*  worth fighting for *together*? Like, you know, love?

COMPLETED. First Published: August 19, 2019

Trigger warning: This story contains themes of eating disorders and body image insecurity (male).
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Fire and the Sky (Book 3 of the Starborn Series)
description:
Separated from her Starborn girlfriend, Em, and the rogue group of Wishes known as WIND, May Alana knows she can't go back to life she once knew. Now, armed with a family secret that could help put an end to the chaotic power of the ruthless Loyals once and for all, May strikes out in search of the long lost fallen wishing star. Without Em at her side, May must rely on her own strength and determination, and put her faith in friends old and new, in order to return the star to its rightful place. The safety of all Wishes-and her future with Em-depends on it.
