title: Devil's in the Details // Complete
description:
With an opportunity of a lifetime to make her entrepreneurial dreams come true, Thea finds it getting increasingly harder to hide her attraction to her boss, Aiden Steele - not knowing that the man under all the cold layers has a secret worth millions of dollars to hide. 
***
It doesn't matter if she's sitting on an idea that could earn her millions, Theodora is struggling to make ends meet. That is until she meets Aiden Steele, CEO and asshole extraordinaire. An entanglement of enormous proportions creates a problem that won't be easily fixed, and her time to shine finally arrives. Right there in her tiny apartment, Aiden offers her the deal of a lifetime. Half a million dollars is not an easy sum to say no to and Thea is thrust into a life of meetings, luxuries, and office politics.

Working in close confines with the magnetic genius isn't as easy as it sounds, and Thea soon realizes that trying not to fall for him is even harder. The more time they spend together, the stronger her affection for Aiden grows. Right when she allows herself to let go of what has been holding her back, a treacherous secret threatens to blow up everything -  be it their blooming romance or their business arrangement.

Never make deals with the devil, they say, but what if the devil has a charming smile and deep brown eyes?
**

title: The Stars Lie {Myrnin, Morganville Vampires}
description:
"Most intriguing.  You obviously know who - and what - I am, but you don't run."  He leaned toward her and felt her body react. "Quite the opposite in fact," he murmured as he kissed her neck.

Claire felt a shockwave of desire for him. She wasn't sure how long she would be able to think clearly. "Myrnin, wait...We have to talk...You have to remember," she said between breaths.

"My dear, you needn't use such far-fetching pretext to gain my attention," he purred seductively.  "All you need to do is ask and I will freely give to you. Not that I don't enjoy these amusements. You have intrigued me. Which indeed, is no small accomplishment."  

Her breathing was becoming shallow as he trailed kisses from her neck to her ear. Before she could stop herself, she found her fingers entwined in his hair.  His voice was low as he stepped purposefully between her legs and slid her forward, right to the edge of the bed, to meet him. He growled softly in her ear, "Tell me what is it that you desire? Ask anything. I promise you won't be disappointed." 

Claire inhaled sharply, all intelligent thought gone from her mind. She felt his hand slide up her leg - the one sheathed with the hidden dagger - and stop.  

"My, my, my...Aren't you full of surprises? " he growled low in pleasure in his throat, "Would you like to try to use that on me?  I think I might enjoy that game very much."

She felt his hand gently remove the dagger and whispered against his lips, "No we can't do this. Not here, not now, and not when you don't remember me."   

"I will most definitely remember you," he kissed her neck and jawline as Claire felt his wandering hand continue to glide up her leg.  "You are quite a contradiction, little Claire. Your lips say no, but..." He found what he was looking for and she gasped.  He smiled wickedly. "Your body clearly says yes."

Note - Story contains some sexual content and strong language.

I do not own Morganville Vampires, just the plot to this tale.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Paper Dolls
description:
When the most popular Kpop idol on the planet falls to her death, an aspiring singer is thrown into the spotlight, attracting the attention of an obsessive fan who claims to know the truth.

***

Kpop girl group Sweet Poison is undeniably the biggest girl group in the world, and lead singer Dalia the most popular idol on the planet. But at the peak of her career, no one expects the idol to throw herself off a thirty story building on what will become a historic day in entertainment history. 

Ruled as a suicide, her death shocks the industry and millions mourn the unexpected demise of their favourite celebrity. Just as suddenly, trainee Kang Jina is thrown into the spotlight when her childhood association with Dalia is leaked to the media.

Stifled by the newfound attention and stress of her debut, Jina feels as though she'll drown under all the pressure. That is until she receives a most shocking letter from Dalia's sassaeng (obsessive fan) claiming that she was murdered instead.

title: Imagining Us
description:
Will their pasts allow them to have a future together?

Elizabeth "Esi" Solomon is an Afro-Caribbean British girl studying at an Ivy League University in Connecticut with big dreams to make the world a better place.

 Porte Danvers could not be any more different- there was his perfectly tamed blonde hair, grey eyes, and the way that he approaches life and her-intentionally. He is a wealthy Architecture alum at the same university, but hard losses have made him adopt a distant attitude to others.

When the two surprisingly hit it off at the campus bookstore, Esi and Porte bond over a shared love of classical literature. As their friendship deepens to something more, both of their pasts threaten to pull them apart. When push comes to shove will their pasts hamper a shared future or will their friendship be lost forever?
 
Imaging Us is a modern story of love, knowledge and learning self-acceptance despite life's obstacles.

title: Illusion ➵ Zach Mitchell
description:
COMPLETED

"You never had control, that's the illusion! I was overwhelmed by the power of this place. But I made a mistake, too, I didn't have enough respect for that power and it's out now."

After ten years, Jurassic World, the multibillion dollar amusement park is thriving. But, with the loss of interest among the visitors, the bioengineering company InGen, founded by the late John Hammond, wants a better dinosaur in order to entertain its new and old customers. Jurassic World's owner, Simon Masrani, is hoping to use the opening of the new attraction to rekindle his relationship with his estranged daughter, Marella "Mari" Masrani. 

Mari, despite having a famous father, likes to keep to herself, spending most of her time on her computer or reading. But what her father doesn't know is that she's a hacker, and the leader of AnitGen, a corporation wanting to stop the making of dangerous GMO's (Genetically Modified Organisms).

So when her father calls, welcoming her to the park, she can't resist the chance to takedown InGen for once and for all. She'll do whatever it takes. Even if that means running farther, breathing harder, and screaming louder than she's ever had to in her entire life. Not to mention meeting some hot guy who thinks he's all that. Nope, she's definitely not going to let some 'scary' dinosaurs and an annoying, but undeniably attractive, guy ruin her chances.

description:
"𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐥𝐞𝐧 𝐠𝐥𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐢𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐨𝐥𝐝𝐞𝐬𝐭 𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐤 𝐰𝐞 𝐤𝐧𝐨𝐰, 𝐲𝐞𝐭 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐦𝐨𝐬𝐭 𝐨𝐛𝐯𝐢𝐨𝐮𝐬 𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐧 𝐨𝐟 𝐡𝐢𝐝𝐝𝐞𝐧 𝐚𝐝𝐦𝐢𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧."

                                     ♡︎ ☾︎ ♡︎ ☽︎ ♡︎ ☾︎ ♡︎ ☽︎ ♡︎


Xael Wright is a confident girl who is curious for her own good. She is the girl who oozes confidence in everything she does. A fitness lover who runs everyday and goes to the gym but still eats junk food. She loves to try out every drink in the campus coffee shop. 

Orion Warner is a guy who doesn't like to be social. With his anxiety, you can find close to only a few people. A booklover who reads almost every genre, you will not believe the other side of him. Orion is also a guy who likes to be fit by running and going to the gym. 

Xael and Orion use the same path when they run in the morning and the same gym when they workout. They are not strangers nor acquaintances.

When one day, one of them initiates a conversation, what will happen? Will something change about them?

This is Xael and Orion's story

☘︎ Dual point of view

title: OPPOSITES ATTRACT
description:
He is hot and she is jovial. He is a loner and she loves making friends. He has few words to say and she can talk all day, even with strangers. He wants the world to rotate his way and she can adjust with anyone. He is a perfectionist workaholic and she is clumsy. Only thing matching between these Opposites is their zeal to excel and stand apart. How will these two Opposite poles create a rapo? How will he, one who wants everything in his life to be perfect, fall for this careless beauty?
The story is inspired by maaneet and basic characters are the same. You may find many similarities and also dissimilarities from that character as I have my own view of them.

I had written this story 7 years back and posted it on Indiaforum with the same name. Here i have edited the story and presented it again to you for your appreciation. This story was uploaded by Lovlyflower8 also upto Part 40 from Indiaforum. I will try to upload fast to reach part 40 quickly for the readers who have already read it.  

 Excerpt from the Story
"A 24yr girl or a woman... What am i ???" was her thought as she gazed at the full moon. The moonlight made her face glow even more. What is she - a girl to explore and achieve in life or a woman with many baggage?
It has been  three years of marriage. She knew from beginning he was never her ideal husband. Today was the day she had waited so long for...her divorce...much awaited one. 
But did she want it? Will he sign it?

title: You Of All People | A Nigerian Gay MM Love Story
description:
Folarin is sick of this. Every day, he wakes up to more fuel added to the idiotic
rumours that he and his best friend, Chuka are in a secret gay relationship.
It's ridiculous. Folarin has had actual interventions held over his chronic womanizing and Chuka gets in and out or more ships than Jack Sparrow.
The two of them are drowning in women. And the fact they happen to be two of the biggest stars in Nollywood, not to mention insanely handsome, certainly doesn't hurt the process.
But one blogger in particular, who seems to have a personal bone to pick with them, posts lie after lie while smoothly evading legal consequences.
She needs to be stopped.
So, as part of an elaborate plan to trap her, they decide to lean into it.
It would be controversial. It could be career suicide.
And it's a risk they're willing to take.

But what starts as acting for the cameras starts to stir up some very real emotions, and they - for the first time - start to wonder...

...if the world was on to something. 




....

"This." Folarin said, waving his hand back and forth between them. "I want to try."
Chuka cocked an eyebrow. "Being boyfriends?"
Folarin shut his eyes and let out a long-suffering sigh. "Yes. Being bo- . You fucking know what I'm talking about."
"And how exactly is that supposed to work?"
"Why wouldn't it?"
"For one thing, we're not gay."
Folarin shrugged. "How hard can it be?"
Chuka laughed through his nose. "I'm not sure that's how sexuality works, Folarin."



This isn't steamy like Brother in Lust but it's still a good read, I promise. :)
Enjoy.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Mr. Bad Influence
description:
No romance plays out like one in Hollywood ...

Actress Kerri Adams grew up and had her heart broken in the spotlight. Her relationship with singer Nick Evans, one that all media had their attention on, came to a crashing halt.

Now, after a three-year hiatus, she's back home in California, healed and ready to move on. At least that's what everyone thinks.

No one-not even the family she loves-knows about her secret. A secret she has kept over the last three years.

And to complicate things, Nick Evans drops back into her life, bringing along a paparazzi mayhem that may jeopardize her acting career and secret.

Find out what it is like to fall in love while the whole world watches.

title: Oliver Ausman Lives Again
description:
2020 WATTYS WINNER in NEW ADULT!

Oliver Ausman has been given a second chance at life, but it's hard to feel grateful when he was the one trying to end it in the first place.

Returning to his normal life after being released from the hospital is hard, especially since his parent's idea of normal is made up of dinner parties, prep school, fancy suits, and fake manners-- all paired with a complete disregard for the mental health of their firstborn. He's long been fed up with it, but the final straw is when he finds out that his "father" isn't actually his father at all. 

Oliver decides he's had enough of the perfect facade, so he packs a suitcase and grabs his younger brother, "borrowing" his mother's car to sneak off on a trip to find his biological father. But he never expected to pick up a girl with her own similar set of problems, to be followed across the country by a money-hungry pair of criminals, or most of all, to find out that maybe this life thing isn't as bad as he thought.

title: How Not to Kidnap a Guy
description:
[𝐁𝐱𝐁, 𝐑𝐎𝐌-𝐂𝐎𝐌] A rom-com about a wannabe gangster who accidentally kidnaps a runaway groom, leading to chaos and romance as they team up to kidnap the intended target.

"𝐊𝐢𝐝𝐧𝐚𝐩𝐩𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐠𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐰𝐫𝐨𝐧𝐠, 𝐛𝐮𝐭 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞 𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲 𝐠𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐫𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭"

➽───────────────❥
 
Sharav is a wannabe gangster who just wanted to prove he could be a real gangster. Kidnap a troublemaker, impress his gangster father, and boom--respect secured.
Except... he kidnaps Harsh, a runaway groom, instead. Oops.
Harsh isn't even mad. In fact, he's grateful that Sharav kidnapped him because a bunch of goons from the bride's family are after his head. So, Harsh offers to help Sharav find his real target as a "return help". 
But between chases, weird alliances, and a growing connection, Sharav wonders if Harsh was the right guy all along--for his heart.

➽───────────────❥

𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐞: This isn't meant to reflect any part of real life and is purely a work of fiction, including the violence-filled towns and many other norms in this story. I've created them to create a suitable universe in which my story can be set.
Also, beware: all characters in this "universe" are low-key idiots (because idiots are integral for romance COMEDIES in my opinion, lol).

title: The Disappearance of Valentina Moreno
description:
On a crisp, fall morning, Valerie Rossi is stopped by a stranger, asking if she's Valentina Moreno--a child who went missing in Yosemite National Park twenty years ago. 

Curious, Valerie's friend Julian looks up the age progression photo recently shown in the news, and the uncanny resemblance is too much to ignore. Especially because of the reoccurring dream Valerie has of a shadow snatching her in the night.

Suddenly, something doesn't feel right, so she digs for answers by turning to the one person she might not be able to trust: her father.

ONC prompt #51

~Featured on @WattpadFriendsandFamily - Book of the Month~

I'm an insomniactic daydreamer (that's me in the photo). I'm married, a mother of 2 rambunctious Terrier breeds, I'm a proud Aunt, y soy Latina 🇳🇮🇲🇽 My stories contain Latin MCs and usually take place in San Francisco since it's my hometown, so naturally, I think it's a spectacular setting. I write in whatever genre the wind steers me, but always with morally grey characters in chaotic settings.

When I'm not reading and writing, I'm working in healthcare analyzing cardiac arrhythmias. It's something I'm very proud of, considering my struggles with ADHD and Dyslexia. So no matter what people tell you, don't give up!

If you happen to come across my stories, please feel free to leave a comment. I'm always looking to improve them and make sure they flow well or make sense. Writing is very personal, and it takes guts to take what you've manifested in your thoughts and formulate them into actual words for people to judge. You're allowing readers into your mind. So have courage and be kind to one another :)

Hopefully, you'll enjoy my contribution to the Wattpad world! Cheers.

title: Saudade (completed)
description:
Saudade...  the love that remains... longing for someone you have loved and lost, even though they might never return.(Portugese)
Advay Singh Raizada, Innovator, Brilliant Techie  who did his best to shield his broken heart and restless soul  behind a Casanova image, had only one girl in his heart.
Chandni.... his soulmate.
He promised himself, to love and cherish her, and hoped her love would make his empty life whole, only to realise that, like all other things, she became his enemy, his ruin.

So when he met her again after 7 years, now as Mrs Chandni Rajput, his deep and old wounds, which were just healing, ruptured all over again.

"Advay!! Meet Mrs Chandni Rajput, our managing partner, CEO and the better half of our new Chairman Mr Vikram Rajput. Mrs Rajput, this is Advay Singh Raizada, one of our brightest and best in the Organisation. In fact the prototype we are developing...." Namrata's cheerful voice was like a drowning noise in the background.

It was difficult to define the feelings on Advay and Chandni's faces as they gazed and assessed each other, after the initial shock !

Hatred ? Loathing?  A Sense of Betrayal ? Or was there somewhere a suppressed feeling of 
Saudade, the love that remains... in spite of everything.

Completed :  31 March 2019
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I have a story to tell... Are you interested?
Come on... join me  as I  explore this wonderful  world of fiction, to express my tiny little ideas and create something,  which I hope you will love as much as I do.

As I juggle between my real world and the fictional world I create, music comes to my aid, and so does sports.

title: The Heir And The Spare
description:
Until now, Princess Eva Windsor was content in knowing she wasn't remotely considered to be the successor to the throne. In fact, she was glad she wasn't. Everything about her family's royalty she hated.
But the princess can't hide away forever, and when her lifelong enemy and the heir to his own throne, Prince James Prescott plucks Eva into the pile of promising young brides, her father forces her to be thrust into the limelight. 
But by sharing a palace with a guy who is too presumptuous for his own good, and a list of girls who will do just about everything to steal the Prince's heart, Eva finds herself in line for more than just the throne.

NOTE:
- This is an enemies-to-lovers romance aimed at older YA/NA readers.
- This book is currently going through major editing, meaning major plot changes, i.e dual pov.
- This book's previous title was: You Can Call Me Queen Bee.

title: The Opal Witch: Prophecy (Book Two)
description:
It's been almost two and a half years since Lux discovered she was a witch, and all her grand plans for the future have been thrown out the window. Nothing is more important than her role as Priestess Most High and Guardian of the Gateways and The Holy Grail.  

But being born with power isn't the same as knowing how to use that power. She's spent most of her free time trying to master the magic inside of her, but as the first witch of her kind, there is no one who truly understands how to teach her. And the one person she thought she could always depend on  has been forced to leave her side to answer for his past.

Thankfully, the last couple of years have been quiet, allowing the Circle to train and grow closer to one another, but that all changes when the Guardian Alina returns with a strange request and a dire warning. Morgan le Fay is preparing an army to storm the fabled island of Avalon, and she needs two things more than anything else to achieve her goal: The Holy Grail and Lux. 

With Daphne and Kitty's prophecy in the back of her mind, Lux searches for a way to stop the Fae Queen before she can be drawn into the woman's evil schemes. While it may be true that someone pulled strings to orchestrate her birth, she's determined to prove she's the one in charge of her life.

Nerida Spade lived a blissfully naive life. 

Locked in a tiny NY apartment for her entire life, all she knew about the outside world came from television. Nothing could've prepared her for the fire that ruined everything she'd ever come to know. 

Her redemption comes in the form of the firefighter who saved her life.

Jackson Colt didn't care about anything on this abominable planet.

He had no friends, no wife, no kids and not a damn to give. His daily routine included sleep, go down to the station, save a life and back to square one the next day. He was perfectly content with his mundane lifestyle until the day he rescued a wide-eyed angel. 

Nothing else would ever be the same.

title: A Dozen Dates in December | A Friends-to-Lovers Christmas Novella
description:
Friends, Fumbles & Falling in Love

Ethan Maxwell never put much stock in matchmaking-or Christmas miracles-but his best friend, Olivia Hart, thrives on both. Determined to find him the perfect partner before Christmas Eve, Olivia devises a plan: twelve dates, each with a woman who seems ideal on paper. 

But as mishaps, near-misses, and unexpected moments pile up, Ethan begins to realize that perfection was never what he was looking for. Meanwhile, Olivia starts to question if her determination to find him love was less about him and more about her own heart. As Christmas approaches, they'll have to decide if risking their friendship is worth the chance at forever.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi! I'm Jordan Berning, a 24-year-old a hopeless romantic who believes every great love story starts with a little bit of tension and a whole lot of heart.

When I'm not daydreaming about my next book boyfriend, you'll probably find me baking something sweet, binge-watching rom-coms, or pretending I'm the main character in my own love story.

I'm so glad you're here-stay awhile and fall in love with my stories!

title: Breakaway
description:
Portland Storm captain Eric "Zee" Zellinger knows how to get the job done, but leading his once elite team to victory is fast becoming a losing battle. He can't lose focus now-not with his career on the line. But when his best friend's little sister makes him an offer he can't refuse, Eric could lose the drive the team relies on from their captain.

Still in a downward spiral after a life-altering event in college, Dana Campbell is desperate to try anything to break away from the horror of that fateful night-even enlisting the help of the only man she trusts completely.

No matter how irresistible she is or how tempting the offer, Eric might not be able to cross that line-especially with the team's chance at the playoffs on the line. Now, Eric has to take one last shot, but will he choose Dana's Breakaway chance at happiness or the move that could secure his career?

Download the complete story for FREE at all major ebook retailers. Find the links at: http://catherinegayle.com/contemporary-romance/breakaway.

BREAKAWAY is Book 1 in USA Today bestselling author Catherine Gayle's ongoing, emotional Portland Storm hockey romance series. Links for purchasing the other books in the series can be found here: http://catherinegayle.com/contemporary-romance#PortlandStorm.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Catherine Gayle is a USA Today bestselling author of more than thirty contemporary hockey romance and Regency-set historical romance novels and novellas, with more than half a million books sold. She's a transplanted Texan living in North Carolina with two extremely spoiled felines. In her spare time, she watches way too much hockey and reality TV, plans fun things to do for the Nephew Monster's next visit, and performs experiments in the kitchen which are rarely toxic.

If you want to know more, be sure to sign up for Catherine's mailing list at http://eepurl.com/GXcwr. You'll also receive a free copy of Ice Breaker, a Portland Storm prequel short story, as a gift for subscribing.

Breakaway and Bury the Hatchet have both been uploaded in their entirety, and the prologue or first chapter of every other book in each series is available.

Breakaway and Bury the Hatchet, the first books in their respective series, are free at all major ebook retailers. Read them here at Wattpad and/or download your copy by visiting my website.

Please be aware that I will only be adding sample chapters to most of my books to Wattpad. Writing is how I make my living, so I can't make everything free. Thanks for understanding! Links to purchase the books can be found here: http://catherinegayle.com/contemporary-romance.

title: Six Ways From Sunday
description:
Alicia Martinez is determined to keep a low profile. After a tough year, she deletes all of her social media and retreats to the small coastal town of St Andrews in the hopes of starting over - and avoiding her tumultuous past. 

Oliver Hogarth is a world-famous popstar that's recently had his heart shattered. Fleeing from the paparazzi, he runs to St Andrews - only to run directly into Alicia. Sparks fly immediately, and Oliver finds himself lying about who he is in order to win her over.

But Oliver belongs to a world of cameras, and Alicia is keeping a secret that could cost her everything if it gets out. With the real world closing in, can the two overcome the odds to make it work?

**COMPANION NOVEL TO "BACKSTAGE GIRL" BUT CAN BE READ AS A STANDALONE**

title: True Blue  - A Second Chance Romance (Complete)
description:
Does true love deserve a second chance?

The summer before university, Emily met and fell in love with Finn. It was a love to stand the test of time. Until Finn disappeared without so much as a goodbye. Eight years later, a twist of fate brings Finn back into Emily's life. Can she finally get answers to the questions that have kept her from moving on? Or does true love deserve a second chance?

A reimagination of Jane Austen's Persuasion.

⭐Reviews⭐
"Let me tell you something... I never ever read a sex scene as beautiful as this one! Like ever! It was something so simple, so pure, so lovely! "

title: Fake It | ✔️
description:
Sugar McKenzie and August Wakefield couldn't be more different - Sugar, a meticulous, caring, but lonely paramedic and August, a charming former reality star still chasing his dream. But they've both closed themselves off emotionally from others...that is until they match with each other on a dating app. 

After a disastrous first date, the two agree to never see each other again, yet they both can't stop thinking about one another, and circumstances keep pulling them back into each other's lives. Are they the real answer each other dreams, or will they continue to go through their lives hiding behind walls, just faking it?

title: Alpha's Human
description:
Book one of the Alpha's Series, begins with the story of Lara Pierce and Gage Peterson. 

Lara Pierce never knew what it was like to have a 'normal' life. She didn't know what it even consisted of. At the age of twenty-five, all she knew was how to be the legal guardian of her twin sisters and run her family's bar, The Red Fox. What she doesn't know is that her life is about to be far from normal when she collides into the life of the tattoo covered, bar owner, Gage Peterson. 

Being the alpha of the strongest pack, Blue Moon, means Gage Peterson has seen it all. Blood, destruction, and loss were all something he suffered one time in the time-frame of his twenty-four years on Earth. All he ever wanted was a normal life but that is far from coming true. The creature he is requires him to find his soulmate but Gage knows once he finds her, there's a chance she could be thrown into the destruction that his mythical life holds. 
If Lara is thrown into his world, will he be ready to accept a mate? Will Gage be ready to open his heart to let someone in his messed up world? Follow Lara and Gage's story in Alpha's Human. 

*Side Note-Alpha's Human is a bit different from regular werewolf stories. They will have a normal life but will be mythical creatures. Gage and his family are werewolves but this story is mostly following the story of him finding love. 

© All Rights Reserved

title: Thread of Ash and Fire
description:
Anna and Ryne must battle against evil forces - and their own hearts - in this high-stakes conclusion to the Thread of Gold series.

Season 4 of Thread of Gold 

***

Annalise Cidarius has a tough decision to make: seize the throne or take a chance at love. Reeling from a devastating battle that saw the defeat of the evil goddess Lucia, Anna returns to Stillwater Castle, where an empty throne awaits her; a throne that both she and her enemy-turned-lover Ryne Delafort intend to sit on.

But shortly after Anna returns, it becomes clear that chaos and dissent still rein. Reports surface that Eris Delafort has seized control of the neighbouring kingdom and is massacring towns. Even more disturbingly, there are whispers that Lucia has returned, and the goddess might just be more powerful than ever before...

If Anna is to save her kingdom, she must muster her courage and defeat the forces of evil once and for all. For if she fails, she'll lose everything - including her own head.

WARNING: This story contains strong language, depictions of violence, and mentions of sexual assault. Reader discretion is advised.

title: The Partham Chronicles
description:
You are not a human. Your ancestors came to earth thousands of years ago and have evolved with humans. At that time interbreeding was strictly forbidden. When the number of Parthams started dwindling, some of them started breeding with humans. If you have interbred and have produced an offspring then those offsprings have to go through the Selective Legacy Tests. They compete against each other and only one of the siblings will be selected and then separated from the family.

Leysa Bhaskara has secrets, that she has safeguarded for many years. But now they are threatened to be exposed. Her family and her children don't have any idea of what the future holds for them. Her children are going to be put through the Selective Legacy Tests, where they are going to compete against each other. Only one is going to be selected. What will happen if her family is threatened? And the future of an entire planet is in jeopardy. 

This story is about Leysa and Navil and their three children Aaden, Vysna and Tashvin. How their lives will change and what secrets they uncover in their world and the Partham ( Aliens that are living among them ) world along with fighting with sinister forces.









This story is
*sci-fi
*Drama
*Teens 
*Action
*Adventure 
*Fun
*Mystery 
*Superpowers 


As I said in my profile I am primarily a sci-fi writer, and I have thoroughly enjoyed writing this story. So, I am hoping that you will enjoy it too. Please give this story a chance. 

Loads of love 💕 💕 
RTW
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I am a reader and a listener of stories. I am an animator and designer by profession, but my love for sciences and art runs deep.

My love for stories started very young when my grandfather used to tell me mythological stories. He used to take me to the beach early in the morning and tell me various stories of different divinities in the Hindu pantheon. And these stories stayed with me.

I have started writing novels quite recently and I enjoy it thoroughly. I love travelling, Dancing, listening to music, anime and movies.            


I am primarily a sci-fi writer but now diversifying into other genres just to improve my writing.  So I would truly appreciate feedback in comments and also a follow.  If you like my work please give my stories a vote for encouragement.          


Follow me on Instagram for snippets and memes related to them or even some nonsensical stuff.

Instagram account- www.instagram.com/reertw13/profilecard/?igsh=b3VhMnN0MGk5bHQ0  Thank you.

title: Ending
description:
A town with no history. A girl with no name. An end with no beginning.

My oldest memory of this place was blurry. 

It faded in and out of my dreams and subconscious. The details edges had been rubbed smooth long ago, but the feeling of complete and absolute terror had remained as distinguishable as the day it happened. 

fifteen or so years back...

That fear has always kept me grounded to the forest that isolated me from the rest of the world. It kept me safe from whatever I had to run away from. Tricking me into thinking what was best for my survival, was to stay hidden. 

But when dangers from the outside seep into the safe haven I had created, all sense of security shatters. 

Suddenly the safety net is gone, and other people exist again...

Some that had definitely thought I was dead.

(as of 9/30/24 - Hello (: this is a disclaimer! I have been writing this book for like 6 years and it is not perfect at all. I am currently rewriting all the chapters and posting new ones every month so I can finish it. If you choose to read this know that this is not the final result. I hope you enjoy it and if not, feel free to tell me why. I'm trying to learn!

Thank you so much!)

title: Forgetting Prince Charming.
description:
She's had a secret kept safe for three years, one that would tear her family apart. It only took one drunk encounter for her secret to be exposed on national radio.

*****
Emma Ullmann has been harboring a secret for three years - she's in love with Dr. Eamon Mikklesen. Only problem, he's dating her sister Larissa. She's managed to keep her feelings a secret, but that all changes when on her way to work, Emma hears the notorious Joey Levy expose her secret on the city's most popular morning radio show. Now, not only is Emma desperate to keep her sister from finding out but she's also stuck having to be the city's biggest form of gossip. When the producers of Radio 769 realize the money making opportunity in front of them, Emma is pulled into their ridiculous game: Forget Prince Charming and give me Romeo. What follows is a hurricane of events where, no matter how hard she tries, Emma is thrust into the life of speed dating, blind dates and a voting poll where the public decides her next move. Either she moves on or, chases after Eamon.


Highest ranking: #3 in diverse lit, #5 in women's fiction, #1 diverse characters. #1 in interracial

title: Spotlight
description:
When superstar Kade Hendrix steals Ivy's song, she falls into his world of public scrutiny-and his arms-just as the rest of her world falls down around her.

Ivy is sure superstar Kade Hendrix won't notice his number one fan in the crowd of his intimate concert, but what happens when her childhood idol begins singing one of her songs that she submitted for his consideration--and pretends that he was the one who wrote it...

There's a reason they say never meet your heroes. 

                                                    ***

Ivy Bennett is just trying to get over her crush on her off-limits guy best friend when she is forced into superstar Kade Hendrix's world of managers, publicists, stylists, Non-Disclosure Agreements and intrusive paparazzi--all because he decided to steal the songwriting credits to what is proving to be his biggest hit of all time. 

Coaxed into a flimsy alliance where she takes a job as his primary co-writer, Ivy and Kade are caught up in a whirlwind of emotions--most of them hate--but somewhere along the way, romantic lines are blurred and Ivy isn't too sure that crush she had on Kade ever really went away.

Will Ivy forgive and forget the terrible behavior of the one person who was her inspiration for writing in the first place, or have the bridges already been burned?

Follow Ivy and Kade on their journey from strangers to enemies to something neither of them can put into words in his world of extremes in the spotlight.

title: Nightfire | The Whispering Wall #1
description:
Fear the dark. Bar the doors. Don't breathe a word. Wait for the Hooded Men to save you.

The people of Nictaven live in fear of the night; governed by magic no one save a few can control, in a land plagued by demons and cannibal tribes, and isolated from all other worlds for centuries, they're right to. Only the Unspoken, a secretive guild of warriors linked with the land and its magic, provide any safety when darkness falls. For centuries, it has stayed like this.

But in an abandoned crypt worlds away, Jordan Haverford is about to change that.

It wasn't quite the holiday he had been hoping for.

Plunged into a world where who you are and what you believe can kill you, a world of demons and knives in the dark and wars fought from behind the doors of the rich, Jordan's gentle Oxford upbringing isn't quite sufficient preparation. Instantly a pawn in a deadly game, separated from his sister and watched from the shadows by an assassin with a vendetta, he finds himself in the company of an Unspoken who has an uncanny knack for finding the Gifted - and Jordan can't seem to get rid of him.

ALL RIGHTS RESERVED © SEHarrison/Elinor Harrison

Writer - Comic Artist/Illustrator - Book Hoarder - Three Woodland Gnomes in a Trenchcoat - Purveyor of Random Facts about Totally Unrelated Topics - Collector of Hobbies - Never Has Enough Time For Everything But Tries Anyway

I enjoy dark, complex worlds with characters that feel real and that's what I aim for when I write, because sometimes you need a lil magic in your life. Or a face-eating demon, as the case may be. title: Bound by you till eternity
description:
Taking the envelope she handled him and studying it carefully, he asked her "You...are you sure you want to resign?" Adarsh asked her.

Taking a deep breath, Sophia said "Yes, Adarsh Sir, I want to."

Taking predatory steps towards her, caging her between him and the wall, he said "I've known you long enough to understand that this isn't what you want to do. Tell me, what's the matter?"

The way he was caressing her cheeks, was creating havoc in the pit of her stomach but she couldn't tell him the reason, not now, not ever.

Placing her warm hands over his big rough hands which were resting on her cheeks, not meeting his gaze, she said "Sir, please don't make it difficult for me. I...I can no longer work with you." 

"Have you made up your mind?" Adarsh asked and she simply nodded.

"Why?" Adarsh asked, almost in a defeated tone. His voice was barely above a whisper.

"You're the most efficient employee I could ever get," he said, caressing her cheeks with the back of her hands.

"Because I...I love someone else and I am getting married to him" She said with tears in her eyes, looking down.

What happens when our hotshot and well-to-do billionaire Adarsh Sharma and his assistant Sophia Chaudhary start working as a team for his empire, cracking deals worth billions, had to part ways, not only professionally but personally.

The defeated tone, was it just because he was losing an efficient assistant, or is there something more to it?

Join the ride of our protagonists Adarsh and Sophia to find out, what's written in their destiny.

title: The Wolf King | A Fantasy Romance
description:
[Now in Kindle Unlimited!] When a princess is kidnapped by an alpha, war rages between the humans and the wolves. But soon, forbidden attraction starts to grow. . .
---
Princess Aurora longs to escape the castle and the marriage that has been arranged for her.

But on the night before her wedding, at a dog fight where captured werewolves are made to fight for sport, she spares the life of a young wolf. It puts her on the radar of the powerful alpha who was going to kill him. And it changes everything.

That night, when the alpha escapes, he kidnaps her and takes her to the rugged lands north of the border-where the once warring werewolf clans are beginning to unite. He thinks that she is the key to winning the war against the humans.

Only, as they spend time around one another, forbidden attraction starts to grow. And as Aurora learns that not all wolves are bad, the alpha discovers that she is in danger from both his enemies, and those he once considered friends.

With monsters on both sides, a bloodthirsty war between humans and wolves raging, and undeniable passion growing between them-will their story end in love? Or tragedy?

And will Aurora ever get home?

Does she even want to?

*An adult fantasy romance for fans of werewolves, hot alphas, forbidden romance, and enemies to lovers*

C.W. contains strong language and sexual situations.

title: Inheritance - The Dark Sorcerers: Book 1
description:
As a Dark Sorceress who has lived a lie her entire life, Kenna will have to decide whether the world she is desperately trying to save hasn't been doomed all along.

***

Kenna has lived in the Monastery for as long as she can remember. Raised by the White Sisters as one of their own, she has always assumed she would eventually become a Sister herself. However, a few days before Kenna's eighteenth birthday, the Head Sister tells her that she is in fact a Dark Sorceress: a witch with the unusual ability to control Darkness and Death.

Despite the nature of her own powers, Kenna discovers that she is destined to defeat the Darkness which is taking over her world, a destiny that sets her on a quest to find out who she is and what she's capable of. Accompanied by a charming bodyguard, she embarks on a journey that makes her question everything she has ever believed in. 

As the Darkness is growing inside her, Kenna will have to make a choice. Will she deny her true identity and continue down the path of the Light? Or will she fulfill another, darker part of her destiny that no one dares to talk about?

title: Daegelus | Volume One: Subject 0333
description:
{WATTYS 2023 WINNER}
• Book 1 of the Daegelus series •

While hunting for his missing friend, Elijah stumbles upon a fiery journalist, who so happens to be looking for the same people as him: the doctors who experimented on him when he was a child. But when the two are forced to go on the run together, Elijah's healing wounds are opened, and he realises that Lyca Corp. took more than his childhood.

⊳⊱  ♕  ⊰⊲

The moment Elijah escaped from the lab where he unwillingly spent the past thirteen years of his life, he planned to live up to his promise: he'd find Haru, the only thing that kept him sane growing up. But with no idea where Lyca Corp. transferred him, Elijah hunts down the former doctors who made his life hell in search of answers.

After chasing his next lead, however, Elijah accidentally rescues Zoe, a journalist locked in his target's trunk. He has no choice but to bring her and her roommate, Jake, along with him as he flees the city to avoid capture. 

But as he continues his search, Elijah struggles with the scars Lyca Corp. burned into him. He has no idea who or what he is; he doesn't understand the power raging inside his bodyーthe power Lyca Corp. desperately tried to pry from him. Why does he have an insatiable bloodlust? What does the whispering voice inside his head want? And why does he feel as though a huge part of him has been torn away?

title: Straight as They Come, Kinda
description:
[Featured in FreetheLGBT: Diverse Literature reading list and Humor: Young. Dumb. Full of Fun list]

Colin Mitchell, a photographer at a well-known store, Snapshot, is openly gay--mostly. His ideal experiences are sexcapades that are always subtle, never out of line and straight to the point.

(Ironic, isn't it?)

However, he meets Peter Chu: a snarky Chinese student with a loud mouth and more issues than Vogue. His intriguing persona has Colin enraptured and willing to throw away his CADBMBB- 'Clients Aren't Dated, But May Be Banged' principle--and take things further than they've ever gone with any guy.

Circumstances push both their lives together, with Peter seeking to find his own path after a bad break up and a significant move. Colin is willing to walk that blazed trail with him--in more ways than one.

But there is one problem... Peter is as straight as they come. Kinda.

title: Four Suits (Book 1)
description:
(A Reverse Harem)

Leda Jenson is a lot of things. A great decision-maker is not one of them.

Stupidly drunk one night, Leda encounters a strange man at a casino who challenges her to a game of Russian roulette in exchange for fifty thousand dollars. Too drunk to think it through, and very much desperate for the cash, Leda goes along with it. As expected, it doesn't go well, and she dies a miserable death. At least, she's supposed to. Hours later, Leda finds herself in the complete opposite position: very much alive and in a brand new world.

From a wolf-like human and toucan necromancer to charming princes and card-inspired kingdoms, the world of 'Annadia' is far from what she expects. And it turns out the secrets it has to offer are far deadlier than a simple life or death game.

title: Fire & Ice  | Soulmate AU 1 |
description:
It seems like everyone Lake knows has already met their other half. He's spent years in waiting but has finally turned his back on fate. The counterpart system is simple but his life is not, so he doesn't expect it to work for him as it has for everyone else.

He joins the League as the next logical step in his life. It's the best option for anyone with powers, and Lake can control ice. His new career will serve as a distraction from the disappointment of the counterpart system if nothing else.

When Lake is assigned to an undercover operation that he's out of his depth with from the beginning, he gets far more than he bargained for. His friends have told him their stories of how they met their counterparts, but he's pretty sure that he can top all of them after he encounters the son of the man he is supposed to arrest.

title: Project Heart(h) ✓
description:
Junak Baruah wants to win the prestigious short film competition in his university. But with hundreds of participants and a stellar jury on board, winning means making a film that's never been made before. 

And that means breaking the rules and taking the biggest risk of his of life.
 
Project Heart(h) takes him to his grandparent's village, a small place tucked between rivers and hills. What seems like a quaint village soon brings with it an annoying stranger from Junak's forgotten past. Sparks are not supposed to fly for multiple reasons but mostly because their families are tied to an age-old rivalry twisted in secrets and betrayals.

But the heart wants what it wants and Junak's is set on a certain man with mischief in his eyes.

Set near bonfires and rivers, sprawled under starlit skies and surrounded by fireflies, it is a story about stepping off the highway, trekking through an unknown terrain and still finding one's way back home...

title: The Alien's Match (Le'vris Dragons Book 2)
description:
This dragon says he will make me shine brighter than his treasure, and he succeeds every time he touches me.

Threatened by a dwindling population, the dragons create a matching program where their fittest warriors seduce and conquer humans, providing comforts and pleasures fit for a queen.

It has been decades since they attacked Earth and destroyed our cities, but I haven't forgotten. After years of resentment and fighting to survive, I have no interest in their matching program. But when my rebellious sister enlists, I go on a wild chase that lands me in the brawny arms of an unyielding dragon who sets me on fire without breathing a single flame.

I'm stuck on an alien planet with this relentless man. He has so much wealth, status, and muscle that little can be denied, but the greedy dragon wants more: me. I resist his advances, but with every touch and whisper, every time he flies me into the sky to do wicked things no one else can see, I fall deeper into his lure.

title: There's Something In her love...
description:
"Oh, please, why am I gonna love you, the boy who pranked me my whole life?" she laughed.
"Because of the way I'm gonna make you fall for me!" he said, tripping her over and making her fall in his arms. He threw her in the car. 
"What the fuck...?" she was suddenly interrupted by a long, sexy kiss. "W-what're you doing...?" she  mumbled, still glued to his lips.
He caressed her cheeks and stoked her hair, slowly. They were still kissing; but it was amazing to see that none pull apart. 

His hands gradually reached under her shirt, and he unhooked the bra. Then he unbuttoned his shirt and jeans. His hot body with those few tattoos on his butt reading 'Kelly and the sex' and 'THERE'S SOMETHING IN HER LOVE', made him push harder into her body. 
"No, I hate you! And....this hurts!" she wailed, breaking the kiss. She put on her clothes and opened the car entrance. But before she could put her foot out, he pulled her over his naked body and whispered, "I love your body...." 

She slapped him and ran away. After reaching some miles away, she looked back at the car and smiled. "So do I...." she murmured.

title: Hunted by a Night Fae
description:
Heather once dreamed of spending a day in Faerie, surrounded by magic and music. But now she wants nothing more than to escape.

When Heather is captured in the Wild Hunt, she makes a bargain with a powerful Night Fae, Ronan, in order to return home. However, Ronan has motives of his own and is not above his own faerie trickery to get what he wants, especially when Heather finds herself linked to the world of Faerie in more ways than one. 

Dark forces are arising in Faerie, a corruption threatening the very magic that balances the realms of human and fae. If Heather wants to return home she'll have to make a choice between returning to those she loves--or saving the world she always dreamed of.

title: Fyra; Glitch: Version 1.2
description:
UPDATED EVERY SUNDAY.

Elaina always dreamed of becoming a successful author, but rejection after rejection shattered her world. Then, her life takes a dark twist- the desire to escape pulls her into the story she no longer remembers writing.


"Who are you?" he growled, his voice low and commanding, pinning her wrists behind her back. "How do you know so much?"


"I... I don't know," Elaina stammers, her pulse racing as she tries to avert his piercing gaze.


Dearil Schneider- a character she crafted with her very hands, now stood right in front of her. The brilliant, maniacal mad scientist who is both her captor and protector. His erratic behavior and twisted obsession to make Elaina his subject for experiments. Can she trust him?


Now trapped in a reality where time unravels, the space-time fabric is unstable and nothing is what it seems, a sinister presence keeping a close watch on her, lurking just out of sight, watching her every move. 


"You think I don't know who you are?" a voice hisses, icy fingers wrapping around her throat. "You wrote this hell, and now you're part of it."


But a greater force is hunting her down. QATARA, infamous for its human experiments on teleportation and time machines, may be closer than she thought-led by none other than  Dearil's long dead father. What will Dearil do when he discovers the truth? Will he still protect her, or will his obsession to control time lead him to betray everything they've fought for?


As their destinies intertwine, Elaina and Dearil confront the chaos of the 4th dimension and the time loops threatening to consume everything they hold dear. Bounded by a partnership filled with secrets, they must unravel the mysteries of their world and face the horrors lurking within it. But can Elaina rewrite her fate, or will she be lost in the darkness of her own making?

authorBio: In the cosmic ballet of words, I am both author and reader, tracing stories of constellations across the vast expanse of dreams.

title: Beautiful People | wlw
description:
Perpetual quitter Vera Kwan thinks she's got it made when her style blog catches the attention of narcissistic actor Carmen Juarez, but after egos ignite a gossip war, Vera has to learn to balance her flighty ambitions and her attraction to Carmen's prickly, gorgeous manager Sharise before her Hollywood dreams fall apart like a cheap polyester blouse.

*****

It's not Vera Kwan's fault that she can't hold down a job. A fashion school dropout, she dreams of becoming a famous designer, but the life of a style influencer is more grind than glamour. She just needs one big break, one chance to prove her styles are red carpet worthy.

When a snarky post about her celebrity crush Carmen Juarez catches the actor's attention, Vera wins her ticket to stardom. As Carmen's stylist, she sets out to prove that she's more than just pretty clothes and the right filters, and maybe even win the affections of Carmen's aloof manager, Sharise, who she quickly finds herself falling for.

After a clever fashion stunt goes viral, Vera is suddenly the most sought-after stylist in Hollywood. She even gets a job offer from Carmen's rival. But her style success may not be getting her any closer to her designer dreams, and secrets are beginning to fray her sense of purpose. If Vera can't figure out what's important enough to see through to the end, even when it seems impossible, she risks losing both the professional relationship that made her and the romantic relationship that might be the one thing that matters to her as much as fashion.

*****

Complete at 100k words.

title: The Crowning Glory
description:
He leaned in so close that I could feel his breath against my skin. I could see every detail of his face: the intensity in his eyes, and the faint scar above his eyebrow. My heart raced as he stepped even closer, invading my space, and I struggled to keep my composure.

"You have a choice: Do as I say and save your life, or end up dead," he warned in a voice cold as steel. My pulse quickened as I met his gaze, fierce and unrelenting.

                                                                                            * * *

On the night of May 13, a young couple found a cute little brunette girl with captivating chocolate-brown eyes left on their doorstep. Luke and Mia were overjoyed; they believed she was a gift, an angel sent by Gods.

But fate has its own plans.

All the couple wants is happiness for little Lorien, but will fate allow it? Cursed with challenges and heartbreak, she will face moments that test her will. Will she find the strength to rise above-or will she be consumed by despair?

Follow 17-year-old Lorien Robinson as she confronts life-changing truths and battles shadows that haunt her past. Her journey is only beginning, and readers will have to follow along to see where fate leads her next.

authorBio:
Hey guys!! you can call me AK or Bunny. I am currently pursuing my graduate degree and striving to improve my writing skills. However, writing for enjoyment is my primary motive.

I prefer crafting mysteries that revolve around people with fascinating lives, albeit fictional. I'm sorry if I fail to update regularly, as I might get preoccupied with my studies.

In my leisure time, I indulge in watching horror movies and TV shows, devouring stacks of books, cooking, and relishing pizza. I also enjoy singing, dancing, and painting, which might categorize me as an art student, but I am, in fact, a science enthusiast who yearns to reside in Diagon Alley (I know it sounds crazy).

Until, one night, Will gets a flat tire and suddenly they're teetering on the edge of everything changing.

title: Fluke
description:
"For a place called Paradise City, this island sucks. I don't think a single day has gone by that I haven't thought about stabbing the shit out of myself," he said. "Especially since I'm forced to live with you every second of every day."

"Sh. I'm trying to science," I said, not looking up from my binoculars.

"See anything interesting?"

"Not really. My vision's a little clouded from the fog and rain clouds you constantly emit."

He laughed. "You never fail to amuse me, Rea."

"But you just said-"

"I just said you make me want to stab myself. Interpret that however you'd like."





With a love for whales and all life (besides maybe humans), Reagan Winebrenner had never even seen an ocean until her senior year in high school. But the moment she saw her first humpback, she knew she had found her passion and future career.

A few years later and an invitation to Paradise City in hand, Reagan has her entire summer laid out for her, working on the project of a lifetime. But with five other students completing their projects as well, will they discover something worthwhile, or will they end up a psychology lesson for future generations?

A New Adult Watty Winner 2019

title: The Fires of Rosefield
description:
When Linda Rose fell into a hole, her life took a turn she wouldn't believe. A guy called Harrison helped her out of the hole in the sidewalk, in which she fell, and little did she know that he was the descendent of a wealthy family who somehow stranded in her quiet town of Pinewoods. Altough the separated with nothing but their names, Linda could not stop thinking about him. The strange feeling grew inside her, that their meeting was not just an accident.
Their encounter started a fire inside both of them. 
But a fire is not always just beautiful. Its flames can burn down the things you love the most.

But one can rise from the ashes...

title: Do You Want Me Forever ,Mr Lunar ?
description:
Cia Skywalker, an 20-year-old Hollywood actress, is famous for her sharp wit and fearless attitude. But beneath her tough exterior lies a vulnerable heart, trapped in a world of glamour and deception. Her 20th birthday signifies her elevation to a new level in her family, where she's expected to marry and become her father's personal assistant as the first daughter.However, Cia's unwillingness to comply sparks hostility from her stepmother, Eugenia, and stepsisters, Monica and Grace.
On her birthday party , Cia collides with Damien Glen, her father's godson, sparking an electrifying encounter. Their heated exchange shows a fiery attraction, but also draws deadly attention from foes in Hollywood who envy her success.
Cia's life is complicated:
- Her father, Captain Ray Skywalker, demands she marry a man of his choice.
- Her stepsisters fuel a deadly rivalry and harbor a secret crush on Damien.
- Self-serving actor Max Collard hides his true intentions.
- Lila, Damien's loyal pack member, harbors a secret crush.
As threats escalate, Cia needs protection. Damien offers his help, but at a steep price: her heart. Unbeknownst to Cia, Damien's true intentions are to uncover if she's the reincarnation of his long-lost love.
Can Cia trust the mysterious Mr. Lunar? Or will his secrets destroy her?
Their marriage begins as a sham, but as they exchange vows, Cia realizes forever may be her only option. "I never believed in forever until I married the moon's darkest son," she thinks. "Our marriage was a contract, a flash, but our love became an ultimate covenant."
As the lunar cycle heightens, their love faces its greatest test. Will Cia and Damien conquer the darkness surrounding them, or will their love become their downfall?

Alice Gray, descendant of the Pendle Witch that got away, might have magic and a vampire lover, but she still needs help unravelling her strange family history. 

Alice Gray must find a way to control her magic, or lead a life of isolation and madness. Creepy ancestors infiltrating her dreams are not the kind of help that she needs. But if the past holds answers, where better to get them than the heart of the paranormal community in London. Surrounded by vampires, werewolves and witches, Alice must learn that control comes from give and take.

With the right help, maybe the past can yield the answers after all...

title: My Vampire Bromance
description:
Phillip is awkward at best. His hair's a mess, his style more than dated, and when it comes to picking up women, he fails every time. Phillip thinks he's forever doomed to be single until one night a mysterious man shows up and proves to be the greatest lady killer in town. Wanting to know what makes this handsome stranger such a player, Phillip plucks up the courage to follow him one late November evening. What he finds out is more than he bargained for. The dashing young man he's set his sights on is not human. And when Phillip catches him in the middle of a feeding frenzy, the vampire strikes a hard bargain with him to keep his secret. He'll teach Phillip anything he wants, in exchange for a place to stay and call home.

But that's not the worst of it. Lately, there's been dead bodies turning up on the college campus, and no one knows who's responsible. That is, no one except the vampire who's now making moves on Phillip. Victor is everything Phillip has ever dreamed of, but when he reveals that another vampire is behind the gruesome murders, Phillip finds himself between a rock and a hard place.

Turns out, falling in love with a vampire is not all it's cracked up to be.

title: She Drew Stars Around My Scars
description:
This is the story of Ishika Gupta who belongs to a middle-class family, their family is the same as every Indian household, filled with lots of issues, trauma, and entertainment. Ishika is a carefree girl but not careless, She is hardworking and knows her worth, She works hard to help her family financially, She has a lot in her mind that she never shared with anyone. For everyone, she is a cute, jolly Ishika whose life is just perfect.
But this is just from the outside, the person who laughs a lot is the person who...Hides a lot.

Meanwhile, We all know our favourite Veer, You all know how much his life is f*cked up After that one drastic incident. His life was turned upside down by that one court case which damaged his family's reputation. The Veer who used to make everyone smile, couldn't smile anymore. He was once like Ishika, Carefree, joking around, Living his life, But then everything changed, He distanced himself from everyone, and His teenage still haunt him. His life turned into black-and-white melodramatic 50s movies until He got married.
The guy who decided to not go close to the female species, came back home married. Everyone was shocked, the guy who became distant from his own mother and sister, came back married. That too a girl who is completely stranger.

Will Ishika make him the guy he was? Will his family accept Ishika? Will they end up together forever? What will Ishika do when she gets to know about his horrible past?

title: Access Denied
description:
Run, Steal and Survive. 

Genevieve Wilfred has only known those three things for as long as she could remember.

But now, the people who she's been running from have caught up. Law Enforcement has her cornered for all the crimes she has committed. And it doesn't seem like she can survive on her own much longer.

Blind-Spot Agency has offered Genevieve a deal. And in return they want her help. She has to catch the very people she has been hiding from. The most dangerous, ruthless people she has ever encountered. Redstone. 

Genevieve's world is about to be flipped when she sets out on a case along with a newly-made leader, a crazy bomb specialist, a drunk shooter, and a brooding assassin.

What she doesn't know is that everything happens for a reason. And there was a reason she was put on this case. What she thought would be a Chase is turning out to be plans of utter destruction. The future seemed easier once, but not anymore.

Not when every secret is revealing.
Not when all the doors are closing.
Not when all Access is denied.
------------
"Check your wallet."

 She held it in front of her to show the room her wallet. "It's still here, you are not much of the thief-" she opened her wallet to find it empty.

"I needed the money," Genevieve pulled out a few dollar-bills out of her jacket pocket. "The wallet was worthless."
------------
 [This is the First Book in the Access Series]

The heat of this three-day event mingled with all the buzz in the air forces, the two of them together, and reignites an almost forgotten flame. Five years ago.

title: ѕoυlвoυɴd ᵖᵃʳᵗ ᵒⁿᵉ
description:
While investigating a terrible incident, Minako becomes Soulbound to Sasuke Uchiha because of an ancient spell.

𝙊𝙛𝙛𝙞𝙘𝙞𝙖𝙡𝙡𝙮 𝙛𝙚𝙖𝙩𝙪𝙧𝙚𝙙 𝙞𝙣 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙛𝙤𝙡𝙡𝙤𝙬𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙒𝙖𝙩𝙩𝙥𝙖𝙙 𝙋𝙧𝙤𝙛𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙨:
@YAFantasy, @StoriesUndiscovered(July 2021), @adventure, @YA, @TeenFiction, @Fantasy, @YAMystery, @Alt-U, & @NA Profiles

𝘿𝙚𝙨𝙘𝙧𝙞𝙥𝙩𝙞𝙤𝙣:
Perennial underdog Minako's promising career in KISU (Kumo Intelligence and Security Unit) comes to a crashing halt when a mission fails disastrously and she is left as the sole survivor in the carnage with no memory of what happened. 

Suspended indefinitely and with her future on the line, Minako decides to uncover the truth about what happened that fateful night.

But while embarking on her journey, she becomes a victim of a dabbler who casts an ancient spell to bind souls and gets stuck with an insufferable and infamous reformed criminal named Sasuke Uchiha.

Together, they must work to find the Grand Spellcaster of the Majin Realm to break the enchantment within the next full moon or risk being bound together for all eternity.

But little do they know, that there are dark forces that conspire against them. Nothing is what it seems.

𝙁𝙤𝙧𝙢𝙚𝙧𝙡𝙮 𝙠𝙣𝙤𝙬𝙣 𝙖𝙨: Until There Was You

title: Tides of Love
description:
Marina is a surfing champion and a perfectionist who hates chaos. So why can't she resist the chaotic Win, the men's surfing champ and her long-time crush?

Standalone in the Riding Your Wave series. 

***
 
Four-time Women's World Surfing Tour winner Marina isn't like other girls. Her sisters are sunny and simple; Marina is perfectionistic and complex. The women on the surfing circuit are easy-going and focused on today; Marina is driven and focused on her future.

So when Marina realizes she's developing a crush on a certain Men's surfing champion, she's baffled. Win is the opposite of what Marina should be attracted to: she loves order - he is chaos. Tall, sexy, bald, muscled, irresistible chaos.

But Marina and Win have a long history, and he's not about to let her go without a fight. When the undercurrents of tension become too strong to resist, will Marina be able to let go?

title: The Last City (Wattpad Books Edition)
description:
The Last City is now published as a Hardcover, and E-book with W by Wattpad Books!

As a Wattpad reader, you can access the Wattpad Books Published Edition here upon purchase.

                                                                     *****

The highly anticipated sequel to The Last She, which Goodreads has included in its Most Anticipated Young Adult Novels of December 2021

Ara
Is desperate to reunite with her father and put the events that happened in Boise behind her. Ara hopes to find sanctuary in The Last City, an almost-mythical place where the plague is non-existent and she can finally discover the truth about her family. Only once she arrives, the truth is stranger than fiction and Ara wonders if she's made a huge mistake . . . 


Kaden
Will go anywhere and will do anything for Ara.. But he's tested to his limits in The Last City, where he is forced to join a dangerous expedition. Kaden soon finds himself separated from Ara and once again on the run for his life. Barely escaping alive, he needs to risk it all again to find Ara in The Last City . . . 


Sam
Is left for dead but very much alive. In fact, he's rigged an electrical system and blasts some music, feeling almost normal for the first time since almost losing his life. He doesn't know where Kaden and Ara are, and when he meets a mysterious girl named E, they embark on an adventure that will bring all of their lives clashing together . . . 


All three must uncover the secrets of The Last City if they have any hope of getting out of this apocalypse alive. Set immediately after the events of The Last She, H.J. Nelson's The Last City is a gripping story of three people desperate to survive against all odds, and love is sometimes all that matters.

Available in Hardcover and E-book.

A bit about me....

I love volleyball, white-water rafting and poking dead things with a stick. Oh, and writing.

My favorite books are Where the Red Fern Grows, The Princess Bride and the Harry Potter series. My husband tells me I have extremely poor knife safety skills, but he has no idea what he's talking about. *Juggles knives in background.* I graduated from the University of Idaho and the University of Wisconsin with degrees in Wildlife Biology and Creative Writing. I have backpacked through Europe, lived on a boat in the British Virgin Islands, rode elephants through the jungles of Laos, but no matter where I travel, the mountains of Idaho will always be home.

I've always loved to read and write, but Wattpad was the first place I found the courage to share my stories with the world. It has been the greatest adventure, and honor, to find that others enjoy them too.

Thanks for stopping by ;)
- Hannah

title: Missing Piece
description:
"What should I call you then? Gold-digger?" I ask smirking. 

"Real original, genius." She taunts shifting in her seat to face me. "At least my grandfather didn't have to go and buy me a wife because no poor soul wanted to marry me." Now it's her turn to give me a mocking grin.

"YOU-" My hands clench around the steering-wheel in fury.

"You what? Got nothing to say, future husband." She says with a smirk still plastered on her face.

I cannot believe I'm about to get married to her.
.....................
.....................
Benjamin has everything. From having a promising position in his grandfather's company to a perfect fiancée. His life couldn't have been more perfect. But despite that, there is something missing from his life.

What happens when Benjamin's fiancée leaves him with an accusation of a crime he didn't commit. And in the next second, he suddenly finds himself thrown into an unexpected marriage with a complete stranger. 

Could that stranger be 'The Missing Piece' Benjamin didn't even know he was missing?

title: Bad Fae | romantasy | Bad Fae #1
description:
*now complete*
Bad fae. As though there's such a thing as a good fae.
Since the fae were exiled from their Otherworld to the human world, Aegrath has been a continent under precarious truce. Hatred runs deep for the atrocities committed in the war following the Return.
So, what did this hybrid bastard princess decide to do? Yeah, steal from the arrogant arseholes. My escape nearly ends in an execution when a dark fae assassin decides to save my life. Now that life belongs to Dain of the Voidsworn under magical geas. The fae responsible for killing the only people I had ever loved.
He owns me. He controls me. He hates me. He craves me. But no less than I hate and crave him in return, as obsession flares between us. He would destroy the whole world for me, as long as we don't destroy each other first.
Is this merely Fate's cruel idea of a joke or is there some other reason the Goddess has forced the two of us together?
As my connection to my darkling fae side grows stronger, truths come to light that have the very real power to topple the fragile peace holding Aegrath from the brink of another war. And Dain and I have no choice but to stand against them all together.

For fans of Sarah J. Maas and Holly Black.
These are not the fairies of your childhood. They are dark and dirty, and sooner kill you as love you. They might even kill you because they fell in love with you. They do nothing unless it suits them, and they will steal your heart.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Pennames: Elizabeth Stevens; E.J. Knox; Pippa Langhorn; Scarlett Knox

Writer. Reader. Perpetual student. From the Dwarf. Never caffeinated enough.

Born in New Zealand to a Brit and an Australian, I am a writer from South Australia with a passion for all things storytelling. I love reading, writing, TV and movies, gaming, and spending time with family and friends. I am an avid fan of British comedy, superheroes, and SuperWhoLock. I have too many favourite books, but I fell in love with reading after finding Isobelle Carmody's 'Obernewtyn'. I am obsessed with all things mythological - my current focus being old-style Irish faeries.

My books have won awards and sold 300,000 copies worldwide in print, ebook and audio. I have 60+ published with Sleeping Dragon Books, for readers from Middle Grade to Adult ranging from adventure to romance. And many more are in the works.

I have a Master of Arts (Writing), a Graduate Diploma in Research Methods (Creative Writing), a Master of Arts (Editing and Publishing - Indie Book Marketing), and am currently working towards my PhD (Creative Writing - morally grey characters and the value of darkness in Dark Romantasy).

I live in Adelaide with my long-suffering husband, smol human child, delirious dog, mad cat, two chickens who are scared of free-ranging, a turtle with a penchant for sticking her head in her filter pipe, and a cranky bunny.

Instagram/Threads: @writeriz

title: Lemon Cake
description:
#PartyBoss isn't a term Tulip Carpenter coined herself but she wears it with pride. Her life is a party, she's doing what she loves, creating mindblowing celebrations for the happiest moments in people's lives. But when the baby she put up for adoption boomerangs back into her life the party stops. How will the free-spirited, swearing maven, one-night stand queen manage motherhood and all the duties it brings? 

This Southern Rebel is about to face the test of her life.

title: Starting Position
description:
|| 2021 WATTYS SHORTLIST ||Elliot Mitchell is stuck on autopilot--until she meets Ben Harrison, who begins to bring her back to life.

Elliot is counting down the days until she can leave the town that narrates her past. After tragically losing her mom, she is now dealing with an absent father, never-ending nightmares, and friends that she no longer relates to. Never mind that she used to be a track prodigy. One more semester and she's gone. 

But Elliot was counting on meeting Ben Harrison. Ben is different--his cerebral palsy is just the tip of the iceberg. When Ben joins the track team and they are assigned to work together on a project, emotions start to stir, and Elliot must either face her past or lose the closest connection to someone she has ever felt. 

Tags: romance, new adult, college, loss, love story

authorBio:
hsp |  infj | idealist | forest dweller | star gazer | music enthusiast | storyteller | old soul | harmony seeker | animal lover | humanist

My brain is 80% song lyrics and 20% spiraling thoughts.

In a constant state of melancholy.

I like slow burns, sad stories, and character development.

"The hardest thing is to live richly in the present without letting it be tainted out of fear for the future or regret for the past." - Sylvia Plath

Listen, and try to understand.

title: Faith
description:
Working for a rich family like the Thompson's, knowing that she was just like them once was hard for Amelia. The fact that she now had nothing left after losing her money, her friends, her boyfriend, her parents and her life caused Amelia to have no other choice but to accept her fate as a maid. She made the best of it, she made friends who always managed to put a smile on her face if only for a minute. It all changed for Amelia when a figure of her past slides it's way back into her life so suddenly that she didn't even know real from fake. It was too much for her and it was blamed all on faith. Faith she had to choose from. Ignore it, run and hide again or face it and fix the past. Suddenly the future wasn't so simple and  predictable as Amelia thought it was, she couldn't even see into tomorrow. Would she run again or would she take the bull by it's horns and think of it as a second chance of happiness? She couldn't even see happiness in her future, how would she survive?

title: Eliuteria
description:
"Human beings are vile, nasty creatures. 
Blood thirsty. 
Evil by their very nature. 
That is was we were told. By them.
Humans relished for millennia in systematically destroying one another. Our innate yearning for violence lead to not only the destruction of ourselves, but of our planet. 
Our home.
Our planet was dead, our species nearly extinct, so we left. Those who survived dreamed of finding a new planet, a safe haven where we could start over. But our technology was failing and we never made it to our destination. We were adrift in space. Destined to die in the emptiness of the universe. It was luck that the Morrí heard the signal broadcasting. It was altruism that they came to our aid. It was their generosity that provided a home and a life for the remaining humans. 
They were our saviors. Without the Morrí, the last of humankind would have perished along with a broken vessel. 
That, at least, was the version of history we were taught. Humans had to earn their place among the Morrí. Humans must prove themselves. Humans are not to be trusted due to our volatile nature. Humans owed their very existence to their Morrí superiors."

Keep your head down and survive. 
Don't attract the attention of our Saviors. 
Lena has spent her life following the rules set forth by her father to avoid any conflict with the alien race who saved humanity. It's worked for the most part, until a chance encounter leads to her becoming entangled in a dangerous game  of politics and war between Morrí leaders.  All of her perceptions of the race she's served her whole life are challenged as she's forced to put her trust in one who she's always considered an enemy.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I am a wife to my very best friend and mommy to two amazing little boys, they are my life. I have my degree in communications but writing is my passion and (like so many of you, I'm sure) I hope to make a career of it one day.
I love you for reading my work; stories I pour my heart into. Seriously. I do.

title: This Crappy Life (Season One)
description:
[Teen and New Adult Zombie Apocalypse Romance]

"If you would've told me the last day of our peaceful existence would be a boring Tuesday in November, I would've called you an idiot."

High school senior, Casey Whitmore, is about to discover her life isn't all about graduating with honors, taking her team to the championship, or being the perfect daughter. When Casey's mother comes down with the scariest illness imaginable, she is forced to take action, but no matter which way she turns the normal solutions are unavailable.

As she searches for medical treatment, Casey crosses paths with two friends who agree to help. Derek is the broody, mysterious type while Thomas is the smooth wild card. The guys couldn't be more different, but are attractive and seductive in their own way.

It's not until all communication is cut off that they realize the spreading illness is no accident, and the world becomes lost in a horrific whirlwind when the dead start attacking the living. 

Life must go on, but with no survival skills, Casey has a lot to learn. Even though Thomas and Derek prove to be invaluable during the fallout, love is still very much alive, and emotions run wild even during the zombie apocalypse.
