title: His Broken Mate ✔︎
description:
Alexandria Rivera had a very abusive and unforgettable past. Hiding her gloomy past, covering up with lies, keeping her demons to herself. In her world there is no meaning for the words love, trust. She trusts no one. And nobody noticed her suffering, nobody looked at her cuz she always pushes everyone, when they try to know about her past. 

 Asher Pearce, soon-to-be-alpha of Mystic Shadow pack is known as the most ruthless pack ever. He is waiting for his mate. He wants to love and cherish her. But will she?

What happens when they cross their paths? Will she accept him as he is? Will she love and trust again? Will he accept her, a human? Will she have a happy ending? Will she find a happy place called 'home?'

title: Consumed
description:
Spencer Romano.
They call him the prince of Everton, but he's just another mystery to me.
He doesn't live in his own kingdom, but he rules it.
He doesn't care for the citizens but he keeps them safe. 
He's not a prince, yet somehow, he's the epitome of it.
And I get to marry him and live in his dark, looming, haunted castle as his wife, while I try to kill him and finish what I was hired to do.
But as I try to do that, I'm also trying (struggling) not to lose my heart to him.
Hate consumes him.
But his love consumed me. 
.
.
.
A DARK ROYALTY ROMANCE

THE WATTY AWARDS 2022 SHORTLISTER (Sequels)

THE AMBY AWARDS 2022 WINNER (Best Series)

Nearly one full year since Samara and Vlad's separation elapsed, and their child was born.

Now, as Halloween approaches again, Samara is prepared to return into Vlad's world to find out if there is any way for them to stay together. Samara risks everything for love... Will she be rewarded with the only thing she has ever wanted-- a lifetime with a man she loves? Will she be finally able to put a happy ending to her and Vlad's love story?

title: Tamed
description:
Oliver Monroe leads a perfect life.  Good job, great friends, and his pick of women.  The only problem is the only girl that has ever stood out to him can't stand him.  One stupid mistake messed up the only relationship that ever meant anything to him and he's regretted it ever since.  But he'll never admit that.

Charlotte Reed left town right after high school and never looked back.  Now, almost five years later she finds herself in the very place that sent her running in the first place right along with the guy who destroyed her.

Not everyone gets a second chance to make things right.  Sometimes you need to lose something to realize how much you can't live without it.

title: Liberate You, Liberate Me✔️
description:
After falling victim to a traumatic high school senior prank Libra Jones is more than ready to leave high school and start college. Leaving her small town behind she heads to Columbia College in Chicago, hoping for a fresh start. But instead she has anything but.

Dillon Holden used to be the most popular bad boys in high school, but at Columbia College he hopes that can all change. Especially because he has a lot to make up for - like the horrible secret that would tare his future apart if anyone found out.

Libra and Dillon used to go to the same high school and now find themselves looking for a fresh start in the exact same place. But neither of them knows that what they are running from is heavily tied to each other. Can they help each other past it or will the truth only fuel the distance between them?

description:

Sophia Huntington is a socialite. She likes rooftop cocktails, perusing copies of Vogue, and rubbing shoulders with Toronto's elite.

Finn Hoag is a farm boy. He grew up wrangling cattle, riding horses, and having tailgate parties every Saturday night.

Their worlds should have never collided. title: Worth The Trouble ✓
description:
COMPLETED

BOOK 2- Sequel to Deal With It (#2 in ambitious #19 in tearjerker #3 in French)

Amber Amity just couldn't seem to catch a break.

She lost her father to lung cancer, her boyfriend of 3 years moved away without a warning, and now she's been fucked over by something she never saw coming.

Amber was an ambitious 23-year-old woman who radiated poise and confidence. She refused to settle for mediocrity, instead, she wanted to be the best; she wanted nothing less than perfection.

She was on track to becoming Fashionsitique's, a renowned fashion magazine's, Editor-In-Chief. She wanted to take the world by storm and reinvent fashion, and she could only do that from the position she was dead-set on getting.

But will a series of unfortunate events allow her to do that? Will all these hardships be worth perfection? Amber didn't know. She was so close to giving up- all she wanted was for the universe to give her a break.

She didn't know how to enjoy life anymore, but maybe she can learn to see the bigger picture. It would take her some time to understand that life and all its hardships will be worth the trouble.

Always.

•••

Sneak peek:

I lifted my head and glanced at him, "This is all your fucking fault, Isaac."

Isaac didn't hide his bafflement, "My fault?" He repeated. "How-"

I cut him off with a shake of my head, "I should have never let you convince me to go out," I breathed out, feeling my eyes prick with unshed tears. I felt anger slowly bubble through me making me stare up at him, "This is all your fault."

title: Waiting for Everest ✓
description:
Camille Settlemeyer's life revolves around two great natural wonders: Mount Everest, the highest point on Earth, and Matt Everest, the boy she's been in love with ever since they met at rock climbing camp five years ago. She might have to wait a few more years before her parents let her fly off to Nepal to scale the world's tallest summit, but this summer Camille's going to hit the road with Matt for one last climbing expedition before they part ways for college. Camille is convinced that a couple days alone with Matt in a beat-up van will make him realize they're destined to be together. 

What she doesn't account for is Matt bringing along his best friend from climbing camp, Tucker O'Hara, who possess an encyclopedic knowledge of the constellations and a sense of humor drier than the sprawling Arizona desert. Camille doesn't like how much of a know-it-all Tuck is, or how his gorgeous older sister seems to steal every last bit of Matt's attention. But Camille's about to learn that even the best climbers need a compass sometimes.

(Commission for Wattpad's promotion of the film "The Best of Me")

title: Lighter
description:
It seemed that all Savannah Benson would amount to was a mess. An unstable girl who couldn't erase her past, and let her demons continue to haunt her day after day, night after night. There was too much wrong with her to even consider fixing her.  

With no hope for change and a life full of never-ending issues, someone suddenly comes along to throw her off her self-loathing, cold-shoulder routine. The possibility of letting them in doesn't seem so hard, which is the one thing she fears the most, except she can't help it. It's the easiest thing that's happened to her in a long time, and that's what makes it so terrifying.

This is not a fairy tale where everyone lives happily ever after - this is a story about love, loss, and every struggle in between. It might break your heart, but at least you'll feel something.

title: A Different Kind Of Love
description:
" hey " I said while giving a light knock to the door 
" hi, what are u doing here? come in " he said trying to fix his tie, which he seemed to fail miserably. 
" shouldn't u be getting ready for the wedding? " he said. He was right, I should be getting ready wearing the white gown selected by my cousin and getting my hair and makeup done. But here I was wearing all black standing in front of him. The wedding is to be held within a few hours, everything was planned according to me, the pinkish white and red wine coloured decorations, the food , the cake, everything. This wedding is exactly as I expected my wedding to be. 
" ughhh God, Anne can you please help me with the tie? " he said giving up trying to do his tie. He was wearing the black wedding tuxedo which looked as if it was made only for him, his hair combed and parted on the left side giving him the perfect look.
" no " I said sternly 
" no? " he said finally looking up at me connecting our eyes. Slowly I walked closer to him and then did the one thing that I wanted to do for so many years, I closed the distance between us and pressed my lips onto his, the kiss lasted for a few second before I pulled out, but stood very close to him. He didn't kiss me back maybe because he was too shocked to or because he just didn't want to. I started doing his tie, not looking up at him. I felt him staring down at me 
" this is the last time I am doing something for u Kai " I said as I walked out of his room and apparently his life, not daring to look back. Tears started to slip out of my eyes. I can't do this, not now, not ever. People gave me a questioning look as I walked up to the gate. Not being able to bare it anymore I started running towards my car as tears continued to slip out of my eyes.
 And right at that moment I decided to do the one thing that I thought would be the best for all of us 
I WALKED OUT OF THE ONE PERSON'S LIFE WHOM I LOVE THE MOST

title: Myth Breaker
description:
𝓕𝓪𝓶𝓲𝓵𝔂 𝓓𝓸𝓮𝓼𝓷'𝓽 𝓔𝓷𝓭 𝓲𝓷 𝓑𝓵𝓸𝓸𝓭

Morgan is sent to live with her grandmother at a college in the middle of nowhere. Forced from the sun and bustling city to a cold and rainy forest. There she finds out that her world is a lot bigger than she expected, that humans are surrounded every day by vampires, werewolves, and witches, more than that she might actually be one herself. 

Now she has to learn how to control her powers and how to live and interact with other supernatural creatures. Like the werewolves that won't leave her alone - not that she really wants them to - and the vampire tutor that makes her heart pound loudly in her chest whenever she sees him. 

Not only that but outside of the school, something is brewing other supernatural creatures hate seeing the interactions of the school. For centuries vampires and werewolves have hated each other but here they are learning and working together. A war is coming to rip them apart and Morgan might end up caught in the middle of it because of her feelings for both the werewolves and the vampire. 

Can she learn to control her powers before the war comes and help protect the school and the people that mean so much to her or will she be too late and lose everyone she cares about just as she is starting to learn to trust and love again?

title: Chasing Death
description:
When Hell and Earth collide, sparks are bound to fly. Saddened by the death of her lover, Tora tries to take her own life only to learn that her name is missing from the system of the Fates. Trapped in a dangerous realm, making friends and foes and trying to evade eternal punishment, Tora finds safety in the arms of Death himself. Will this forbidden love survive the test of time? title: Bound By Midnight (One Night A Week)
description:
One Night a Week Was the Rule... Until Love Broke all the rules.

Rachel Worthington never thought she'd be reduced to bargaining with a man like Ethan Blake. A man who moved through life like a shadow, casting a cool, implacable gaze on the world and everyone in it. The billionaire had made his wealth on his ability to control everything around him. And when Rachel found herself at his mercy, she struck a deal-a dangerous one, but one that seemed simple enough: One night a week. In return for a debt she couldn't afford to pay.

But one night was never enough.

Not with a man like Ethan. Not with the way he looked at her-his gaze so intense it seared right through her defenses. So calculating, so possessive, and yet, beneath the surface, there was something darker, more fragile. Every week, she arrived, knowing what was expected of her. Knowing there were rules. But rules, she soon learned, were meant to be broken.

title: Moira
description:
Moira ~ A person's destiny 

************************************

I was holding the photo tightly in my grasp when I felt a presence behind me. Ace came closer to me and reached around me causing his chest to press into my back. Before I could control myself, a breathless gasp escaped me from feeling the sparks from the places we were touching.

Ace didn't say anything, instead, he took the photo from my hand and backed away. I turned around to see Ace walking back to the couch he was just sitting on. I leaned back against the bookshelf as Ace sat down.

Looking at Ace, I needed to know. I needed to know why he had a photo of me from before. Why would he have one when he was the one who rejected me? He hated me and yet he kept a photo of me for years.

I felt a feeling of loss like I had never felt before. I was confused and hurt. Why did he have that photo? I had so many questions for him.

I whispered, not wanting to break the silence but needing an answer, "Why?"

One word, three letters, a beginning of a question. Not enough meaning behind it but he knew what I meant. Even if I didn't know what I wanted it to mean. Because in my head, a thousand questions I needed him to answer.

Why did he reject me? Why take a picture of me? Why keep that picture of me for years? Why did he choose Brittney? Why didn't he love me? Why was I not good enough?

But instead of asking all these questions, I chose to ask one word with only three letters. Because that one word held all my questions in it. It held the pain that I felt. It held the rejection, the hope, and the anger.

Ace looked at the picture, "I needed you."


************************************
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"We all wear masks and the time comes when we cannot remove them without removing our own skin."


I love to write stories, poems, or thoughts. Writing is my escape from reality and it allows me to think about a future that isn't likely to come true. My stories are my versions of fairytales---it comes with both the good and the bad.

title: How To Lose Weight And Survive The Apocalypse
description:
One woman's guide to falling in love, getting fit and surviving the end of the world.

Karla is busy running her own business, half-heartedly trying to lose her belly fat, and avoiding thinking about her single-status - she does not have time for civilisation to fall apart rn.

But when the world as she knows it crumbles like a triple-choc cookie, Karla will have to embark on the trip of a lifetime to find safety.  Traversing the vastness of the Australian east coast, Karla and her companions - a misfit band of workmates and one reasonably attractive stranger - will find adventure, love and a new dress size.

Rom-com meets disaster movie meets extreme-makeover, this story is for anyone who needs the motivation of a planetary disaster to change their world.

description:
"He captivated me... before i fell"...❤️‍🔥❤️‍🔥❤️‍🔥

Violetta Clove, Had a life that was simple and normal, until the day she meet him, Marcus king. He was her devil making her sin, and fallen angel to her rescue. Both.

-----

He is bad for me.

He is danger.

He is everything that screams Alarm.

Yet, I couldn't help but fall in deeper for him.

"Violetta, why do you lie to yourself ?" he paused answering his questions himself, "you know your a bad liar right?" 

His hands hugged my waist pulling me closer to him.

"I know you want me, then why struggle and lie? Give into me."

He was right. About everything! But I can't... "i am not..." I denied. Pathetic lie.

He didn't say anything and gave his sexy wicked smirk to me, "i am going to kiss you now. Stop me if you will." He leaned in close. 

My heart ran a marathon.

My body reacted to his touch.

He sealed his lips on mine. 

Wish I could deny him, but all i want is HIM. I know its wrong but I couldn't help it anymore.

I want HIM.

Because...
He had already CAPTIVATED me, before i FELL....

title: Curing Kyle Magnusson ✓
description:
When her ex-friend-turned-boyfriend reappears in her life, Anna must put her hurt and resentment aside to help him survive his withdrawal before he relapses, or worse, dies in the process.

Two years ago, Anna's boyfriend disappeared, leaving Anna hurt and abandoned in a new city to rebuild her life. Until he appears at her doorstep, begging for something to eat and a place to sleep. Bitter and determined not to let him hurt her again, Anna agrees. As she witnesses the slow deterioration of his physical and mental health, however, and with flashes of their past together haunting every waking moment, her resolves begin to weaken. Can Anna save Kyle from his self-destructive behaviors or will she lose him once again? This time, forever.

| Featured Wattpad Editor's Pick | shortlist ONC 2019 |

Warning: The story contains mature language, mentions of suicide, self-harm, mental health issues, child abuse, and substance abuse.

Cover designed by Holly Thurston

authorBio:
- Wattpad Creator (2022-2024)
- Wattpad Star(2020-2024),
- Paid Author (since 2020),
- Eight times Featured Author,
- Former senior Engagement Ambassador of 4 years,
- Wattys Bootcamp Mentor 2022,
- Writer of true stories.

I write mental-health-themed YA-NA romance stories without smut because there is more to love than just sex. My stories will bring tears to your eyes and cause you to smile through them. I will wrap darkness and pain up in humor, sprinkle a dash of romance, add a pinch of sweetness, and present them to you on a silver platter.

My stories are inspired by real people facing real monsters. I'm a sucker for flawed good guys, redeemable bad guys, and hurt people who don't hurt other people.

I believe that real is beautiful. Real people: the victim, the survivor, the fighter, the lover, the broken, the healing, the used, the abused, the flawed. Sounds like you or someone you know? Exactly my point. I will give you reality. I will make you face the facts and present to you a happy ending that will give you hope that there is one just around the corner for you too.

I am, therefore, a narrator, an observer, a storyteller. The story might be his, hers, yours, or even mine. But the story is always real.

Please do not:
- steal my stories,
- translate my stories,
- put my stories on Goodreads,
- post story links on my conversation board,
- leave hate comments. You don't like something, don't read it. Simple.
For writing tips and advice: https://www.wattpad.com/803104607-knowing-xavier-%E2%9C%93-writing-advice-from-daisy

Every read, vote, comment, follow matters to me. Your support matters. You matter. <3

title: Since Summers
description:
The People Choice Awards 2019 Winner for Best Diverse Books

Never had Autumn thought that she would break up with her boyfriend, Tyler, until the day she met Frazier Ronan, the one person who turned her life upside down, created chaos, and made her defy all her principles. 


                                                                      *****

For someone rude and cunning, it surprised me how he could be soft when it came to kissing. He placed soft kisses at the corners of my lips and held my face in his warm hands as his fingers tangled in the hair above my ears, tugging my ponytail and messing with my hair. His brown eyes filled my vision, hard and intense, a direct contradiction to his hot, sensual mouth. The tip of his tongue touched the seam of my lips, and my breath caught in my throat. I could feel a jolt clear in the soles of my feet, a warm tingling that curled my toes and settled in the pit of my stomach. The kiss was tender, almost sweet, and I fought to keep my eyes open and pressed my lips tight. I fought to remind myself that the lips brushing mine, as if he were my lover, belonged to an egomaniac asshole who told lies and swore to make my life miserable. When your bully becomes your knight in shining armor, what would you do?

title: After the Fall
description:
Connor and Vince fight their forbidden attraction as they attempt to rescue themselves and fellow residents of the underground Refuge facility from a toxic breach.

Connor Nichols spends his days alongside several young cadets training to become a future peacekeeper of the underground Refuge facility, but his nights are spent dreaming of his forbidden romantic past with best friend Vince Moore.

Risking his quality reputation among Dr. Randolph and the leaders, he pursues a secret relationship with Vince until a sudden toxic breach threatens to poison the occupants of the facility and places Vince in immediate danger. 

To give him and Vince a fighting chance at a solid future together, Connor puts his life and love on the line to expose the truth about the toxins, the leaders, and the history of the Refuge.

While Amelia Smith has always aimed for perfection and claims to have no time for guys, Liam Black is easy-going and enjoying the most of of his college life with his girlfriend who happens to be Amelia's number one rival.

What happens when they get paired together for their university project?

title: Captive in Plain Sight
description:
Mila is the obsession of a dangerous man with a grudge. After a traumatic incident, she's started over in Seattle with a new job and her first serious relationship. But everything is poised to crumble when she meets Alec Laurent, a controlling psychopath set to push her limits. As she tries to keep her loved ones from danger and stay a step ahead of her captor, she realizes there's more to their relationship than he's letting on. The key to her freedom is finding out exactly what it is.

#1 Mystery/Thriller
Featured as a 💎 Mystery Gem by Wattpad Outreach

                                                          *****

Her heart skipped a beat when she saw it. High-definition surveillance footage played on the television.

Her mother talking on the phone in the grocery checkout.

Her brother playing video games with friends.

Her best friend driving her car.

Her boyfriend commuting on the bus to work.

Her dad playing basketball at the gym.

She dropped the vase, shattering what was left,  putting her hand to her mouth in horror.

"Sit down, Ms. Black." he said. "We have a lot to cover."

title: Promises Promises
description:
For a place called Fairhaven, Davina Harlow's hometown is a haven for nothing but corruption. 

No matter how pretty things look from the outside, deception rots at the core. It waits around every corner, touches everything she loves, and the presence of a small criminal organization plants seeds of doubt where she wishes only happiness could grow.

All she's ever dreamed of is the carefree life she was promised, to keep her family close by and live happily ever after with the guy she's had her eye on for as long as she can remember. But when something sinister lies behind every smile and no one's who they say they are, that dream has never felt so out of reach. 

Even as she tries to separate herself from the darkness of her once beloved hometown, Davina only finds herself more immersed in the lies and greed that have destroyed it. And with love and loyalty being tested at every turn, she's left trying to figure out what's real amidst smoky truths and scattered feelings. All while trying to stay alive.

(This story is being written for the eight-chapter challenge, which means the first ten or so chapters will be delivered promptly, but updates are likely to slow down after that. I will finish though! Promise.)

title: Children of the Archangels
description:
Nineteen-year-old Luke Sanchez was doing well at college until demons showed up at his campus and possessed his girlfriend. Luckily he solved that problem with a special ability only he possessed: to summon fire from the palm of his hand. The gift was granted to him by the archangel Uriel, one of the seven archangels in Christianity who adopt mentally stagnated children and imbue them with special powers. 

However, Luke needed to know more about his heritage, so when the opportunity arrived to study at an academy for his kind up in the Rocky Mountains, he took it, leaving his friends, school, family, and the love of his life behind. He learns that mentally distracted children can only unlock the power within them at the cost of their innocence. And when he gets chosen by the school to carry out a dangerous mission to the Garden of Eden to help "save" a mentally lost child, he encounters monstrous creatures, demons, turned angels, and a betrayal that puts his new school's safety in jeopardy.

***

After years of mourning the death of her true love, Vivienne is finally trying to move on - until mysterious phone calls and anonymous gifts start to arrive. title: Writing's Second Taste
description:
"We write to taste life twice, in the moment and in retrospect." -Anaïs Nin

You know that feeling when you open a book and you read the story written in it? It feels like you've been transported to another world, a place so wonderful and liberating. Well, it's my job to make you experience that to the expense of my own life tales. 

Those jokes that you were laughing about as you read them? He whispered those to me in the middle of class. That bashful expression that the main character had? It was a reflection of what he looked like when he asked me out. That somewhat cheesy narration of what their kiss felt like? It was the same way I felt when he first pressed his lips against mine.

If only I can do it again. If only I can fall in love with writing again. If only I can fall in love again.

[This is a spin-off of Hollywood's Princess. You do not read that story to understand this]

title: Earth, After ✔️
description:
Some fates are worse than death--survival is one of them. 

In the two hundred years since humanity left the Earth's surface to live in the sky, life on the ground faded to a myth, a tragic memory from which they severed themselves to survive. They floated above continents turned to sand and lands swallowed by the seas, watched storm after storm rage against their cities and their monuments until they broke apart the last vestiges of civilization in penance for generations of human greed. 

As a lightning harvester charged with flying her ship into these storms for energy, Raina has seen more of the planet than most. She has spent her entire life soaring above its craters and scars, studying the gaping wounds of human devastation, as she honed her skills and became the youngest captain in storm-chaser history. 

Her ship has flown for generations. Her skills are unparalleled. 

But none of that matters the day they go down.

~

title: You've Got A Way (Completed)
description:
'We always say what's gone is gone but it's not, Evan. Past is always present. It's present in my memories, in my scars, in my nightmares.' Ramona's voice croaked.

'You're right, Ramona. Past is and will always be there but it's our choice to look back at it.' Evan's fingers were now drawing slow circles on her arm.

'Past doesn't come back to haunt us, Ramona. We go back to the past, it drags us back to it so that we can haunt ourselves.' Evan said.

--

Evan had experienced the glory of love and the sadness too. He was left scarred by the loss of the love of his life. Her parting gift to him - their newborn child Julius, the only string that connected him to life - that kept him alive. 

He had experienced his heart transforming to a piece of stone at the grave of his wife when he had seen the last drop of his warm tear falling down and disappearing into the ground beneath which she laid. 

Wanting to concentrate solely on his baby child and to run away from his lost love's memories Evan moved into a small town of Vermont. Things were about to change for him when Ramona, the slightly crazy and extremely infuriating, alcoholic woman next door, might be the only one to make that stone melting. And he, didn't see it coming...

But Ramona had her walls up too, to guard her own broken heart which was reminded constantly of the darkness inside it by Evan's uncontrollable anger issues. 

How would they ever draw a future together when Evan only saw Ramona as a threat to his child and Ramona compared Evan to her past?

Next to them they still didn't know that the evil crept in the shadows, waiting for the right moment to pounce with a purpose so vile. And they, didn't see it coming...

***

Book 2 of You're Still The One. (YSTO Book2, spin off.)
It's a stand alone book.

title: The Insanity of a Wallflower
description:
I draw the people I hate at school. I hear the gossip, I hear the lies but I draw what my own eyes see. And I see the embarrassing, devastating, beautiful secrets my peers all try to hide. I had quite the collection of illusions; a sketchbook full of their buried sins... Until the most popular boy, and my most hated, happens upon my misplaced book of secrets.
*****

Alys is a wallflower. She is faceless, voiceless... and she is free. 

Being nothing more than an ever-shifting shadow is an art she mastered long ago. It's one that allows her to sketch the oblivious people around; sculpting their true forms without ever being seen. The art within her pages is extraordinary, unworldly; Alys' hands having an ability to create perfect renditions of the world. HER version of the world. But Alys' fingers tighten upon each pencil; the dark remnants of her past still haunting her. Her ability remains hidden behind a quiet wallflower's eyes. 

No one must see, no one must know.

For her past is all she knows. 

Yet there's one she despises most of all; a predator hidden amongst a flock of sheep. Hayden; the boy loved and adored by those around him. Hayden; the monster who secretly hated them all.

She never wanted to meet him. She never wanted to have to interact with ANY of them, but that all changed when her friend was accused of a crime she did not commit in a flurry of senior pranks gone wrong.

In the chaos Alys faces afterwards, she accidentally leaves her condemning book behind. Who else would find it but Mr. popular; the devil who fakes it all? 

Hayden has found the most beautiful puppet, a girl who can see anyone for what they truly are- even him. And with art so beautiful, so breathtaking... so dangerous, he entices Alys with a proposition she can't refuse. She would be his puppet, to do as he bid, and he would help her get her retribution; her revenge. 

And in what better form than a mural at graduation. One that might not be as it seemed.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:

title: Shouldn't Have Gone - BOOK III
description:
Two brothers fighting for love. 
One fights for the love he already lost.
The other, unaware of the threat, can't do anything but depend on what is present.

Angel Mohr is in hot waters once more. Just when she has found it in her to move on from her ill-fated college romance and finds herself madly in love with Hunter Stone, her old flame returns, ruining the perfect world she had rebuilt.

A brand-new Damien Etheridge is back, and he wants what he has left behind. He wouldn't stop at anything to get her little angel back-even if he has to ruin his half-brother in the process.

Meanwhile, an oblivious Hunter Stone is set to face the skeletons in his closet, skeletons he had forgotten a long, long time ago... dirt and grime from his past that will prove to be his doom.

The things Angel, Damien, and Hunter had tried to sweep under the rug threatens to reveal themselves, unraveling secrets after secrets and lies after lies as the great duel for love comes to a close.

Will this be the end to Hunter's plans of eternity with Angel? Will Damien ever find his way back to Angel's heart? Stuck between a rock and a hard place, Angel is forced to set matters straight. Who will she choose? The one great love she had lost or the love that carried her through her darkest days?

Witness the culmination to a billionaire romance story that has spanned three books in this exciting and intriguing final installation to the Shouldn't Have Series.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Other than reading and writing stories, Mara Lynne loves to daydream . Sometimes she would have a hard time falling asleep because of the many stories going on around her head. Unusual characters and twisted plots keep her company each night, and would only leave her once she had breathe life to them.

She discovered the passion for writing when she was eleven years old--the time when she met  the well-loved red-haired Anne Shirley. She fell in love with the kindred spirit Anne because she sees herself in her. There was a time when she even thought she was Anne of Green Gables! Seriously! It was like a mild case of identification, a defense mechanism for wanting to be somebody you adore or worship but whom you can never be.

After Anne Shirley, she fell in love with all of Jane Austen heroines, with Anne Elliot as her most loved. She just loved everyone whose name is Anne!!

When she is not writing, Mara Lynne works as a full time registered nurse in England. She hailed from a city in the southern part of the Philippines.

title: Thorns of Angels
description:
UNEDITED.

It took Claire Atwood four years to go back home. But not for the purpose of visiting the only family she had left. She was on the run. Not only from her past, but also from her future. 

At nine years old, Claire found out that her perfect family was only an act. Pile of lies after lies filled up her reality of who to trust and love until that void blinded and consumed her. Running was once an option until she met David Morison, a police officer who was tenacious and wouldn't give up. Claire started to see more of what was truly wrong. To get her life back, she had to face all of her demons. Both past and present.

title: Broken Sweet Dreamers
description:
After the devastating revelation that Grey's father murdered Hazel's father early in her life, she and Grey came to the mutual decision that there was no relationship left to be had. 

Hazel stops dream traveling, subsequently gaining her voice back. She goes through college, earns her degree, lands a job at Columbia University, and lives with close friend Mindy and their college roommate Petra. 

Hazel is happier than ever before, with the one caveat: having a hole in her chest only Grey could fix-and would never be able to.

That is, until one night when they enter dream-spheres again for the first time in a long time. 

Will a reconciliation occur, or will they understand just why they should never be together?

When Beth George runs into an ex-boyfriend who came out to her in high school, she feels like her life has rewound almost ten years. Little does she know that her new life is about to begin...

He helps Beth score a job as an online editor at Verve FM, the dance music station of choice for gay men across the UK. What Beth also doesn't know is that it might just be the perfect place to meet her dream man.

title: ALPHA: Heir Of The Four
description:
When Caleb--heir of the four and alpha of his pack--attends a party celebrating his twin deltas' birthday, he doesn't anticipate finding Luna's greatest gift: his mate, Ava-Rain. Immediately consumed with curiosity and undeniable interest, he manages to make his presence known to her, but their introduction is kept brief. To reject one's mate is to reject Luna herself, and that is exactly what Caleb intends to do. Not because he wants to, but because he sees no other choice.

But will he be able to stay away in order to ensure both Ava-Rain's and his pack's safety, or will their unbreakable connection lure him back and add even more trouble into the mix?

"Hadley, open this door." Parker orders.

title: Lovers in October
description:
Broadshaire School of Arts; the dream of every artist, dancer and musician. When Mary-Kate Thompson gets accepted for a transfer after struggling all year with a loss of a family member, she gladly leaves her life in Australia behind and travels across the world to live her dream in America and become one of the best ballerinas the world has ever seen, starting anew. She expects the competition, the countless hours of work, the effort. But what she didn't expect was to find a tattooed musician with the same birthday as her, who carries the name Antonio Balma with pride.

Women and men both fall at his feet, his charisma and angelic face a thing to remember. Nobody ever stands a chance to resist. And for better or worse, Mary-Kate never stood a chance either.







BOOK TWO OF THE "LOVER" SERIES | Can be read as a standalone book

title: The Roommate Switch
description:
Mia is finally moving in on campus to go to university in New York. She hates change but she's finally ready for a big one. One of the biggest reasons why she is excited to move is because she wants to make new friends, and the university said her roommate was a girl so she was happy to finally have some friends. When she got there, it wasn't the roommate it was supposed to be...

Noah has been staying on campus in his dorm since his first semester at this university. He always loved being alone and having his dorm, because he could do whatever he wanted. Until one day he comes back from hanging out with his friends and sees a girl in his room, and it looks like she's moving in...

title: Finding Carla
description:
She was living an ordinary life until he came into her life....

The past that she has always known may not be what she thought all along....

Secrets will be revealed....

Fall in love with Carla and Santi in this heartwarming story with a twist of humor and surprises about finding oneself and finding love in the process....

A story about love, friendship and family....


Excerpt:

"So, are you saying that I look gorgeous like my mom?" I teased her. She blushed at my question.

"Admit it. You found me sexy the first time you saw me. I remembered you checking me out." I continued teasing her. She turned crimson red with my remark.

"Of course not! You're so full of yourself! You arrogant prick!" She was about to punch me again, but I caught her hand and held it. I love the feel of her hand against mine. I squeezed it gently. I felt her suddenly tense up. She removed her hand from my grip and I hesitantly let it go. I could tell she felt awkward, but it felt natural to me. Like her hand was meant to be molded next to mine....

title: Joan the Made (Throwbacks Series, Book 1)
description:
Season 1 of The Throwbacks

On her eighteenth birthday, Joan discovers that she is cloned from the famous Joan of Arc. But being cloned in America comes at a steep price. Segregated and oppressed, clones are forced to act as docile servants to the rest of the Evolved population. Follow Joan as she decides whether to run from her Cloned fate and spend the rest of her life in hiding, or to join a Throwback rebellion populated by clones of the greatest leaders in history. Her decision will lead her down a path of intense danger, new friendships, and epic love.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: I live for really great fudge, rollercoasters, and exploring new worlds via fiction. I live in San Diego, CA with my kids and husband, where I eagerly wait for a portal to open up in my bedroom that leads me to a place with unicorns. Or really hot aliens. Or technology so advanced it feels like magic. In the meantime, I write young adult science fiction and fantasy novels to pass the time until I'm called upon to save the world.

title: Clay's Hope
description:
Clay is a man of few human talents. As a wolf, he hunts well and can fight off a grizzly twice his size, but has no aspirations. The idea of a Mate isn't something he has ever seriously entertained. Dreamed about, maybe, but he knows the chances are nearly non-existent. 

Then he meets Gabby, a human girl. She hates him at first sight, yet he can't let her go. Who he was is no longer important. Now, who he needs to become to win her over is the only thing that matters. 

Note: This is the companion book to Hope(less), book 1 of the Judgement of the Six Series.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
About me?  Well, I like to write the kind of stuff I'd like to read.  Whether adult or YA, I stick mostly to paranormal/fantasy themes.  Life's real enough, right?

If you like Hope(less), Clay's Hope, and Moved, PLEASE tell your friends.  It's the biggest thanks you can give me.  If you're interested in the rest of the books, they can be found on most major retailer sites.

And for those who like 3rd person bios...

Ms. Haag is the author of nineteen books full of passion, twists, and excitement. She writes adult paranormal/fantasy/science-fiction romance under her pen name MJ Haag. Her award-winning Beastly Tales trilogy starts with Depravity (June 2015), followed by Deceit and Devastation. She also writes young adult paranormal/fantasy/science-fiction romance under another pen name, Melissa Haag, and is best known for her Judgment of Six series and the companion books.

Whether she's writing about Werewolves, retelling fairy tales, or running into aliens, each story features thoughtful, protective alpha males and strong women who never look to a man to get things done.

title: Hunter
description:
Sequel to Hunted
............
Alexander Black, or at least that's what the tombstone said, woke up in a coffin and dug himself out of his grave. He has no idea who he is or how he died and he doesn't wish to know. A voice in his head tries to convince him that he isn't human. That he has to go out and find what it calls his 'mate' but he doesn't want to. It's been two years and he's started a new life in Rosemore, Minnesota. He has a job, a new name, a family of sorts, a house and has started to contemplate giving his housemate Yua a chance even though part of him doesn't want to. That is until a man comes into the diner claiming to know him. Alistair Black looks exactly like Xander, so he doesn't question it when he says he's his father and decides to go with him. 

An attack on Alistair's home leads to him being kidnapped by a girl on literal fire and her five annoying friends. Xerxes knows who they are and ruins every attempt Xander makes to escape. Everything they tell him contradicts everything his father did. He doesn't want to admit they may be right. Because then he'd have to admit that maybe in this story he's the villain.

title: Furnace (Hunter-Killer #1)
description:
Life on Rychter would be hard enough for most people - a hothouse of scorching deserts, violent dust storms and volcanic eruptions, it is a place that breeds survivors. But the biggest danger for the humans unfortunate enough to live there are the planet's original owners. For decades Rychter's colonists have lived in state of perpetual war.

For Ryke Vannigan, a teenager with a score to settle, that war is his chance at payback. When he and his classmates are conscripted into Rychter's military forces, he joins the elite ranks of the Hunter-Killer Corps. 

Piloting a fifteen ton war machine and harbouring a thirst for revenge, Ryke is about to write his own bloody chapter in Rychter's history, and change the war forever.

IMAGINARIA AWARDS WINNER: SCI FI CATEGORY
IMAGINARIA MINI-CATEGORY WINNER: BEST BATTLE

title: The Blood of Rubies
description:
It all begins when a silver dagger goes missing.

For her entire life, a human named Cora Gabris has known that lycans were searching for her, as she was born as a Ruby -- a human that, when turned into a lycan, will become much stronger than any of the others.

If she were to turn into a lycan, the powers she could harness are immeasurable. And her mate would inherit them as well. It's for that very reason that she has remained hidden all of her life, as a dangerous lycan has been searching for her since she went missing. 

When the life of her last family member is threatened, Cora chooses to meet the Alpha of  Reiger Pack, hoping to avoid the lycan that hunts for her. 

She is utterly unprepared to face the different culture, to sift through the greed of those who crave her power. She must face a language barrier and prove she is more than just a Ruby. She is Cora Gabris, and once among them, she has every intention to make a name for herself among creatures that value in perseverance above all. 

Scars will be made, and alliances will either save or destroy her. 

It will be a worthy sacrifice in her eyes as long as her brother is safe, and that she doesn't fall into the wrong hands before she is able to fully turn into one of them...


...

Welcome to a world where witches aid humanity, and the Seers of lycans are watching. Waiting. Determined to strike back. 

Explore the danger where the gods push their final pieces into place before watching it unfold.

And discover a story about comradery, betrayal, love, heartache, loss, and growth. 


...

title: Human Code
description:
Javier Morales is an android who only wished to be accepted in death as he was in life, but when rogue androids kidnap his sister and destroy the city, he must put himself last to save what matters most. 
  
                                                               ***
Javier Morales died in an accident on July 3rd, 2016. Unable to accept his death, his parents request Bionics Pharmaceuticals to recreate him -- a premium android to be their son.  He is created as close to the person he is supposed to be, but reality sets in. And now, to his family, he's a memory. And to the rest world, he shouldn't exist. For Javi, it was life. And he came to terms with his fate. Until rogue androids start attacking other androids and civilians. And kidnap his kid sister. In order to save her and everyone else, he has to dig into his core to regain control of his mind and body. But does he have enough heart to regain his soul?

description:

Parker Jennings moved to Los Angeles with only one goal: fulfilling his dream of becoming a director.  When he finds his junior year of college unexpectedly derailed, Parker takes an internship at a talent agency, hoping to get his foot in the door with the industry's elite. It isn't until he meets Sophie Winters, once the biggest up-and-coming star in Hollywood, that he realizes how little he knows about the world he's trying to enter. The two need each other more than they know, but is what they have real, or an illusion created by the city of make believe?

title: Last Night: Taking Chances
description:
Everyone's had a crush. It's a secret, painful, embarrassing, all consuming and more often than not, it's unrequited. What would happen if you took a chance and told your crush how you felt? If you had nothing to lose...


                                                                     ••••••••••

"Yes Ally?" she heard him husk in her ear suddenly.

She stiffened before forcing herself to relax and turn to face her best friend.

"I didn't call you over here," she told him calmly.

"I know but you were staring so hard I figured you needed something," he told her with his infuriating smirk.

She smiled sweetly in return, "Now, what could I possibly want from you?"

His eyes roamed over her face for a minute before his arm shot out and wrapped around her waist. She let out a surprised gasp as she suddenly found herself pressed up against him. She shivered involuntarily as she felt his breath fan her face and stiffened again as she realized how close his face was to her own.

                                                                     ••••••••

A story about a group of friends going after the boys they've been secretly in love with for all of high school. It's the end of year senior party and it's now or never. They might not get the guy but they'll still have each other in the end.

title: Seven Weeks to Forever (Love / Romance)
description:
Love? No thanks. Cassidy Jordan won't open her heart to anyone after a devastating romance caused her death the first time she turned eighteen. As a second-timer returned from the afterlife, all that stands between her and eternity is finding some guy named Riley Davis and helping him get his life on track. But no one told her helping Riley would mean dating him.

When Cassidy realizes she's falling for Riley, she's faced with a choice: give him the life he's meant for and leave this life when it's time, or give up eternity for the true love she's never had, knowing Riley will die the same way she did in her first life and that her entire existence could end at any time.

From Chapter Nine:

It's as though I'm under a spell as I put one foot in front of the other, feeling Riley's hand pressed against the small of my back. My body is going crazy with the tingling I feel. I must stumble, because he steadies me and we stop a few feet away from my front door. I find myself moving even closer to him, and for a moment, I'm not Cassidy. There's something familiar in the energy I feel. Riley's face blurs in front of me, and then there's the outline of a face I used to know well.

The outline I can see looks like David. The last time I stood in a driveway about to kiss someone, it was him. I want to say his name, but I can't move my lips. Then my vision clears and it's Riley in front of me again, his head bending down and his eyes holding mine. The energy pull between us is magnetic, and I hold my breath when his fingertips come up to my chin.

This can't happen. I try to tell myself that, but the rest of me isn't listening. My eyes close and every nerve in my body seems to hum as I wait for what's coming.

Teen Romance / Supernatural Romance / Paranormal Romance / Young Adult Romance
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Gregory Girls Gone Wild |GirlxGirl|
description:
The water supply at Gregory College is contaminated, possibly fatal, and definitely unfit for drinking. It's the worst crisis Gregory College has ever had to deal with in years. 

Twenty year old Rainey Dumar is in charge of delivering free water bottles to her fellow students. She likes the job, but it is what it is: a way to get cash and support her struggling family. 

Things take a sharp turn when a new employee joins the team: Danika Reddy, a sophomore who is sweet, gorgeous, and maybe not the smartest person around. The two girls are polar opposites: hot and cold, gay and straight, and lo and behold violent sparks fly in the workplace, unlike anything Rainey's ever felt before. 

To make matters worse, Rainey finds herself entangled in a sinister spirit group on campus. They like to steal cars, leave mysterious notes, and threaten innocent lives. Despite attempts to resist all outside help, it's Danika who comes to her rescue. Danika, who is nothing like she seems, is fiercely protective of her uptight boss, danger be damned. 

Drowning in trouble, Rainey can't tell which is worse: being targeted by a criminal college cult or falling for a straight girl. 

Welcome to Gregory College.

title: For The Love Of The Game
description:
II FEATURED II 
"What if? Just for tonight, we gave in?"
"I'm going to make sure you can never get me out of your mind after tonight."
I felt her back arch as she shivered at my words. 
We shall see if after tonight she still only wants one night, I smirked against her skin. 
                                                                                               ---.---
Riley Diaz is a hardworking young woman who became responsible for caring for her two younger brothers when her parents tragically got deported. After a tiring day at work, she runs into her handsome new neighbor Noah, who is looking to make a fresh start. When Riley kindly offers to help him finish moving in, neither of them expected that she would end up breaking a 15k computer. Knowing that she can't afford to pay him back she decides to strike a deal with her good looking neighbor. The deal will make her dive into a world of games that she had long forgotten.

title: Road To Recovery (A "Living With The Choices We Make" Sequel) ✔️
description:
THIS IS THE SEQUEL OF "LIVING WITH THE CHOICES WE MAKE". THE BLURB BELOW CONTAINS SPOILERS AND I RECOMMEND THAT YOU READ THE BOOKS IN SEQUENCE.
    
The enemy is always just around the corner...
    
 After her release from jail, Rena is trying to piece her life back together. Just when things seem to be getting better, old wounds are torn open by none other than Brent's father -- Ryan Parks. He's not only set on putting her behind bars for killing his beloved son but also attempts to take the one thing away from her that has been keeping her sane. 
    
 Confronted with the nightmares of her past, Rena's battle starts all over again. Yet, on the other side of the country, another woman is fighting her own wars. On the surface, Charlotte Parks is just one of Ryan's many minions but deep down, she holds a secret that could be the key to Rena's redemption. 
    
When their two worlds collide in the fight for the one thing they want the most, they have to make a choice; and that choice will alter their lives forever.

    This story contains topics about child abuse and domestic violence as well as important social issues such as discrimination, dangers of alcohol, drug abuse and date rape. title: Words of Power (Alice Gray Book 3)
description:
If you like mysteries that span centuries and magical creatures that hide in the dark corners of the world, then you've come to the right place!

Words of Power is the third book in the Alice Gray series so don't forget to check out the first two books in order!

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Follow Alice Gray, Pendle Witch descendant and hybrid pack member, to the historical city of York, where she faces the biggest challenge of her life - her very own witch trial.

Corruption and greed infest the justice system and riddle her personal life, making Alice doubt those she holds dearest. Humans, vampires and shifters all want a piece of her, and they're not alone. York Minster is not the place to be if gargoyles are after you, but this time there are worse creatures lurking in the shadows than Alice's old stone friends.

The first Alice Gray escaped her 1612 trial with the help of court clerk and friendly vampire Thomas Potts. But when her turncoat vampire lover shows his true self, our Alice is left out in the cold. Will she find the words to trigger her magic and make history repeat itself?

Well, that all depends on the blood...

Romance, history, magical worlds - erm, yes please!

title: Colors of Us
description:
After months of therapy, Garrett Delko is still struggling to cope with his brother's suicide. The only time he finds peace is on the pitching mound and with a mysterious girl he's been obsessed with since the first week of college. One night, he sees her jumping off a bridge and it leads to an unexpected connection neither can deny. Garrett resolves to stay away, but as their paths intersect, he wonders if she's the answer he's looking for. 

Arianne Zhang is no one's magic remedy. She has her own troubles and doesn't need an adorable baseball player messing up her hard-earned anonymity. However, as they confide in each other, she begins falling for him. Then Arianne's secrets are exposed, and both must face tough choices. Can they find the strength to let go of their insecurities to help each other? Or will the colors of their past blind them to the truth?

title: Echoes - Beyond Threads Of Time
description:
~ A tale beyond threads of time ~

A voice echoes in her dreams, telling her to visit an unknown place, because it's time. Will a companion, who hears similar echoes in his dreams, make the expedition better than the destination?

_______

Unfolding in two famous royal cities of India, this saga of dreams, destiny and reincarnation will take you on a journey of two soulmates, that battle mysteries, betrayals and vengeance, to rekindle a forgotten historic romance. 

The timeline alternates between 2021 and 1921, showing glimpses of contemporary India as well as British India and its Princely States.

_______

Sanjana is the only living heir of a wealthy business family, based in New Delhi, India. However, she is tired of visiting several therapists, who cannot seem to understand how stubborn and convincing the echoes in her dreams are. The echoes that have been telling her to go somewhere since she turned 18. The therapists offer her no solution, except the useless sleeping pills that aren't even effective anymore. When she suddenly finds a stranger with a similar predicament, will she embark on an expedition with him to find answers? Where will this journey take her?

________

Brandon is the co-founder of a gaming start-up, based in Silicon valley, CA, USA. With his excellent design skills and his partner's business strategies, he became a successful billionaire at a very young age. Life is perfect for him, except for the nagging echoes that disturb him every night in his dreams. When an opportunity to explore a new country comes up, in the form of finding out where his dreams intend to take him, he decides to seize it. Will this be just another holiday for him or will this trip change his life forever?

_______

Written as an entry for Indian Open Novella Contest ONC 2021, Prompt #2

_______

All rights reserved
© Paramagnetic, 2021

title: Spells on Shelves
description:
Jade is on the run. To escape her old coven, she pretends to be normal. Just some run-off-the-mill witch. Certainly not someone powerful and especially not a life weaver. 
Taking on the position of the town witch in a seemingly idyllic, quiet, and desolate town seemed like the perfect plan to lay low for a while until she meets Paxton--shifter, Supernatural Security Division agent, and worst of all: witch hunter. 
When a dark ritual is performed just outside of town, all signs point to the works of a powerful witch. The only problem: Jade is the only witch. Now she has to work with Paxton to find the real culprit before her identity is exposed. 
The longer she stays, the harder it gets to leave. As the investigation unfolds, it becomes apparent that a high politician is not only behind the attacks, but after something specific. The town guards its own secret, one that forces Jade to compromise her carefully crafted identity or risk the safety of her new home. 
When her past and present collide, Jade needs to finally face those who have been after her powers all this time without losing everything she's built in her new home. 

***

title: Someone To Watch Over Me - Book 1
description:
For as long as Cat Fischer could remember it was Liam and Cat, Cat and Liam. So in love since High School, neither of them dreamed of attending different universities. Now reaching graduation Cat discovers she's pregnant, and Liam chooses to have nothing to do with her or the baby. 

As a favor to a friend Alex Bragin gives Cat a place to stay for the night. However, as he learns more about her situation he wishes to offer her so much more. 

Cat is heartbroken. She's grateful for Alex and his offer but through a misunderstanding, she believes him to be in love with her best friend, William. 

Will Liam make amends? Will Cat discover the truth? Will Alex make his intentions clear? To find out you must read.

 Someone to Watch Over Me

authorBio:
Sometimes you give up, and sometimes life gives you a second chance. Wattpad gave me that chance. A chance to become the writer I was destined to be. I thought my writing days over but I was happy to discover I've only just begun.

Hi! I'm Ruechari. Many call me Rue. I am a lover of love. I am a true romantic in every sense of the word. I am a world watcher and love the nuances of conversation.

People wonder how I plan out my stories and tend not to believe I am a total Pantser. I do not outline my stories. I get inspired by life and go for it. Nothing cures reader's block faster than having to think yourself out of the box you've painted yourself into with words. Creativity is needed to save the day.

SO, if you are a fan of Love, Life, Humor, and Happy Endings. I am the writer for you. Browse, enjoy, have fun, and don't forget to vote and comment. I love hearing from my readers.

Thank you for taking this unexpected journey with me! Hope to see you again here soon.

- Ruechari

title: About You
description:
Starting University is nerve racking. 
When Tara leaves home for the first time to move into the dorms at university, she's excited to start this new chapter in her life. Her new roommate is cool and soon she has a new tribe of friends to hang with. 
What she doesn't anticipate is her roommate's playboy brother to always be hanging around and popping up when he shouldn't be. But as Tara goes through first time life experiences, including heartbreak, she realizes that having him around might not be so bad after all. No matter how hard she tries, their paths keep crossing, and pretty soon, it gets hard not to fall for him. 
Before she knows it, she becomes a part of a family and things are comfortable. But when his family member is in a terrible accident, she learns more about grief and loss than she knew possible. This coming of age novel deals with love, loss and all matters of the heart.

title: New Planet
description:
What would it take to stop humanity from repeating its mistakes? Would it be worth losing what makes us human?
In the far off future, humanity has sequestered itself to twelve cities. The Outlands are deemed far too dangerous to inhabit. 
When Obsidian is unexpectedly thrust into the Outlands, he must not only survive but uncover hard truths about the world he came from.
Meanwhile, Everly has no memory of where she came from. Drawn together, Obsidian finds her in the Outlands, he vows to keep her safe. As the mysteries of her past begin to unravel, shame keeps Everly distant. 
Together they'll have to brave the wilds of the Outlands to get back to a city hiding a sinister secret.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I enjoy reading mostly fantasy romance, whether mild or spicy, and spend my free time writing it as well.
I plan on trying to do at least weekly chapter drops.
I have three novels I'm currently working on. That's right! Currently. . . as in I can't help but bounce back and forth. I know focusing on one would get the story out faster but it's the only way I know how to do things.
The first novel is loosely titled "Red". It's a first-person narrative about a girl who suffers tragic loses and discovers she's a werewolf while navigating grief, love and prophecy. It's a bit on the mature side.
"New Planet," that is more dystopian romance.
And "The Wishing Games," this one is light dystopian and very early stages.
I have a few other story ideas I'm milling around that I'll hopefully get around to writing this year, so be on the lookout.
I am not great with the whole "read for read" scene.  I enjoy happily stumbling into a great read. That being said, I don't mind read requests but I might not read it if it's not the genre I prefer. I don't read fanfiction at all.
I am open to criticism, however I'm not looking to undo main themes, etc. I have posted to sites in the past where people have been a little hypercritical. I'm not looking to be the next Neil Gaiman or Sarah J Maas. I'm not even looking to be the next Stephanie Meyer. I'm just looking to write what I love and share it.
XOXO JG 11/30/24

title: All That and a Bag of Chips
description:
Collin makes a bet with his buddy that he can land a date with the hot new barista across the street, but things get complicated when he actually starts falling for her.

***
Collin, a 21-year-old trans guy, is heartbroken after catching his girlfriend kissing another woman and getting dumped. But it's not long before his sights shift elsewhere with a daring bet propositioned by his co-worker-that he can't nab a date with Heather, the hot new barista who just started working across the street from his job. Little does Collin know that his roomie, Sam, does yoga with Heather and is game to play wingman, making this welcome distraction a little too easy. But what began as a bet starts to feel real. As Collin and Heather's affection for each other grows and the toxic exes swerve in and out of their lives, what will happen when the truth comes out? Can their love story handle it?

title: The Lost Daughter
description:
Willa has spent her whole life feeling like she was missing something, that something was wrong. A piece of her that should be there and wasn't. Like missing a limb. 

As it turns out, she should have listened to her instincts. 

When she finds out she was kidnapped from the rest of her family, including her twin brother, when she was two years old by her mother she's devastated at losing all that time together. 

But when she finds out just how different a life they lived? Willa's not sure how to handle the change from living out of motel rooms to the power, wealth and status that comes from her new last name: King. 

Not to mention the enigmatic complication that comes in the form of the son of her father's business partner and brother's best friend, Jackson Knight.

title: Thirst For Love - Series 1 [R-18] | ✔
description:
I was enjoying my life in highschool when I met a guy who was super quiet and always snobbed at me. His arrogance and pride was very high but in that situation I couldn't understand why despite his rejection of me I was even more excited because for me he was still taking the time to reject and repeatedly snobbing me. The colder he treats me the more I like him.


When the time came when I prayed the most, I didn't know the word alone because ever since he made me feel loved, he never left my side. I fought the love between the two of us even though what forced us to separate was my own father who was against to our union.


I fought for our love but what I didn't know was that as I faced the heavy rain he was already sheltering in another umbrella, another umbrella that I knew from the very beginning would ruin the two of us.


After he left and let me drown in the heavy rain, he would suddenly come back to me as if nothing had happened, he suddenly come back to me to retract what he was telling his.


I'm not thirsty for love to hold on the thing that's killing me.

title: My Possessive Mafia
description:
Alexander Lucci, the powerful head of the Mafia, is used to getting whatever he desires. His fearsome reputation has always ensured his control over everything-until he meets Eleanor Montgomery. She's the one woman he can't have, yet craves more than anything. Eleanor, a fierce redhead, is unyielding, bold, and completely indifferent to Alexander's power, making her a unique challenge in his life.

In a room charged with tension, Eleanor locks eyes with Alexander, refusing to submit. Her father, Azazel, commands her to marry Alexander, fully expecting her to obey like everyone else. "You will marry Alexander," he insists, believing his authority is absolute.

But Eleanor isn't like anyone else. "What the fuck you gonna do if I don't?" she snaps, her defiance thickening the air. The others present know she is a force, a woman unafraid to stand up to even the most dangerous of men.

Azazel, confident in his control, smirks, thinking he has trapped her. "Then you'll leave me no choice. You have to leave."

Without hesitation, Eleanor replies, "With pleasure," before turning and walking away, leaving the room stunned. Her best friend Blake chases after her, while Alexander watches, entranced by her boldness. Eleanor's stubborn refusal to bend only deepens his desire for her, making her the one thing Alexander cannot control-and the one thing he wants most.

title: MELODY
description:
//If you're reading this anywhere that is not w a t t p a d, you're reading a work stolen from me and posted elsewhere.//

When Bryan Ito is pulled into helping the Events & Festivals Team on campus by his best friend, Adam, the last thing he expects is to meet with the lead guitarist of a quickly-rising-in-popularity band, MELODY. Despite Jackson Star's pretty smile and enchanting eyes and deep voice, his grade-A asshole-ish behaviour ruins any and all first impression of him to Bryan when they meet. While Bryan is determined to hate him, thanks to Adam's closeness with the band, they constantly find themselves bumping into each other more and more. And without wanting to, Bryan's hatred threatens to transform into something less spiteful the more he learns about Jackson. 

Enemies at first sight shifts to a tentative friendship. And once the sparkles of fame settle, maybe into something more.

[Cover made purely from CANVA]

title: At Vanessa's Wedding
description:
[GirlXGirl]
When Scarlet gets her heart broken by the only person she loved the most, she finds herself going back to the family she had left behind. An unexpected person follows her to her hometown and that's when all the drama begins.
A family that didn't even invite her to her only sister's wedding. Lies, secrets and a hell lot of drama, leaves Scarlet thinking if this is what she really needed.
Family, fear, love, friendship and drama is only to be expected at Vanessa's wedding. 
And guess what, You're invited.

title: How to Escape an Assassin
description:
When Tristan Fabiano, an antisocial, cold-blooded government assassin, takes a particular interest in his brother Felix's target, he will stop at nothing to protect her from his brother and their agency.

Tristan Fabiano is known as "Ghost" in the assassin world. A merciless killer, he is emotionless and detached from everything to the point that he moves like a ghost. But Milan Lee, a naïve, kind-hearted 22-year-old preschool teacher wakes a dormant part in the depths of his core. 

But old habits sure die hard, don't they? Tristan is unpredictable and distant; cold and heartless as he plays on the strings of Milan's heart.

*A slowburn action love-hate romantic drama*

title: Levi's Secret
description:
After all who says it's always the guy who has to do the chasing?

Levi Walters is an enigma. He's a kaleidoscope of emotions and mystery rolled into one. He's rude and arrogant, pushing people away and preferring to keep to himself. 
 
  He's also got a big secret.
  
  Victoria seems to be pretty boring in contrast. Home-schooled for years, she met a guy at a public playground on her tenth birthday. He rescued her that day, and they became friends.
  
 Now at age sixteen, she realized that none of her crushes were nearly as powerful as the one she had on the boy from her childhood.
   
  She's not what she appears, and he's difficult to read.
  She's not naive and he's not a gentleman.
  
Read on to find out what happens when their paths finally intertwine.
  
  This book can be read independently though this is the official sequel to Love Me? Like You Do.

title: Bane of the Wolves
description:
Humans live tedious lives under the thumb of the Wolves, and their King, subjected to their rules and regulations. If one was to break their laws, there were consequences.

Nineteen-year-old Lenora Grosvernor knew all about their consequences. It left her fatherless and her mother a widow. 

It caused hatred to fester, and it ran deep. 

When Lenora fights back after being seized for a curfew violation, it lands her in front of the Wolf King, who sentences her to thirty-five days as a servant in his castle to learn respect and obedience. Little did she know schemes would consume her days as she joins a plot to end the wolves reign - even if it meant embracing her identity as the wolf prince's mate.

title: Alpha King Versus Vampire King
description:
500 years ago, a captivating tale began and continues to unfold. One person anxiously awaited the arrival of their beloved, while another found their soulmate. Someone had their heart set on winning her affection, only to have her unexpectedly captured by someone else. Love had played a pivotal role in past conflicts, and now a new war is brewing, all in the name of this powerful emotion. In matters of love and war, anything goes, so it remains to be seen what lengths they will go to in order to claim love. In this story, there are two lovers, one love, two kings, and one queen. Whose lost love will they discover? Whose love will she ultimately choose? 
This is a love story unlike any other, one that will introduce you to the concept of Lost Love.

title: Thread of Darkness
description:
Something evil is lurking in the castle...

Season 2 of Thread of Gold

**

Annalise Cidarius is trapped in a tower, cursed by a handsome king that is both her greatest enemy and her first love: Ryne Delafort. As Anna struggles to free herself, Ryne battles against his growing sickness and prepares for his upcoming nuptials - all whilst fighting his feelings for the one girl that he can never have.

But when Ryne's vicious cousin Eris arrives at court to make a play for the crown, the court is thrown into upheaval. As men take sides and ballrooms become battlefields, Anna and Ryne begin to realize that something else is afoot. And it's coming from the mysterious locked room upstairs...

title: The Tributes (Sable)
description:
Every couple of years, a girl from each village, town, and city in the kingdom is sent to the palace of the Black Queen as a tribute. And this time, twelve-year-old Sable is the one to go from her village.

Sable can't say she's ever been particularly attached to her village. (Being reviled all your life can do that sometimes.) But, it's the only home she's ever known. And if she must leave, she certainly wouldn't have chosen to go live (or die, or be enslaved, it's not certain yet) under the tyrannous Black Queen.

Sable also barely knows how to interact with other people. So she only hopes that she might survive in the palace in whatever capacity she can manage.

Just as she has all her life.

(Trigger Warnings: Mentions of abuse, prejudice, sexism, classism, threats of death, and suicidal ideation in some chapters. Potential descriptions of anxiety attacks, flashbacks, and PTSD trauma reactions in some chapters.)

* * *
TL;DR: A group of young girls from different walks of life living together in a gothic castle for the foreseeable future.

* * *


Author's Note: The world of this story is similar to life and settings in late medieval Europe. However, this setting will not be very true to our historical knowledge of medieval Europe.

Disclaimer: This is a work of fiction. Names, characters, businesses, events, and incidents are the products of the author's imagination. Space and time have been rearranged to suit the convenience of the book. Any resemblance to actual persons, living or dead, or actual events is entirely coincidental.

*Cover made via Canva.*

© All Rights Reserved.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I am, at any given moment, creating random plots in my head from the most inane to the simplest things.

But, it is at the moment that my characters get away from me and start halfway charting their own course, that I finally start typing their stories down.

My stories are character driven and delve deep into the character's psyche. And no matter how much angst or twisty plot turns a story of mine has, it will always have a happy ending. (Tragedy just isn't in my wheelhouse.)

So, if you enjoy stories where the characters are the main plot-drivers, I'd love it if you gave mine a read and told me what you think.

Take care. Ciao. :)

title: Monarchy
description:
Riker Kennedy always knew he was going to become King. He just never knew it would be his now wife that would put him there. 

Being the boss of one of the biggest crimes families in the world was hard but just becoming a new dad was even harder. With new enemies starting to raise, and old ones coming knocking Riker knows that he has his work cut out for him now that he has even more to protect. 

Will Riker be able to keep control of the situation or will the world that he had worked so hard to get come crashing down around him. 

How far is he willing to go to protect those closest to him? How far is he will to go to protect not only his wife but now his son as well? 

Riker is now the King of Kings and he will need to do everything in his power to make sure he stays on top, even if that means making sacrifices on the way.

title: 𝐊𝐢𝐜𝐤𝐨𝐟𝐟 𝐭𝐨 𝐋𝐨𝐯𝐞 || 𝐏𝐚𝐫𝐤 𝐉𝐢𝐦𝐢𝐧
description:
In the heart of Buenos Aires, Park Jimin, a world-renowned Argentinian soccer star known for his charisma and flirtatious charm, has the world at his feet. Jimin is accustomed to having his way both on and off the field. His life takes an unexpected turn when he meets the sweet and innocent Kim Sullyoon, who happens to be his team captain's younger sister and a promising Korean Sports journalist and, most importantly, 'forbidden fruit.'  Beneath her angelic face and captivating voice, Sullyoon holds a secret that can jeopardize her rising career and her brother's trust. 

Until instant attraction comes with a whirlwind speed between Jimin and Sullyoon, who has to deal with hidden desires, family bonds, an ex, and the pressures of fame. if that is not enough pressure, Jimin's first love, Aitana, makes her debut on the scene. 

"Kickoff to Love" tells a story of hidden love, secrets and the search for genuineness in a world where image is everything.

Sports romance

title: Final Room
description:
Wendy is the final girl. Surviving is what she does.
 
                                                                  	*****
 
Following the tragic Incident that claimed the lives of all her friends, Wendy Collier only has her status as a Final Girl to give her some sense of self--it tells her how to behave, how to feel, how to think. When nothing else helps, the only solution is to move to Alaska to stay with her estranged brother, who had his own reasons to exile himself, and they both know there are sacrifices they have to make for each other. Underneath the resentment, there's hurt. However, Wendy has been fighting for a long time, fighting for survival, fighting for meaning, fighting for closure, and this will not be yet another thing that's ripped away from her.

No matter what she has to do.

title: Caught on Camera
description:
A contemporary romantic comedy, Caught on Camera is the first novel in the Hollywood in Muskoka Series. 

To achieve her dream of working on Hollywood film sets, star struck chambermaid Rachel Lehmann needs $35,000 for film school tuition by the end of the summer. When she's asked to fill in for a missing bridesmaid at a movie star's wedding, it's her big chance to take candid photos of celebrities and sell them to the entertainment gossip magazines. Then groomsman Mickey McNichol, agent to the stars, sweeps her off her feet. 

Mickey's bitter experience is that everyone in show business fakes emotions. When he falls for the stand-in bridesmaid, he thinks he's finally met a beautiful woman he can trust. But if Rachel betrays his friends' privacy, Mickey will ensure she never works in Hollywood.

authorBio:
I'm a Canadian contemporary romance and romantic suspense author. Here are my published books:

1. Caught on Camera, Book 1 in the Hollywood in Muskoka Series: ebook available on Amazon, Apple Books, Kobo and other retailers worldwide. Available in paperback on Amazon. Audiobook available on Chirp and other sites. Request library digital loan via Overdrive.  Includes a playlist;
