5. Diamond Hunter, a romantic suspense, available in ebook and paperback on Amazon.

Download The Next Big Thing, a FREE sexy short story, when you subscribe to my blog at www.MadelleMorgan.com

The series is set in the wild and beautiful lake district north of Toronto, Ontario, Canada, where my family and I were lucky to spend summers at a cottage on Georgian Bay. The National Geographic Travelers magazine chose Muskoka as one of Best of The World - Must-see places. Truly, there is no place like it in the whole wide world. Interested in seeing some Muskoka photos? Check out images that inspired me on www.pinterest.com/madellem

Diamond Hunter is set in Canada's sub-Arctic, where I lived for five years at the beginning of my engineering career. Yes, I was a girl who was good at math!

More about me: I blog occasionally on my website, www.MadelleMorgan.com. Keep in touch via my author page at www.Facebook.com/MadelleMorganAuthor or on Twitter @MadelleMorgan .

Happy reading and writing!
Madelle

title: The Runaways
description:
Written by Jenny Rosen & Edited/Developmentally Edited by Kristen Maglonzo @kaelking12

Love's a disappearing act, death's an illusion.

When Hailey Anderson, daughter of a dangerous D.C. senator, slams into Caleb Evans, a pretty boy with a million-dollar smile and a million ugly secrets, she figures fate has finally given her an escape from the broken home she's desperate to distance herself from. 

Their seemingly star-crossed encounter results in her being drugged and dragged out of Washington as Caleb's ugly background bubbles to the surface.

Caught between deadly family ties, financial desperation, and an intriguing new hostage, Caleb struggles to walk the line between loyalty and frightening new feelings for Hailey. When his brothers discover Caleb distancing himself from their last chance plan for survival turned federal crime, they stop at nothing to tear the two of them apart. 

When helping Hailey means losing everything, will Caleb stay barbwire-tied to his brothers or hold on to a hostage who's got a hold on him?

title: I See Fire | Wattys 2021/22 Shortlist | ✔
description:
❖ A hundred years after a disease burned the world down, Adriana is dragged into a war she didn't know existed. The Aztec gods are fighting for their lives, and they want her to help. ❖


Adriana is a fourth-generation member of Grillo Negro, a nomadic village trudging down the continent in search of warmth and other people. It's been a hundred years since human society was incinerated by an unknown disease. The descendents of the survivors live in fear that they'll be next. 

When a scouting trip takes a terrifying turn, Adriana finds herself caught up in a war that reveals a darker side of the apocalypse. The gods of her ancestors are real. They're standing between her village and a powerful enemy, and she and her friends might be the last thing that can help. 

The burning disease isn't gone, and the one who created it is only just getting started.

title: SOPHIA & LUKE
description:
Sophia Jones was a few months away from finishing her master and she was terrified. She didn't want to admit to anyone including herself that she didn't know what to do after. All she's ever known is studying and studying. Getting into the world without a plan seemed like a bad idea. Meeting Luke Reed was something unpredicted that hit her like a tornado and changed her life forever.

Luke Reed had everything he wished. He was a step away from owning his father's business and getting his most awaited revenge. Everything was going perfectly according to plan until he met Sophia Jones. All it took her was one sentence to shake him. But Luke promised himself he would not get distracted.

FROM THE BOOK:
"Do you think I'll get positive points if I undress? I have abs! Do you want to see them? I can even let you touch them!" That made me laugh. He was cute and I had to admit that I liked that silly side of him.
"Stay put and don't move!" I warned him while I went to look for clothes to change.
"Get your shirt and pants off!" I said once I was back with the clothes.
"Wow, love, you're bolder than I thought!" I ignored him and helped him get undressed.
And he was right. He has abs. Well-defined abs that would have had me drooling under other circumstances, but I couldn't do that to a drunk person.
"Why do you have men's clothes? Do you have a man?" His face was serious and I almost got mistaken that he sounded jealous.
"Do you see a man here?" I sarcastically replied.
"These are my dad's clothes. I use them as pajamas but I don't have other clothes to give you." I clarified even though there was no need to do that.
"Why are you dressing me again? Aren't we about to do the goodie?" He looked adorably confused and he had me chuckling. 
"The only goodie you'll do is take a good night's sleep" I replied, pinching his cheeks.
"Then we'll do the goodie when I wake up?" Gosh, he was pouting! 
"Luke, just shut up and go to sleep!" I replied laughing

title: Say When
description:
On the journey to finding yourself, expect to get lost along the way. 

Bridget Montez is boring. But it's not her fault.

She imagines she could be a witty, exciting, and badass seventeen-year-old. But for now, she splits her time between school, chores, and nursing her mother back to health after her most recent drug binge.

For Bri, college is where she'll leave the cold walls of her Brooklyn home behind and blossom. She's desperate for change and when Jax, an arresting and mysterious college sophomore, rolls into her life she gets a taste of what freedom - and love - could be.

But when her demanding father threatens her plans for escape, she may be willing to follow Jax into a seedy world that challenges everything she thought she knew in order to get the life she wants. With her future and freedom on the line, Bridget hopes she knows the limits of love, loyalty, and legality. 

COMPLETED 🔅

authorBio:
Yeerrrrrr! That's how we say 'Hi' in Brooklyn, NY. :-)

I wake up at the crack of dawn to turn off my alarm clock and go back to sleep. I'm at least five minutes late to work every day. I barely drink enough water to sustain my life and I'm always forgetting things. 

But when I sit down at my laptop with a blank page on the screen, I leave that scattered part of me and focus in a way that's intoxicating. 

I love stories because I love life. What's more intriguing than telling the stories of life in all its complexity, emotion, and possibility? 

Long story short...writing is dope.

Enjoy.

title: The Trap (Trapped Prequel)
description:
Looking back, I should have seen it coming.

Paige didn’t like that I went so far away to university. But it was going to only be for two years. She'd join me after she did her two years at community college. I thought we could swing that no problem. We were solid.

But she hated the distance. She hated not seeing me every day. She complained that I didn’t come home enough. She hated that for months on end, texting and phone calls were our only form of communication. It wasn’t enough.

She'd ask about the girls on campus. She’d gotten it into her head that girls were always making a play for me. I laughed and told her, even if that were true, I’d never cheat on her. She didn't seem completely reassured by that.

The bottom line is, Paige thought she was losing me. She wanted me home with her. But I could never imagine the level she'd sink to—the trap she’d set to make that happen.

And like an idiot I walked right into it.

And it’s a mistake I'm going to have to pay for the rest of my life.

title: In the Rain (Prequel to Rain Again)
description:
Presenting 
The Prequel to Rain Again 

~ It all began in rain. ~

He didn't bring an umbrella, so he decided to take hers.

She gasped, stunned. "Wait! Hey! Give it back to me-" She moved to grab her umbrella back, but the man was faster. And as he turned around and began to walk away, she too, scurried after him. But tragically, her shoes slipped on the rainwater.

~ It was a mysterious beginning. ~

A kiss on a dark balcony. They didn't see one another's faces.

~ They flew across the sky of love. ~

She straightened a bit, suddenly feeling enraged and trying her best to control it from showing. "Anyone who's never been pushed down a cliff with an enormous kite tied to the back would, no doubt, feel 'nervous' by a forceful selection like this," her voice raised a little at the end. "I'm just hoping not to end up being dead, not that some people will be that sad if such a thing truly happens."

He was furious. "I would never want any harm upon you, despite what you believe. The responsibility for your safety will be upon me. I will personally see to it."

~ And it all resulted in a love that will face the most terrifying test. ~

Yet, it is his lack of faith that will harm her the most.

title: Matters of Chance
description:
Elizabeth Bennet is a 23 year old environmental journalist still living with her parents. She has a steady plan to get out of the sleepy city of Meryton and gain her independence. However, when rich and eligible bachelor Charles Bingley moves into the Netherfield apartment downtown and makes a move on Lizzie's sister, her world gets spun around. Her sister gets a new boyfriend in the form of Charles Bingley, while Elizabeth gets a new enemy in the form of Charles' best friend, Darcy. 

Pompous car company CEO Darcy and Elizabeth seem like natural born enemies, but with a series of run-ins and misunderstandings, it seems as if the two of them are a little more similar than they'd like to admit. 

🌱🌿🌱

Matters of Chance is a retelling of Jane Austen's classic romance Pride and Prejudice. It takes place on the American west coast. It features an Asian-American Bennet family living in a small city outside of Seattle. It has very similar plot points to the original, but adapted to a modern setting.

However, I don't think you need to have read Pride & Prejudice to read this! The characters are written so that you can do without it.

Here's a link to my aesthetic board to get a feel for the characters! https://pin.it/w8qkJa7\

title: My Virtual Darcy 🏆 2021 Wattys Shortlister
description:
What would you give up to dive into your favourite story?

Romantic, sharp-tongued, with a tendency to fall in love with tall, dark-haired, brooding men--Leah is the archetype of the "Pride and Prejudice" fan. TV series, movies, comics, musicals: she has seen and read them all.

For her birthday, Leah's friends and family pool together to get her the ultimate Janeite gift: the Bridge, a virtual-reality gaming device.
By granting access to her five senses, she can live her favourite novel as the iconic Elizabeth Bennet!

As she explores Regency England and quarrels with the infamous Darcy, Leah cannot help but digress from the original plot to suit her modern-woman convictions.
The longer she plays, the weirder her beloved characters act, until the lines between fiction and reality blur.

⚠️ Content and/or trigger warning ⚠️

This story contains one scene of (unsuccessful) sexual coercion, and mentions domestic violence and death by domestic violence, which may be triggering for some readers.

title: Peter's Little Peter
description:
🍌🍌🍌Think Netflix's SEX EDUCATION, but without the accents, and instead of pictures and sound, I put the words on the screen, and you paint the pictures with your mind.🥒🥒🥒

***
Some guys are showers. Some guys are growers. Then there's Peter. He's got a big secret about a little problem (in his pants). But one day, that secret gets out, and Peter's life is ruined. The guys at his high school mock Peter without mercy. The girls giggle at the idea of dating Peter. 

But the situation isn't entirely without hope. Peter's best friend Elroy is a wannabe teenage business prodigy who sees Peter's predicament as an opportunity to develop a product that will help him "tap into the bajillion dollar market for addressing male insecurity." Meanwhile, a mysterious art student named Audrey seems to like-like Peter, despite his, ahem, little problem. Which is weird, because the rumor around school is that Audrey is a size queen. Why else would she be collecting so many dick pics?

Peter's Little Peter is a story about the truth behind the myths of male sexuality, the awkwardness of teenage romance, surviving high school, and the bumpy road to self-acceptance.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
🤡✍️👀 Watty Winner ~ emoji fan ~ LOVER OF COMMENTS and monkeys! 🙈🙉🙊

I'm best known for PETER'S LITTLE PETER 🍌 (Watty2019). I also wrote HAMBURGER HAMLET 🍔👻 which is totally underrated, IMO.

If you're an eco-friendly polytheist who loves dick and fart jokes, read PROMETHEUS FRAMED 🍆🍑🔥

I take my humor dry with a side of pop culture.

Reading requests? Sorry, no time for that, Dr. Jones!

More about me?

I live in LA with my wife, Christina, and our dog, Mortimer. Pro tip: never name your pet after a villain from an '80s Eddie Murphy comedy. You've been warned.

I went to law school, which was a terrible idea. I was a journalist for about a decade, which was a slightly better idea. These days, I'm a ghostwriter. BOO!

I'll watch anything with Ryan Gosling. When I was 12, I played a giant raccoon in  a parade for a Korean amusement park. I've been tear-gassed twice.

I drink too much coffee, but on the upside I share the strange conversations I have with baristas in a series called COFFEE TALK. ☕️

I like to mess with telemarketers. Those stories are collected in TUESDAY'S WITH TELEMARKETERS. ☎️

I'm a struggling yogi. You can read about that in YOGA DIARY. 🧘♂️

I also write about my Lyft drivers in ALONG FOR THE RIDE 🚗

Tell me about you! Fav books? TV shows? I want to hear.

title: Love Across Borders
description:
Ama Sarpong, a strong-willed woman from Ghana, never imagined her journey to Germany would lead her into the arms of Karl Fischer , a man whose heart harbored deep-seated prejudices. A chance encounter ignites an unexpected and intense connection between them, forcing both to confront their beliefs, backgrounds, and the world around them. As they navigate cultural clashes, racial tension, and the harsh realities of love in a divided world, Ama and Karl must decide if their love can transcend the barriers that separate them-or if it will crumble under the weight of their differences.

authorBio:
Hey there, I'm Jojo, an aspiring writer who loves to dive into different genres and explore unique storylines. I enjoy delving into the realms of mystery, magic, sci-fi, fantasy, and the paranormal, often adding a touch of mature themes to spice things up. What ties all my tales together is their exploration of the human experience - from emotions like love, loss, and compassion to the more complex feelings of anger and jealousy. But amidst all this, the most powerful theme I love to explore is the enduring force of love. It's what keeps me hooked as a writer!
I used to write fanfiction under username jojo540 and thenonbinaryvegan, but have since converted many of my fanfictions to original works. 

I publish on wattpad and ao3 (ao3 is now my fanfiction home),so if my stories crop up elsewhere, someone's been theavin'!  Please don't copy my stories. Use your imagination and write your own.🌻

title: Shadows May Fall
description:
Winter, 1917.

Dorothy never really thought that war would take her older brother, but like so many others before him, Ian enlisted and departed Canada in khaki, leaving Dorothy to care for the youngest Gaston, Charlie. The return of her employer's son eats away at Dorothy: why should he, the rich man's son, the spoiled brat, be back home sleeping in his bed while her brother sleeps in the muck somewhere in France or Belgium?

Robbie Monroe isn't the brat who ran off for a great adventure. Nearly deaf in one ear and deeply lonely, he is a man struggling to put his life back together after his time "over there," and Dorothy seems to be the only one he can talk to. She doesn't want to trust him but she can't help it, and Dorothy soon finds herself with something she didn't realize she desperately needed: a friend.

Before the war's end, fate has one final reminder for Dorothy that happy endings don't always happen in real life, no matter how much she tells herself they can.

Set in in the weeks before the 1917 Halifax Explosion, Shadows May Fall is a non-traditional World War I romance.

title: The Prince's Guide to True Love's Kiss {Published Version}
description:
[Story will be available on Radish] Prince Benedikt is on a mission to find his True Love, but more so, he has a duty to his kingdom to fulfill. As a prince of Stalvart, he must find his True Love by his twenty-first birthday. At twenty-one, he will begin his regency where his father will train him up to be a great king. The quest seemed simple enough, but after failing to wake fourteen maidens with True Love's Kiss, he's starting to worry that he'll never find his True Love. And he's not the only one.

With his conniving cousin, the next in line for the throne, questioning his ability to rule, the pressure is on. News that a maiden rests in the forest of Bleakwood reaches his kingdom, and Benedikt's next quest is decided. But with a resurgence of Withering Magic in the Lowlands, he must bring in special help. He teams up with a band of mercenaries, if they can be called that, to help him face the perils of Bleakwood.

Captain Grielle is a professional thief, but her and her Liberators, aren't criminals for hire. They specialize in the liberation and return of lost things, precious things, to their rightful owners. They wouldn't normally take a job like this, but the price is right. They must get Prince Benedikt to his maiden and bring him home safely, but the quest turns out to be much more than Grielle bargained for. With her past turning up to haunt her at every turn, she's made to face her demons all while trying to understand her growing feelings for the tender-hearted, ill-fated prince.

{Now featuring character art by the amazing illustrator @untroubledheart}

title: Veil of Ambitions
description:
In the heart of Islamabad, where power flows through whispers and alliances are woven into the very fabric of society, four influential families-the Khans, Maliks, Qureshis, and Meers-stand at the center of it all. Bound by history, legacy, and the unspoken rules of their world, these families have built empires not through rivalry, but through the careful dance of politics, bureaucracy, and business. Their lives are entangled, not by chance, but by generations of calculated connections, each move as precise as a stroke of poetry on a page. Here, ambition and loyalty are measured in equal weight, and every decision ripples through a web of power that stretches beyond the visible. It is a world where control is everything, yet love, the most dangerous of all forces, may be the one thread that unravels it all.




 "I suppose the view from the top is worth all you gave up."
 "It should be. But it's... quieter than I thought."






"You think you can win every argument with a smile, Zain?"
"I don't need to. You've already lost this one."






"You act like I'm just some player. Do you even see me?"
 "Maybe I do, and that's the problem. I don't want to get hurt. It's safer this way."



This is an original work by Pearlintheoyster.
Any unauthorized reproduction, without explicit permission is strictly prohibited. Please respect the effort and creativity that has gone into this work. Duplication or plagiarism of any kind will be reported and could result in legal action. Thank you for supporting original content.

title: SAMBA  YACINE
description:
(Featured in Grimm Retellings and Other Fairy tales in WATTPAD CLASSIC AUTHORS)


Once upon a time, in a kingdom ruled and dominated by women, lived a boy named Samba Yacine.

The boy was doomed to have a miserable life when his mother died and left him at the mercy of his stepmother and stepbrother who treated him like a slave...Until news came in that their queen was going to choose a husband among the young men of her kingdom, on the night of the harvest feast.

Samba didn't think he was good enough to be the chosen one but his stepmother sure believed the opposite. She feared that if Samba entered the selection, her own son would be overshadowed. 

But there was one way to get rid of Samba, once and for all. Oh, it was  a terrible way indeed but Aida wasn't going to stop at anything to get what she desired. Except that the boy she tried to defeat wasn't as helpless as he appeared to be.

title: Sun & Moon
description:
"I'll have a whiskey and the lady will have a shot."

A very tall man appears right beside me with a curly dark lock of hair resting above his brow that reminds me of Superman. His nose slopes down straight like a Grecian sculpture. His voice is cool and bares a strange accent I've rarely heard, the vibrations of which tickle my ears. There is a sudden minty aroma emanating from his being, which subconsciously makes me straighten my shoulders and hike up my chest. 

The undead bartender nods his head profusely and noticeably shakes while he pours out our drinks. He hands them over, spilling a bit of mine on account of his trembling hands.

"Alpha," he says as he bows his head.

Guess I shouldn't be surprised an Alpha is out here enjoying the supernatural club scene. But when he turns his head and flashes a pair of blue and black mismatched eyes at me, my stomach drops.

The black Alpha eye. 
-----

Astrid Lee is a tiger among wolves, having lived her whole life in the Silver Bow pack. But when the Lycan Alpha, Rio Xenakis, declares her as his destined mate, she thinks nothing of it. 

Until, Bianca Greywood, the daughter of Silver Bow suddenly goes missing and Rio remains the only person Astrid can turn to. Together, they journey to find Bianca and discover that ancient sinister forces may be at play.

title: The Bartender's Guide To The Galaxy
description:
With a new master's degree in hand, a sassy bartender navigates the perils of her family's bar business as she tries to escape her dysfunctional life.
                                                                      *****
Growing up under a neon bar sign with minimal parental supervision imbued JUNE CASHMERE with plenty of moxie. Raised by a narcissistic mother and a drug-dealing dad who stole her car and went on the lam, June has worked her way through college as a bartender in her parents' bar. She has a weakness for one-night-stands and a gift for reading a customer's taste before their butt hits the barstool, a fine skill by anyone's measure. 

Just days before snagging her master's degree and her ticket to freedom, June meets CABE FRANKLIN, a hazel-eyed hottie with humor and a surprisingly level head. He's in town long enough to make a business deal, and he doesn't leave until June is properly intrigued. 

But June's future plans go south when her mom decides to bail on the bar biz, dropping a load of legal problems in June's lap. Cabe, who happens to be in the real estate biz, helps June find her missing father so she can sell the bar, which happens to sit on a prime piece of beach property. Is their hook-up destiny? Or is it a cheap shot?

The Bartender's Guide To The Galaxy follows the sexploits of an independent woman as she navigates everything the universe throws at her, including egos the size of Jupiter.

COPYRIGHT NOTICE: This work is owned by the author. Please do not attempt to plagiarize or a meteor might land on your house. IN OTHER WORDS: If you find this story on any online platform other than WATTPAD, I did not allow this. You may also be exposing yourself to malware. If you wish to read this story in its original, safe form, do it here on WATTPAD.

authorBio:

Enjoy YA? You'll find more of my works @buzzmama, including Wattys winner Neon Girl.

WHERE - I was raised in Las Vegas under the lax supervision of musician parents before I set down roots in Florida.

WHEN - My exact carbon dating is a trade secret, but it was a great time to live in Vegas because Elvis was still alive and I got to meet famous people before their reputations tanked.

                  FREAKY FACTS about me:
* I started wearing glasses as soon as I started to crawl (apparently I hit a lot of walls)
* I suffer from katsaridaphobia (fear of cockroaches)

* I can name the actors in movies I've never seen
* I would rather be denied food than music

title: 'Tis the Season
description:
Naomi has always dreaded the holiday season but when she finds herself staying with the handsome stranger and his family that accidentally stole her Christmas tree through the holidays, she just might end up taking a large sip from that cup of holiday cheer that brightens up everyone's Decembers.
---------
"You've never kissed anyone under the mistletoe then?" he asks, keeping his voice low. 
There are literal sparks flying in the air between us right now- I knew I was attracted to him at the tree farm but now that I've gotten to actually know him a bit better, and now that he's standing so close to me, that attraction has seemed to intensify.
I give him a tight smile and shake my head.
"Well, I think it's probably bad luck to break tradition...." 
----------
December Writing Challenge 2020 piece!
~updating daily through December~
(photo of challenge and more info can be found in the conversations section of my profile!)

title: Once Upon A Mr. Goody Two Shoes
description:
Aashi Singhania. Stubborn, strong and obsessed with winning is dejected when she doesn't earn her coveted promotion at work, and angry at the guy who stole it from under her nose. She's determined to hate the new transfer from Kolkata, but is surprised to meet the polite brown-head possessing the most tantalizing hazel eyes she had ever laid her eyes on.

In the battle that follows between the head-strong sassy Marwari lady and the charming Bengali gentleman, laughter and friendship is bound to bloom. 
But will it also lead to blooming of roses in a sea of sarcastic thorns? What will happen when hidden motives and poignant past unfolds? 

Set in the capital city of India, Delhi, this story will bring out a myriad dimensions of humor, passion, attraction and realizations.
---------------------
Co-authored by @Irockdude and @Tanayatge

title: Carmela + Amos
description:
Is it possible to fall in love with someone you've never met?

When Amos Castillo buys a vintage guitar at a pawnshop, he discovers more than an SG Gibson inside the hard leather case. A hidden compartment filled with journal entries gives him a glimpse into Carmela's tumultuous relationship with her addict rockstar husband, Rodrigo. She's a young woman, navigating a world she wasn't ready for, and suffering in silence as she loses herself to his addiction and manipulations.

The more Amos reads, the more he realizes their lives aren't so different. While Carmela struggles to find her voice in a toxic marriage, Amos finds himself in a five-year relationship going nowhere. As he silently roots for Carmela to leave her husband, he reclaims his life by figuring out what he needs to be happy.

authorBio:

🅦🅐🅣🅣🅟🅐🅓 🅢🅣🅐🅡 2019-2023

I'm an insomniactic daydreamer (that's me in the photo). I'm married, a mother of 2 rambunctious Terrier breeds, I'm a proud Aunt, y soy Latina 🇳🇮🇲🇽 My stories contain Latin MCs and usually take place in San Francisco since it's my hometown, so naturally, I think it's a spectacular setting. I write in whatever genre the wind steers me, but always with morally grey characters in chaotic settings.

When I'm not reading and writing, I'm working in healthcare analyzing cardiac arrhythmias. It's something I'm very proud of, considering my struggles with ADHD and Dyslexia. So no matter what people tell you, don't give up!


Some of my accomplishments on Wattpad:
● Top 5 Winner (4th place) in final round of Open Novella Contest 2021
● Round One Winner (2nd place) Open Novella Contest 2021
● Paid Anthology - The One That Got Away
● Featured writer.
● Top 20 in 2019 Standouts
● 2018 Wattys Shortlist.
● 2nd place in 2017 A Step Forth contest.
● Top 25 for Lenovo Back to School contest.
● Winner of the Scifriday challenge #18

If you happen to come across my stories, please feel free to leave a comment. I'm always looking to improve them and make sure they flow well or make sense. Writing is very personal, and it takes guts to take what you've manifested in your thoughts and formulate them into actual words for people to judge. You're allowing readers into your mind. So have courage and be kind to one another :)

Hopefully, you'll enjoy my contribution to the Wattpad world! Cheers.

title: The Case of the Silent Psychic
description:
On a cold dark night, a storm raged, and a woman lay dying. In her life she had been a psychic who spoke to the dead, but who had wanted to stop her? And what secrets were they trying to hide?

With all the mystic connections involved in her murder, the police are out of their depth. They need someone with more knowledge of the magical arts, and so the only hope they have for solving the case is to ask for help from the Fairy Detective Agency.

Princess Elysia and her friends are no longer children, they have grown up and left the fairy realm. Now they have travelled through the veil and into the human realm, where the mysteries are darker and more gritty. Their fairy magic can help them crack the case in ways the police could only dream of...

title: Till We Pretend
description:
She fell a little in love that night, not realising a single kiss would change her life.
  ***
  If one word were to describe seventeen year old Ella Nichols, it would be responsible. Between juggling school, extracurriculars, her job and a mother who is more child than parent, Ella has her plate full. But when her best friend suggests one night of letting go Ella can't help but wonder if the other side has more to offer.
  She wasn't expecting to meet him.
  She can't explain the instant attraction between them.
  She certainly didn't plan on kissing him back. 
  By the time Ella realises that the stranger who broke down her walls in a single night is none other than the rising Hollywood superstar Kyler Blackwell, it's too late. 
  Reputations must be salvaged and secrets be kept and so Ella enters Kyler's world. They need each other but both are  forbidden to be anything more than just pretend. But with the chemistry that once exploded between them,can Ella and Kyler deny the connection that's been there from the moment they met?
  Cover by @dysanic

Love or Lust? Will she choose before her choice is taken? Even then, will it be worth it?

title: The imperfection we called our love | ✔
description:
And when I had informed Finn of my obvious concerns, -
He had pulled me up against him so close that I could feel his breath on my cheek, - and whispered in my ear ; "Baby no one's going to catch us. - " 
And for those few seconds I seemed to have bought every word. 


Emily Harrison, has started a new chapter in her life not too long ago; High School. And high school is the type of place where it either breeds change into you or those around you. So far it hasn't been her

Torn between doing the right things and wanting the wrong means, witnessing her parents marriage crumbling right before her,  her best friend of  years now deciding she cares more about climbing  up the social ladder than her friendship With Emily, and a sudden interest in a boy named Finn who is rougher than the streets and a flirt in a heartbeat. - Everything seems to be happening so fast, and all that Emily can do, is hold on.

But with everything else crashing down around her
she finds herself needing Finn more than she cares to believe

Finn is exactly the type of guy she'd try and stay far away from:
The type that's no good for you, with a charm that's too good to be true. Haunted by his past and the choices he has made, it might be too late for him entirely, - that is until he meets Emily

Finn and Emily are exactly what the other needs 

But in the end, even love sometimes can't fix all.

title: Sink
description:
Malia Carson. A young, hotheaded swimmer.  Her dreams are to be one of the swimmers to represent the USA for the Olympics. She's fast, she's quirky, and she's sassy. 

Ethan Woods. A hot, sexy, and arrogant swimmer. He has the same dream as Malia. He's just as fast, he's gorgeous, and he's annoying. 
  
When you put two together, who have had a slight history before, the bomb literally drops. You get fights, you get tears, you get memories. But, most importantly? You might, just about, get love. 
  
It's simple enough.
  
Except, not really.

title: His Doctor Psycho(complete ✔)
description:
Word count (50,000 - 100,000)
⚠️Mature content ⚠️
________________
What makes this love story different from all the love stories around???

It's easy to love a good person, but loving a bad person and trying to make them good, accepting them as they are , and giving away your everything , loving them to the point that there heartbeat became the only sourse of your life , if there stops yours will too.

Trying to fix them by breaking yourself everyday, you feel there pain to the point that yours don't even feel like hurting anymore , you too much get involve in solving there problems that you don't even notice yours 

This is what make this love story different from others . 

It's hard not to fall in love with someone when they see mixed part of your soul , when they found your ugliest scars beautiful , when they understand the darkest and dustiest corner of your mind , when they are ready to fix every scattered piece of your heart .

__________________
But love this deep can be dangerous, a love this deep with a person who can't even love themself can be dangerous. 
A journey of love with the hurdles of past. 
This kind of love can't be witness easily, there love was unique , there love was special, there love was deep .
___________________

Stella was a psychologist dealing with her own problems in life , she was not the type of psychologist she wanted to become , she was not satisfied with her job because all she got was unreasonable cases ,from.her senior 

But one day when Spain's most powerful business  came to her asking to help his son who was diagnosed with almost every kind of personality disorders ,she saw it as a opportunity to finally able to help someone who actually need it 

But "Alwar Le Deón was not someone who is easy to handle 

This was the beginning of the kind of love story which will shake the life of everyone who witnessed it .

Because toxic love is deepest love isn't it ? Because what you do to fix that toxicity make it deep .

title: Silken Scales - The Chameleon Effect
description:
It was never about the Beast. What matters is finding Beauty in the unexpected. 

Idris thinks he only has one problem in life-escaping his dad's mega plans for his future. A doom he can't see a way to escape.

- Until Idris morphs into a monster.

Foster kid Cadi Rhoswen has finally found a loving home...

Then a malicious high school jock turns her whole world upside down. The next thing she knows, she's wandering the streets in the middle of winter. Alone.

- Until she discovers a beastly boy hiding in an abandoned nightclub called the Thorny Rose.

To change Idris back to his sexy human self, Cadi must reveal a secret she's been holding close to her heart for as long as she can remember. A secret that will pit them against a deadly army and change their lives forever.

Silken Scales is a modern-day Beauty and the Beast retelling and the first novel of the Chameleon Effect series. Young and new adult readers who love fantasy romance with a paranormal twist are sure to love Silken Scales.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Alex Hayes lives in a castle. Not one of those dark, damp ones in England (or Scotland even) where it rains all the time, but a white one with the view of a volcano where it's sunny 364 days out of the year.

She hosts four cats. One white queen. Two black pawns. And a ginger jester, famed for her impressive backflips and pirouettes. Alex is considering turning her castle into a cat sanctuary. It all depends on whether she can find a way to pay the food bills. (If you think she should, buy her books. The cats will thank you.)

When she isn't writing, she's thinking about what to write next, while working on her tan. (Vitamin D rules.) She's a vegetarian (almost vegan) who believes in love not war, feminine power, and enjoys singing (usually quite badly).

title: The Bree Twins
description:
"I know already " I was trying to stay calm on the outside but I was freaking out on the inside.

"Know about what ?" He asked with a voice cold and distant without even turning to look at me "Just be direct Kendall "

I froze when I heard him call me by my name and not his nickname for me.

"I know about your AS" Immediately those words left my mouth, he threw a coffee cup at the wall and I jumped in Suprise.

"No one has the fucking right to tell you my own business. No fucking one !! So what are you here for huh? To show pity or mock concern ?" he asked lowly or rather disgustingly. "Last I checked you didn't want to talk to me or see me "


~~~
   𝗞𝗲𝗻𝗱𝗮𝗹𝗹 has an amazing twin and a loving family so she felt she had everything right in her life and her life was perfect. But when she gets into college and meets 𝗡𝗮𝘁𝗵𝗮𝗻, she knew her life was going to get more complicated with his possessiveness, cold and blunt nature but she couldn't help but be drawn to him.

Is he worth it her loosening up a little ?

What happens when another guy takes interest in her and wants her ?

All she wanted was a quiet and peaceful college life but she knew deep down that she couldn't get that with those two boys in her life.


(ps; This book is only available on this account on my Wattpad, not any other site. If you see it anywhere apart from this app inform me, please.)

title: 31 Days of December
description:
Hailey just wants to finish her fall semester of classes. She wants to be able to go home and spend the holidays with her family. She doesn't want to have to worry about classes for a whole month. Hailey wants to be left alone. However, fate has different plans.

When Hailey least expects it, Ethan comes crashing into her life. The two have an unlikely bond that keeps pulling them back to one another. Hailey just wants to be happy, while Ethan wants to know about this girl who keeps appearing in his life. Together, they make a wild end of the year.

Cover created by hiraaeth

description:

What happens when she walks into one of the famous guys, and her brother's teammate Liam? And what happens when everyone discovers the famous Jack Mae has a younger sister? But most important, what happens when Livia and Liam get to know each other? 

A brother's friend trope romance <3

title: Room 520's Secret
description:
To Hestia's college friends, she was a virgin in every sense. She'd never drank, smoke or done anything bad. To her close friends, she was an angel that gave angels a run for their money. A Junior in college in a state away from home she had never been in a relationship, and told anyone who cared to listen she didn't want one. Till she meets Helix. The billionaire heir to a cooperation. Helix the schools, jerk, playboy is a butterfly who hops on different flowers, sucks the nectar and flies to the next. He draws firm lines between himself and other people and doesn't reveal how he feels. Yet when Helix meets Hestia, he wants to cross those lines. Hestia is in love with the idea of love, but runs away from the opposite sex when they get close. However, when she meets Helix, he has a magical effect on her that challenges her decision to stay aloof. as he finds out her secret, and with that many more secrets...

title: Gilmore Girls: After A Year in the Life
description:
Life has thrown Rory Gilmore a curve ball. The night after her Mom eloped with Luke, Rory dropped a bombshell while they sat on the steps of the town gazebo. 
  
  "Mom... I'm pregnant." 
  
  She'd never felt so overwhelmed & uncertain. 
  One impulsive night she makes the leap she's been afraid of for years. But will she live to regret it? 
  
  Is she better off alone? Or will she make it work with someone she loves?
  
  ************************************************************************
  For those of you looking for closure & a happy ending for Rory... 
  
  This is a rough draft that I hope to turn into something more professionally written later. 
  Take the opportunity to voice your ideas, thoughts & any fun pop cultural references that come to mind. 
  
  * This is a work of fanfiction. The characters and locations are not my own. *

Annie discovers that a one night stand is not as uncomplicated as she thought. Especially when it comes to a 'surprise pregnancy' which she can only assume was the result of a split condom that went unnoticed during their drunken fumble. She knows contacting Dean is not going to be easy or pleasant as she is about to drop a bombshell on him. What she doesn't know is that being knocked up by Dean comes with an added extra... his mother! Everything else is the least of her worries.

title: Half a Lady
description:
Ever since she was injured in a terrible accident, Cordelia Williams has felt adrift. The accident claimed more than her limb; it ruined her reputation and destroyed her dream of becoming a famous painter.

Worried that her disability makes her a disgrace to her prominent Regency family, Cordelia tries to find other ways to contribute to her family's legacy. But Cordelia's mother is determined to keep her hidden at their country estate--especially after a wealthy gentleman begins courting her beautiful sister. 

When Cordelia's father arranges her exit from high society, Cordelia is faced with a difficult decision: accept the quiet life her family planned for her, or overcome her fear of being seen.

☆ FEATURED
@HistoricalFiction
@ShortStory

authorBio:
Hello! My name is Cam. When I'm not scribbling out the next chapter of my latest writing project, you can find me watching movies, on an adventure somewhere outdoors, or curled up in a cozy nook reading more books than most people consider socially acceptable.

Thank you for visiting my corner of Wattpad. If you haven't already, feel free to check out my stories. I love reading comments and hearing what people think!

Completed Stories:

• Beauty (☆ 8 x FEATURED) - a short story retelling of the classic fairy tale, Beauty and the Beast.

• Half a Lady - (☆ 2 x FEATURED) - a historical fiction novelette set in Regency England.

Works in Progress:

• Free Prompts and Book Covers - a collection of prompts and book covers ranging from fantasy, YA, sci-fi, historical fiction, and contemporary lit. Frequent updates!

title: The Seven Painites
description:
Liasha Aurora lived with her grandfather until she was seven, but when her mother had a life-changing accident, Liasha moved back in with her parents. Seven years later, after her grandfather's death, the family moved into his old house. Strange things begin to happen when her father returns home, acting distant and uneasy. One day, while exploring her grandfather's belongings, Liasha finds a journal full of cryptic writings. Before she can investigate further, a group of mysterious strangers arrives at the house, and her father panics, sending her to his office for safety.
But when Liasha opens the journal in her father's office, the room starts to shift, and she is suddenly transported to a strange, dangerous world. Now trapped in an unfamiliar land, Liasha uncovers secrets about her grandfather's past and realizes her family has been hiding more than she ever imagined. Along the way, she makes unlikely allies who help her navigate the new world, but with enemies lurking and danger closing in, Liasha must uncover the truth behind her grandfather's death and survive long enough to return home.

title: Malpractice Makes Perfect
description:
When heiress Alexis Dupont asks part-time P.I Evie Harper to search her sisters room for an expensive missing heirloom it seems like an easy gig to give Evie a little pocket change and a look into the life of one of her business idols. Instead, Evie finds a family haunted by the death of their matriarch, whose sporadic ramblings point to murder. But why would someone risk killing a woman rapidly dying of disease? And can Evie prove there was a murder when her body is already dead and buried? With the go ahead from Alexis, Evie is determined to put to rest all doubts into Diana Dupont's odd death and give the family the closure it needs. But did the illness take her, or was there foul play? And most importantly, will she ever get paid?

Evie Harper Mysteries: Book 4

title: The True Born Huntress✔
description:
[COMPLETED]✔ 

The Blood Magic Series |Book 9|

2017 Fiction Award Winner for Best Series. 

⁃⁃⁃❖⁃⁃⁃

It is said that a true born hunter is to be feared above all else, sparking the initial hate between the vampires and the hunter race through Erebus' first born son Gage. Their strong desire to protect the human race often causes their actions to speak louder than words, trying to take back control for those who can do nothing for themselves.

With the world teetering on the edge of complete chaos between the supernatural races, a pure blood vampire has always claimed dominance and rule of this world since Locaine took the world for the vampires years ago. With a different day and age, can what the vampires once feared be the balance that the world seeks?

Are the vampire hunters really meant to be the balance between those seeking to live in peace?

Once entitled as the supernatural police after the treaty between the hunters and the vampires was formed, could the balance be restored through them entirely?

What secrets lie within a true born hunter?

The world holds its breath, waiting to see what Maverick's heir Mavis will become.

Will she become like Gage?

Will she reach her full potential and set the balance back into place before the bloodshed consumes the world?

Or, perhaps another way to seek peace is in the most unlikely places with the most unlikely alliances.

⁃⁃⁃❖⁃⁃⁃

title: Tenth Knot
description:
What do you do when you're caught on a kiss cam with the latest boyband's heartthrob? You write to the queen of their fandom and beg for forgiveness. 

Naree Morin listens to punk rock and metal bands. She does not know what the members of Nine Knots look like. She cares very little about them, to be honest. But thanks to an embarrassing brother at a basketball game, she ends up talking to a stranger and kissing him for the kiss cam.
Unfortunately for her, she kissed the wrong boy, because his fans have now tracked her down and started harassing her.
Enters Tenth Knot, the self-proclaimed queen of Nine Knots fandom, the only one that has any pull. Naree begs for help. And Tenth Knot agrees.
It could have ended there, but Naree finds herself listening to Nine Knots songs now and watching their videos. Regardless of her unconventional introduction to the boyband, she can't deny her interest.
Follow Naree has she gets sucked into the life of a fangirl, in this ode to fandoms, and the friends you make in them along the way.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Depending on what you believe in I might be a gooey alien living underground in my big tank with internet for only means of communication with the outer world. I could also be a giant zombie dragon. Or a shrimp, but only on Wednesday. 
Or I could be a thirty-one year old girl, getting her master's degree in English literature (cuz I want people to call me Master), using Karianne Giard as her pen name (Giard is my mother's maiden name because my real last name is French and often unpronounceable if you aren't French), with French as her first language, that absolutely loves to read and write but has an hectic life so doesn't upload as often as she used to.
I'm from that specie that thinks they're always right and own everything and if anything or anyone disagrees we'll destroy them and pee on their ashes. Claude Gauvreau is a big inspiration, I mean, when I'm on acid. I don't think the Earth is in danger, I think the humans are. And I don't always make sense 'cause like Augustus Waters, "my thoughts are stars I can't fathom into constellations."

_________

WRITING SCHEDULE:

Monday: Little Bitch
____________


I don't take reading requests--I just don't have the time. 
And I don't accept translation offers--my stories are unedited and it could hurt my chances of getting published.

title: Becoming Rapunzel
description:
A fantasy retelling of the fairy tale Rapunzel.
Rapunzel, a shy, curious girl yearns for the world beyond her tower but remains  for her mother. But a handsome man surprises her with feelings and desires she hadn't known before. When tragedy strikes, Rapunzel must discover who she really is and be true to herself. Learning to love herself and others around her while confronting her past abuse leads Rapunzel to new life and hope again.

title: Dangerous Thoughts
description:
*Wattys Winner 2022* 

Charles Abbot is finally living the life he has always dreamed of. At only 25, he has managed to turn his unique magical ability of copying memories into a profitable business. However, his comfortable life is shattered when he is tricked by a thief into extracting a dangerous memory. Not only does it reveal that there's a cult murdering children in their city, but by possessing this memory, Charles' life--and the lives of everyone close to him--are now in danger.

Recruiting the help of a gay potion-maker and a ten-year-old lightning-wielding prodigy, Charles must now find that thief and try to put an end to this cult's workings. But it won't be easy. In a world where each magician's power is unique and at times undetectable, it's hard to know who to trust...

Set in a world of magic inspired by 1860s Victorian England, Dangerous Thoughts is full of diverse characters and interesting twists that will keep you guessing until the very end. Perfect for fans of Sorcery of Thorns, Clockwork Angel, and Netflix's Stranger Things.

Victorian Fantasy - New Adult - Diverse Characters

~70,000 words

title: Now That I Love You I Can't Hate You
description:
Sequel (Book 2) of I Hate You But I Love You More.

Darson and Khara Meldeev endured a tough year of pretend love. They've signed marriage papers, hide away from their lies in a home they were forced to coexist in, smiled for the cameras and hate each other in every way possible. In the same way, they've sympathized with each other, care for each other and confide in the other. The hate was still there but the love was stronger.

Now, after renewing their vows, Darson and Khara embark on their journey of what true marriage really is. They thought they've already withered the worse of their storm but what they didn't know is that love can do crazy things to people. That being in love brings out the best and worse in someone. That sometimes the people close to you are envious of that love. That love is sometimes hard to get a hold off but easy to slip away.

Follow Khara and Darson on their journey of new love, old love and burning jealousy.
Tous Droits Réservés

HAPPY WRITING & HAPPY READING!

title: A Day of Faces
description:
A coming-of-age story about a snake girl called Kay and her shape-shifting friend who accidentally uncover a conspiracy and wind up changing the world.

*****

Kay is a sarcastic, ordinary high school girl who enjoys her weekends and doesn't think much about anything. Kay is also a green-skinned, reptilian-human variant. In her world, all children born on any given day look the same, all over the world. Nobody knows why. There are extreme mutations:  tentacles, wings, fur, horns, and abilities to leap tall buildings or breathe fire. That's just how it's always been and Kay thinks nothing of it, until she meets Cal: a shape-shifter who is on the run and needs her help to uncover what's really going on.

Wattys 2016 winner: Trailblazers category
 
 "This book is Jumper. . meets terminator... meets...twilight zone." shadowgirlzzz

Content warning: This story includes themes of bullying and prejudice.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Get early access and and bonuses by subscribing to my newsletter: https://simonkjones.substack.com/

I'm a writer based in Norwich, England specialising in serialised fiction. My debut novel A Day of Faces won a Watty Award in 2016 and in 2019 I completed the 3-year serialised run of my follow-up The Mechanical Crown. Book #3, No Adults Allowed, completed in September 2020.

In 2019 I became a Wattpad Star and my How to Write Serialised Fiction guide is part of the official Wattpad Writer Resources: https://www.wattpad.com/writers/resources/build-your-audience/

When I'm not writing, I work at the National Centre for Writing at Dragon Hall in Norwich.

Find out more and join my mailing list at https://simonkjones.com
Come chat to me on twitter http://twitter.com/tarnimus

title: Growth And Healing
description:
written out of a personal experience and healing journey. nowadays life to our generation is full of traumas, disappointments and mental health problems. 
Throughout the chapters of this book, I shall place before you my personal experience in a brief. The reasons of growing up with insecurities and how to grow out of it, heal and start over as a new person with a healed inner child. 

Please beware: I am not a psychologist nor a professional in the human brain. This is a personal experience on how I managed to heal myself.

title: Kisses From Death | Book 1
description:
Officially now a series! Watch all episodes now on mewatch.

[BOOK ONE]
Highest Rank Thriller: #1 (4.12.17)


"Whatever he does, whatever he throws at me," I panted, leaning my back against the door as my usually obnoxiously loud voice dropped to a hushed whisper, "I hope he kisses me not."

***

Addison Pilediah celebrated her 21st birthday a little more differently than others.

When a gold flake encrusted invitation letter had arrived at her doorstep just the day before her big day, Addison's curiosity had gotten the better of her for she had a nagging feeling that all was not right in the world. She knew that something, or rather someone, was playing tricks with her, and as a very curious girl, she had to find out what it was.

It only took one atrocious and life-threatening party, an obnoxious group of party-goers, and one devilishly handsome cynical spirit for Addison to realize that perhaps going to the party was not the brightest idea. Especially since she would be locked in an old boathouse for a while with a bunch of evil beings that would gladly try to kill her.

In fact, it would be a miracle if she could make it out alive after receiving kisses from Death himself.

        
***

title: The Definition of Fate
description:
"I want you and you want me. Nothing else matters."
  
  Four years ago, Rachel Evans was destroyed by the only boy she ever loved. Ever since then, she has tried to rebuild her life, but when her safety net--her boyfriend, job, friends, and family--disintegrates, she knows it's time to start over and stop living in the shadow of the past.
  
  When a friend helps her find a new job, Rachel moves to a new city and restarts her life with a new perspective. However, her second chance is interrupted by the one person she never expected to see again: Josh Hunter, her first and only love, who she hasn't seen since they broke up. Fate seems intent on bringing the two of them together again, but Rachel doesn't know if she can trust Josh. Is this a new beginning or a final chance for closure? Can they learn to step beyond their past into the future? 

Romance || Chicklit || New Adult

title: Before You
description:
Tayler has always been the model best friend. She's supportive, attentive, and sometimes too much of a pushover. She's been the supporting character to her own life, always in the shadow of her outgoing best friends,  but that was before she met Hunter.
Hunter is older, worldly, smart, and not to mention an incredibly good looking soldier. A chance meeting brings them together, but he's the object of Tayler's oldest best friend Jessica's attention. Tayler doesn't want to come between them, but when Hunter shows an interest in her, she decides it can't be too bad to just be friends with him, right? 
After all, all's fair in love and war.

title: Public Relations
description:
He's got a bad reputation. She's tasked with fixing it.

Mia Carmallo has a lot to prove. It wasn't good enough to be hired by one of LA's top celebrity PR agencies directly out of college; she needs to be the best in the business. Unfortunately for her, she's been handed the least desirable portfolio of clients - the influencers.

Enter Brett Archer: heartthrob, TikToker, and the bane of Mia's existence. He's built his brand on just being the hot and mysterious boy next door - that is, until he's arrested. Mia jumps to redesign his image, viewing it as a glistening opportunity to show her expertise. Except Brett isn't going to make things easy for her. Between his frequent scandals, her conflicting emotions, and Brett's charm, Mia might be in over her head.

But she's determined to show her worth. No matter what it costs her.

title: A Rebellious Moon
description:
All Amanda Melion wants is to finally change into her wolf form and find her mate. What would be even better is if her mate is her high school crush, Devon. But when Devon rejects her, Amanda returns to her senior year of college uncertain of her future.

Chase Nolan is also uncertain of his future. After assuming his pack's alpha position under less than ideal circumstances, he looks to find his mate to strengthen himself and his pack.

When Chase meets Amanda, he's ready for his mate to fulfill her role, but Amanda's prior experience and new ideas of her future have soured her to the idea of "mates". Will Chase convince her that they are truly meant to be or will Amanda rebel to the end?

authorBio:
I have been creating characters and stories to entertain myself since I was little. I have always enjoyed reading and now I want to contribute to the genres I have enjoyed.

Some of my favorite authors throughout my life included Kresley Cole, Neil Gaiman, Anne McCaffrey, Terry Brooks, Kate Elliott, Anne Bishop, Brian Jacques, and Orson Scott Card.

I hope to write stories with memorable characters and relatable emotions in fantastical situations.

Although I would love to publish a book someday,  my true measure of success would be to see my book on a public library shelf.

title: The Professor At The Bar [bxb]
description:
-KIND OF MATURE-

"Will I get to know your name first or...?" He said, grinning. 

"Miguel Valdez." 

"Harvey Ernest." 

"Well, Miguel, do you want to keep talking or get out of here?"

_________________________________________________

The moment Miguel had laid his eyes on Harvey, he wanted the man in his bed. What better way to blow off some steam besides a hot one-night stand with a stranger, right? Except the stranger doesn't end up being a stranger, but his new professor. So, whatever happened between them needs to be forgotten, especially if Miguel wants to be scouted into the NFL and not jeopardize his future. And yet, Miguel just can't seem to stay away.

Harvey knew immediately what his plans for the night were when he saw Miguel sitting at that bar stool. What better way to celebrate landing a new job besides a hot one-night stand with a hot stranger, right? Except the stranger ends up being his deep-in-the-closet student who could very well be scouted into the NFL. So, Harvey needs to stay away from Miguel unless he wants to get fired from the job he desperately needs. But there's something about Miguel that makes Harvey do stuff he really shouldn't.

One night mistakes usually end in disasters, but sometimes, if you try hard enough, who knows....

title: Manjha A String of Complicated Relations
description:
Mahatma Gandhi had once said, "In a gentle way, you can shake the world." That is exactly what Shambhavi Sakshi Vyas wants to do. 

Set in the backdrop of a fictional Army Academy the story takes you on the struggles faced by Shambhavi Vyas to become an Indian Army Officer. She wants the respect that she deserves, by earning it the right way. 

She finds friendship, loyalty, and love. 

She learns that not all men in uniform are jerks. 

But what happens when her bitter past comes back to haunt her, risking everything she had longed for. Secrets are to be revealed. Obstructions emerge.

Secrets that threaten to break the reality of her life; obstructions that can throw her off course.

Hop onboard to witness Shambhavi, as she embarks upon a journey that is no short of an adventure than climbing a mountain the first time.

title: MY SIX BOYFRIENDS ARE IN A BOYBAND - Polyamourous Romance
description:
When eighteen year old Jade moves to the gloomy town of Hallow Woods to live with her father, she expects that her new life will be as boring as the town itself, but despite her awkward social skills and low expectations, she is welcomed by one of the most popular girls at the local university, who is drawn to a particular Boyband: Monster Mash.
With mesmerizing voices and supernatural looks, Monster Mash is the irresistible and talented sextet that marked a before and after in Jade's life.
But when she meets the dominant and absolutely perfect band leader by accident, she feels a strange attraction to him despite how much he tries to push her away.
However, there is a very good reason for his coldness: He, and his bandmates, are real monsters, and he knows how dangerous it is when humans get too close.
Determined to be the protagonist of her own love story, Jade is willing to deal with the outside risks and dangers in her quest for her happily ever after, but the biggest threat comes from within the group itself, namely: The elegant, sensual and deadly Chief Bodyguard of the band, the mysterious girl whom the boys have written almost all their songs about and is even more in love with them than Jade.

title: The Story Of 1970s
description:
Dear Diary... 

I dreamt of Him. Again...

It's been 3 Years... 3 years since He left this city and moved somewhere... I don't even know. I don't know how he is doing, I don't know if he has been married or not, I don't know..where he is. 

But I don't know if he still loves Meethi Jalebi and Pheeki Chai, if he still loves children if he still loves the smell of books, If He still loves music. 
All I know is How he used to smile, How he used to laugh, How he used to look at me. 

I met him in college, He taught me what a crush means and then what a Love looks like. 

He was the type of man whom any woman could love. 

Ankhein bhale hi kaali thi uski, Par kuch andhere sa nahi tha. 

Guitars ka bohot shauk chadha tha university k ladko ko us samay, Par Vo pagal to Sitar pe hi ataka tha.

His voice was so melodious as if he was the personal singer of God. 

I still remember how I met him 6 years ago, and then those 3 years became everything for me. 

I still remember the day, when I used to bunk classes just for his glimpse. He was one of the most famous guys in the college, and I used to hate drawing or giving unnecessary attention. 

But I wanted him to notice me. 

Kya kya nahi kiya uske liye... sajna sawarna, taking part in extracurricular activities. I was the shyest girl and his attention made me do everything that I hated. 

Isi Chakkar me voh toh kuch ban gaye aur hum unpe kitaabein hi likhte reh gaye. 

Vo Banaras ki Holi aur Ayodhya ki Diwali sa tha... Kabhi pheeka hi nahi padta tha. 

Aur main Barsaat k us mausam si jo Boondon se dhal jaati aur suraj ki ek kiran se nikhar.

Agar ishq ka koi insaani chehara hota.. Toh usi ki tarh hota.

You must be curious, Right? 

Who is this Guy? 

Who am I? 

What happened between us? 

Were we a couple? 

Happy ending or Sad ending? 

Then let's read my diary together... where I have mentioned... Only Him. 
This is not "My Dear Diary" This is "Dear Him" 

This is "The Story of 1970s" When I saw Him for the first time.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Senator's Son (2016 Watty Award Winner)
description:
College is just like her old life . . . bleak. Surviving it won't be easy, especially when the girlfriend of the guy she's loved her entire life would rather see her dead. So much for that clean slate. Instead she's constantly looking over her shoulder, watching, waiting and worrying.
      
      Lucky for Emma she met The Senator's Son. 
      
      Zach Walker is the typical rich kid . . . or is he? He's all heart, not like all those other guys. She isn't supposed to fall for him. She doesn't even know if she can trust him. He is completely tempting and totally out of her league.
      
      Please note - there is profanity and sexual situations.

title: You Were What You Eat
description:
As a vampire, Anna knows about hunting. What she doesn't know about is high school. Students don't pay attention, her English teacher repeats the same lesson for days on end, and why does she seem to be the only one not bolting for the door when the bell rings?

With one friend who's obsessed with vampires and another who's not quite what she seems to be, Anna has to learn the rules of high school fast if she wants to remain undetected. As attacks throughout the city increase, suspicions mount. Anna tries to go unnoticed, but when her newfound friend sets out to prove the attacks are being caused by a vampire, Anna is left to wonder if her dark secret will be discovered. And what will happen to her if it is?

title: I Will Never Love You
description:
"I, Bella Colburn, rej-"

In an instant, Lucian slammed his fist through the wall next to Bella's head. Her knees gave out from the surprise and sheer terror that ripped through her body. She collapsed to the ground and desperately tried to keep her sobs from escaping, but all she managed to do was struggle to breathe. She clamped a shaky hand over her mouth as tears streamed down her face as she stared at the ground in submission.

"Say those words again and I will find everyone you've ever cared about and rip their hearts out right in front of you before locking you in the cellar with their dead bodies." With that said, Lucian stomped out of the room. Bella didn't have to check to know those doors were locked. She stayed there, a crumpled mess on the floor, and sobbed for all she was worth. Her mate was a monster.

***

Bella has been hiding in the human world for too long now but after her second mating ceremony, she's forced back into werewolf society. With a dangerous emotionally crippled Alpha as her new mate, the ever prevalent pressures to conform, and surviving this new pack and all it's members Bella wonders why it seems the Moon Goddess hates her.

Follow Bella as she defies it all- including her mate- to usher wolves into a new era.

title: After Goodbye
description:
[September Editor's pick- 2021]

After taking a nannying job, Grayson never expected to fall for Rosie, the lawyer who employed him. But she's not looking for love, and he's scared to love again. Can they let go of the goodbyes that have hurt them in the past in order to embrace a future together? 

****

Grayson had a good life. He was happily married, loved his job as a nurse and maintained great ties with his family. What he didn't expect is that three years later that life would be shattered, with nothing motivating him to wake up in the mornings. 

Unemployed and on the brink of homelessness, Grayson's only options are to return to his mother's home, or find a job and maintain it. Grayson opts for the latter.

Rosie Bhatt had her life planned out. She worked hard, built her family and was entering her thirties, excited to see what the future had in store. But soon the struggle of being a single-parent becomes too much as she juggles the life she wants and the life she has. With limited time on her hands, she chooses to employ Grayson as a nanny for her six-year daughter Anni. What she doesn't expect is the realization that someone else understands her pain. 

With both Grayson and Rosie suffering from the loss of goodbyes, tensions rise, and the importance of love, life and family is thrust upon them, challenging them to seek what really matters. 


Though Goodbyes were their beginning, can a new After become their future?

* Content warning - This story contains dark elements including discussions on alcoholism, mental health and bereavement*
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"There is no greater agony than bearing an untold story inside of you" - Maya Angelou

***

It was this quote by Maya Angelou that I resonated most with. We live in a world where a quick Google will tell you the answers, the perspective of others and the history we have not lived. But Google cannot fathom the stories we hold inside, and thus my own stories were born.

I'm an extrovert. A crazy chatterbox, whose job is to help people find their voices, and an avid coffee drinker. I'm a proud Brit with south Asian roots and watch just as many shows as I read books. Pineapple pizza is my favourite food, but you can usually find me on the couch, with a tub of ice cream and my tablet, raring to go.

About my  stories:
- Charlie and Dia - Wattys Winner 2020 (completed)
-After Goodbye - September 2020 Editor's Choice (completed)
- Licence to Choose - YA (completed)

Diversity and heritage are often weaved into my stories that can only be described as glimpses in time. They're slow burners that voice the thoughts and emotions of the protagonist, as they meet new characters, face hurdles that they may, or may not overcome, and readers are the witness to this. We grow with the characters as they make their journeys, choose their decisions and face adversities and propositions that the world wishes to offer. I can only hope you enjoy being present for the ride.

So that's a little bit of me,
Happy reading!
Aamenah x

title: My Posessive Husband [✔️]
description:
" Kamu milik aku! selamanya milik aku. Ngerti gak ?!! " 

" Kenapa vano berubah macamni sekali? Dulu vano bukan main berlembut tapi sekarang .... "

" Maaf ya honey ... aku gaksuka liat kamu deket sama cowo lain , aku .. cemburu . "

" Cemburu kamu berlebihan vano , Ra muak! "

" NO !! SANDRA ALYANNA !!! " 

" mommy ... daddy ... Ayla gakmau kalian begini . " 

" JANGAN TINGGALKAN KAMI !! PLEASE !! NO MORE !! " 




•



•




Apa yang akan kalian lakukan jika seorang jejaka tampan hadir di kehidupan kalian dan mengatakan bahawa kalian berdua mempunyai anak bersama ? Tidak masuk di akal bukan ?


Tapi inilah jalan kehidupan seorang gadis bernama 𝐒𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐚 𝐀𝐥𝐲𝐚𝐧𝐧𝐚. Dipertemukan dengan dua insan yang sekaligus mengubah kehidupannya. Terpaksa menjadi sosok ibu untuk seorang anak kecil dan terpaksa hidup berhampiran dengan seorang jejaka 𝐩𝐨𝐬𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐯𝐞. GEOVANO ETHAN AKSA . Seorang lelaki Indonesia yang tak pernah ia kenali. Akankah semuanya berjalan sesuai rancangan Sandra ? Atau Sandra harus mengikuti takdir yang sudah tertulis untuknya ? 

Terikat dengan hubungan perkahwinan yang dibina. Pada awalnya Sandra menolak sekerasnya untuk memberi ruang untuk Geovano bertahta di hati nya. Tetapi atas kehendak tuhan , seiring berjalannya waktu cinta yang dulu nya di elakkan kini mulai mekar di hati. 

Apabila perasaan sayang dan cinta sudah  berputik , sikap sebenar mulai keluar . Sedikit demi sedikit . Perlahan tapi pasti . Sikap cemburu buta , tidak mahu kehilangan atau boleh dikatakan 'posessif' yang dahulunya di simpan oleh Geovano akhirnya muncul. 

Dapatkah Sandra bertahan dengan sikap 'posessif' Geovano dan mempertahankan mahligai yang baru sahaja hendak melangkah kebahagiaan ? Adakah keadaan akan menjadi kacau dan huru hara ? 



( 17+ ⚠️ )

title: Hellsky (Hunter-Killer #3)
description:
After decades of all out war between human and Scraegan, the planet Rychter has finally settled into an uneasy peace. Both sides can rebuild, lick their wounds, and for the first time try to coexist.

But the war isn't over for everyone. Without the unifying threat of the mysterious Crawlers, factions on both sides are once again spoiling for a fight, threatening to tip the world back into conflict.

The closest thing humanity has to an ambassador, Sergeant Ryke Vannigan finds himself in the eye of the storm once again. He must help keep the peace between human and Scraegan, while investigations into the origin of the Crawlers reveal uncomfortable truths about the planet's past. 

Before the arrival of the human colonists, someone else had plans for Rychter.

And they're about to put things back on track.

||

title: Navy Blue - A Second Chance Romance (Complete)
description:
In this modern-day PERSUASION, lawyer Emily crashes into the man who stole her heart, Finn,  when he returns to the United States for the first time in eight years as a witness in her latest case.  Thing is, Finn vanished because he believes Emily ghosted him. What's the real story? And does true love deserve a second chance?

This romance is for you if you like
💓 It's Always Been You Romance
⚖️Forced Proximity
🌞Grumpy/Sunshine
🤐 Secrets and Lies
🎭 Drama
🎖️Hero in Need of Healing
⚓ Military (Navy) 

About the story:

The summer before university, affluent Emily Montgomery met and fell in love with local busboy Finn Wainwright. After only a few months, she knew theirs was a love to stand the test of time. When a family emergency forces her to leave town, a note to Finn is her only way to ask him to wait for her. He doesn't, disappearing without so much as a goodbye and no way to contact him. 

Finn never fit in anywhere until the summer he met Emily. She coloured his black and white world and he believed Emily was the love of his life. She proved him wrong with a "Dear John" note that broke his heart. In self defence, Finn deserts his old life and family, vanishing into the world of the Navy.

Eight years later, a twist of fate brings Finn back to the United States, straight into Emily's life. Neither knows time hasn't changed their feelings, but family obligations, old prejudices and unseen forces try to keep these two apart. Can Emily finally get answers to the questions that have kept her heart from moving on? Will Finn see past his pride and try to win Emily back? Or does true love deserve a second chance?

This is a modern day adaptation of Jane Austen's Persuasion

title: Our Uncharted Path
description:
Zara Calloway is a spirited and independent event planner and lifestyle blogger in her mid-twenties, coming off of a string of relationships that left her questioning love altogether. Living in a bustling city, she's focused on her career, her friends, and discovering her truest self-until an unexpected connection with Dorian Ashford, a thoughtful, quiet architect, begins to shift her perspective. Dorian's calm and observant nature quickly stands out among the noise of city life, and, without knowing it, they become anchors for each other in ways neither of them expected.

Their relationship blooms gradually, one coffee date and serendipitous encounter at a time. As they navigate the city together, they grow close through shared passions and tender moments, each encounter pushing Zara to rethink her ideas about love and commitment. Dorian, meanwhile, is drawn to Zara's zest for life and her ability to challenge his reserved nature. Despite their differences, they find themselves in perfect harmony, each balancing out the other's quirks and strengths.

But when Zara is offered a major freelance opportunity abroad, the couple faces their first real test. Their commitment is stretched across borders, with each of them grappling with the demands of independence versus the desire for partnership. As they navigate these challenges, Zara and Dorian learn that true love isn't about compromising oneself; rather, it's about embracing growth together, each supporting the other's dreams.

"Our Uncharted Path" is a love story that explores the beauty of evolving relationships, the courage required to pursue dreams, and the profound impact of finding a partner who sees you for who you truly are. This heartfelt journey through the unexpected twists and turns of life and love serves as a reminder that the path to happiness is often unplanned, yet wonderfully rewarding.

title: THE CAMELLIA TAVERN
description:
Milly Barker aims to finish her senior year of college at East Alabama State University with stellar grades and a bit of money saved up.  But when The Camellia Tavern, the place she's worked for years, comes under new ownership, her best laid plans begin to crumble.  

It's of secondary importance that Warrick Travers is alarmingly hot and successful because his arrogance and management style aren't winning him any points from his new staff--Milly, especially.  

Pretty soon, however, neither of them can deny an attraction.  But Warrick doesn't date his staff and Milly isn't looking for more heartache in her life.   Will these opposites let their guards down or will The Camellia Tavern have to weather their storm?

title: Her Safe Haven
description:
"For him, she was adrenaline."
.
.
.

Winter McHalen seemed to have everything: parents who owned a multi-billion dollar company, two handsome brothers who just happened to get the loving-brothers genes, and a ridiculously beautiful look. 
      
One summer afternoon, however, a six-year-old Winter was kidnapped by her father's former rival and was traumatised into being mute. Ten years later, the current sixteen-year-old Winter still struggled to come to terms with her dark past.

When she crossed path with the mysterious Rohan Garrison: heir to neighbouring international corporation, student council president, and a perfect gentleman who seemed to be harbouring much more secrets behind his stoic facade; the two kept finding themselves tumbling into each other's lives - with or without their own wills.

He was aloof yet affable, she was bold yet reserved; he was neither a protector nor predator, she was neither a badass nor damsel-in-distress; but they were two qualities - both coexisting at the same time and were unpredictable variables in each other's lives.

And they both didn't know whether to like or despise it.

Watch Winter as she journeyed into adulthood and tried to get back the voice which she lost. With both existing as naturally opposing forces, could Rohan - with the help of her family, friends, and possibly other love interests - save Winter from her past, or will she be trapped forever in her affliction?

{Highest: 
#1 in Young Adult
#1 in General Fiction 
#5 in New Adult
#226 in Teen Fiction 
28/12/2019}
