title: Charlie and Dia
description:
Introverted Charlie never expected to gain the attention of Dia, the chatterbox on the train, and he certainly wasn't expecting to fall in love.

***

A few words can describe Charlie Jackson. He enjoys the simplicity of a coffee far more than the average person, and devotes too much time to his work - commuting included. But Charlie's life is far more complicated than meets the eye. Hindered by his stammer and the anxiety that occurs as a result, he has become accustomed to letting others use their voices for him.

When Dia strolls into work one day, it seems that the universe has its own plans. Charlie instantly recognises her as the chatty woman from the train he takes five days a week. She's different in many ways, and it becomes clear that there's something between them.

But the journey to love isn't so smooth sailing, especially when Dia's own battles come to light. Can Charlie fight his demons to support Dia in facing hers, or will his anxiety never allow him to become more than the stranger on the train?

Romance Wattys Winner- 2020
1st place in the Firework Awards [New Adult]
Featured in the Wattpad Summer Challege- 2020

Content and Trigger Warning- this book contains themes including the following; mental health, anxiety, suicide awareness, domestic violence.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"There is no greater agony than bearing an untold story inside of you" - Maya Angelou

***

It was this quote by Maya Angelou that I resonated most with. We live in a world where a quick Google will tell you the answers, the perspective of others and the history we have not lived. But Google cannot fathom the stories we hold inside, and thus my own stories were born.

I'm an extrovert. A crazy chatterbox, whose job is to help people find their voices, and an avid coffee drinker. I'm a proud Brit with south Asian roots and watch just as many shows as I read books. Pineapple pizza is my favourite food, but you can usually find me on the couch, with a tub of ice cream and my tablet, raring to go.

About my  stories:
- Charlie and Dia - Wattys Winner 2020 (completed)
-After Goodbye - September 2020 Editor's Choice (completed)
- Licence to Choose - YA (completed)

Diversity and heritage are often weaved into my stories that can only be described as glimpses in time. They're slow burners that voice the thoughts and emotions of the protagonist, as they meet new characters, face hurdles that they may, or may not overcome, and readers are the witness to this. We grow with the characters as they make their journeys, choose their decisions and face adversities and propositions that the world wishes to offer. I can only hope you enjoy being present for the ride.

So that's a little bit of me,
Happy reading!
Aamenah x

title: The Cupid Complex
description:
|WATTPAD FEATURED|

Once a year on Valentine's Day, Jeon Jungkook is allowed to be among the humans to watch love in action. As the immortal son of Cupid, he is tasked with doing so until he comes of age on his twenty-fourth birthday, and can inherit his father's job of being Cupid. Jungkook never expects to fall in love, and find someone that he would give up everything - including his immortality - for. 

When his father finds out, he is enraged and curses the both of them. Jungkook becomes a mortal who forgets everything about who he was previously. One day Jungkook crosses paths with her again. Then chaos ensues. 

Because falling in love might be the destruction of both their worlds all over again. 

|This is a BTS AU Fanfiction|.

title: Retaliation (2) ✔
description:
Season 2 - A Dark Tale Of Love. 
Elena and Gabe has escaped from hell.  

Now, they are on the run. Both needs to out run Jude's men in order to survive.  Gabe will do anything to protect her but when it's Gabe's life that  comes under threat, Elena finds ways and allies to get her lover back, even if it means killing a whole family with her bare hands.

In their journey, they encounter people from Elena's past that turns their life upside down. The only problem is, Elena and Gabe doesn't know who they can trust. 

Join them in their journey for revenge.

title: Unleashing Demons | D.D. Bk. 1 | ✔️
description:
| Book 1 of the Demons Duology | 

❝What if you're the key to the destruction of the world? Would you open the lock or choose to die instead?❞

After the fire that took her parents' lives and leaving her half-blind, Alexandra King learned to live parentless the hard way. Now, fifteen years later, she grew independent yet reclusive, hiding behind the thick walls she built around herself, keeping her anxiety in check. But after being cornered by an evil entity, what she knew about herself was just the tip of the iceberg. For her very existence was already branded with a dark and powerful curse. A curse that dates back to her antediluvian lineage.

Harboring a few demons of his own, the recent death of someone he loves prompted Gideon Hunter to pursue Alexandra for the answers he seeked. After rescuing her from an entity that was set off to hunt her, the recent turn of events pushes him to protect her. Both body and soul.

But as their lives are threaded into the same spool of fate, the question is; will they both make it out alive? 

================================

▪️paranormal x romance x mystery
▪️occults x prophesies x demons
▪️slow burn love
▪️scary themes ⛔

+ + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + + +

title: Adrift
description:
Right after her high school graduation November Clarke's  seemingly perfect life comes crashing down after a tragedy engulfs her life, taking the life of the one person dearest to her. 

She is then sent to live with her aunt in New York who with November's perfect grades and some well connected strings helps November to land in a private boarding college for the dangerous delinquent misfits and kids of the elite, the Southside Princeton University. 

Still in mourning November resolves to earn her degree in the academy full of students who're completely out of control, unnoticed and unknown but it all goes to shit as November runs right into the worst kind trouble on her very first week. Literally. 

Hunter Black. The nefarious, villainous, almost mythical Hunter Black. Not one to mess with and definitely not one to upset.  The worst kind of bad at Southside Princeton University with a past too dark to speak off and a present to scary to ever encounter.
Riddled with tattoos and no-nonsense, Hunter cannot fathom how beyond annoyed he is to have this tiny little nobody crash into him and pull him down right along with her. 

Now entangled in ways neither of them understand will Hunter and November drown right away in the waters of this cruel cruel world and its twisted currents or will they be able to help each other to stay adrift?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: A Thousand Salt Kisses Later (Book 2 of Salt Kiss series)
description:
The Sequel to A Thousand Salt Kisses 

Spoiler Alert - advisable not to read below if you wish to read ATSK (Book 1) first.

Four years have passed since Crystal White met and fell in love with handsome, intriguing merman, Llyr.  

Although she has busied herself in colorful London uni life and found happiness with her boyfriend Sam, something inside of her just can't let go of her first love.

With uni ending and no job in sight, Crystal knows she must return to Starfish Island.  Back by the sea, she yearns for Llyr more than ever and when an opportunity arises to contact the mer-folk, Crystal finds it impossible to resist.  

However, when Crystal reaches out she discovers that not only has Llyr moved on but a magical secret about herself is unlocked...

Will she be able to rekindle that precious love they once shared whilst also struggling to undo a spell cast the very summer they met?

This is a New Adult story
Cover by @fantasyfann123

On that day, Artemis's life was finally going to be his. She had dreamed about walking down that aisle wearing her dream dress to impress the man she loved and would spend the rest of her life with.
But it's not him. The man she is going to spend her life with is a monster. Artemis can't help to feel scared and excited.

title: Bruised
description:
Sequel to Broken.

"Memories have the ability of unlocking new emotions. They allow you to relive moments with surfacing feelings you were unable to experience then. It's your choice to let these feelings live and take hold or tragically, or in this case, delightfully die."

Makenna Adams can remember the first and last time she's ever been frightened of anything. That moment had turned her life into her daily nightmare. She would've never guessed that an English boy, Atlas, would be the second. The same boy who can't seem to stop thinking about what had unfolded the last time they were in the same room. He had certainly left her bruised.

UPDATE: Saturdays

title: Those Coyote Girls
description:
"I was being pulled in two.  Everything in me except one small corner of rationality was screaming to get closer to him, to put my hands on him- all over, soaking my scent into every inch of flesh.  And I wanted him to do the same to me.  

I felt lightheaded from my lack of breath.  I wasn't going to be able to hold on much longer.  "Get me out of here," I gritted through lips that could already feel what it would be like to kiss him.

Clark didn't hesitate for a second."

Rose battles the mating pull even as it grows stronger each year.  This time, her lifelong crush is in town and he's almost impossible to resist.  Ellie doesn't want to fight the mating pull, but it isn't tugging her in the direction she wants to go.  In fact, she's getting tugged toward the wrong kind of shifter altogether.

Mating season is about to begin.

title: The Dark Ages: Convergence (Prequel to the P.O.E. Chronicles)
description:
*This story is the prequel to the P.O.E. Chronicles and will reveal some mystery in the novel (think Star Wars). If you want to read chronologically, go ahead, otherwise, read Evolution first*

Before there was peace, there was chaos.
Before there were Citybases, there were Ruins.
Before there was UGE, there were remnant governments, each with their own agenda.
Before there were P.O.E.s, there were rogue mutants with no disciple or training.
But in chaos, order will converge.
And in darkness, light will emerge.

All Akram ever knew was the darkened streets of the ruin that was London, all he knew was to stay hidden, scavenge things and trust no one. His grandfather loved to tell him of The Time that Had Been, where food was abundant and strangers kind to each other. When his sister was kidnapped and found, the truth behind her abduction set off a chain of events that had him running to Paris in hope of finding his estranged family with a girl and powers beyond what he could comprehend. Little did he know that it was only the beginning of his story, the story of the Originals.

Cover: @Kitkattish

*I have made a few changes in the published version of the Evolution, which resulted in some deviation from the first draft I posted on Wattpad.*

title: Insatiable Desires
description:
"...You're going to hate how much you love it." He told me. He whispered. 

And he made me foolishly forget my own name every time he touched me.

But he was right. I hated how much I loved it. 


***

Dark, bruised, broken. Our words. Dark bruised and broken. Our souls. 

But she was still incandescent. Just like the first time I saw her, those vast and fervent eyes took me by surprise. Because in them... In them I realized a reflection of my own soul. 

She became my weakness; she became the chink in my armor. 
 
My undoing.

She asked me, "Why do you put up with me?" 
I answered nothing. Perhaps I should've said the truth. Perhaps I should've told her that she was the light in my life.

She was the fire... And I had been cold my whole life.

***

title: Many The Miles
description:
I kept replaying the scene over and over again. All I could see when I closed my eyes were flashes of it. His hips moving against hers, her hands on his desk, the way his head tilted back. It made me sick to my stomach. The sound of his flesh pounding into hers. The way she cooed out his name and giggled. She knew I was watching. She knew I would run down to his office the second I found those papers. I was set up. 

Mother of three Mia Coleman is devastated to find her husband bending another woman over his desk. As if the heartbreak wasn't enough she discovers pop star Benji Russell is the biological father of her children. Confused by her husband's actions Mia tries to pick up the pieces and find her true purpose in life. 

In the midst of working on his fourth studio album pop star Benji Russell receives a letter from a six year old girl claiming to be his biological daughter. Benji sets out to discover a life he never knew he wanted, with a woman he barely knows.

title: Valley of Shadows and Roses | ONC 2024
description:
*ONC 2024 Longlist*

There was a princess
Living carefree
She wanted the world she wanted everything
Diamonds and pearls
Emeralds and gold
She bathed in the riches only she could know
Then the Shadow King came
And asked for her hand
But she said no and sent him away
The Shadow King vowed to himself
One day she'll be his
He curses her until she pleads for mercy
And so the princess has to die
When the midnight strikes
And comes back to life with the first rays of the sun
Turn the pages
Read so you know how it will end
The story of the Shadow Lord and the cursed princess

__________________________________________________________________________________

A classic story retold in a new, dark way. This is where the lines between hero and villain blur.

Once upon a time, in a distant kingdom in the Rose Valley, there lived a young princess. Maybe a little proud. Maybe she was the sweetest princess. And maybe not. She had many suitors, but she did not accept a single proposal for her hand in marriage. She didn't want to become a king's wife, she wanted to be a queen and rule her country. 
But one day darkness crept into the happy kingdom. A thick fog crept through the forest. Shadows walked under the treetops. The Shadow Lord came to propose to Princess Luna. She rejected him like everyone else, despite the fact that he was the only one who managed to impress her. However, the Shadow Lord isn't about to give up so quickly. He presents a gift to the princess. For the rest of eternity, at the stroke of midnight, she will die and come back to life with the first rays of day. Again and again. Every night. An endless cycle. Because as the Shadow Lord said, "I will wait for you, even if it takes forever."
Old wounds are being opened. The boundaries between worlds are blurring. Will a prince on a white horse arrive and bravely rescue a cursed princess or...?

title: Just Say Yes (Just Press Send Book 3)
description:
Natasha Chabra finally got her freshman year at college back on track. She's back together with her boyfriend, Ty, and looking forward to a chill spring break with her friends. Well, that's until the pandemic hits and she's quarantined with them at a cottage for the rest of the year doing classes online. Not to mention her estranged father staying across the lake and the parts of Ty's past she has no idea about. Now list-making, highly organized Nat has to change all her plans and navigate her not-so-picture-perfect relationship. What could go wrong?

authorBio:
Hi! I'm Nikki, a 21-year-old lover of college romances, fictional men & cheesy romcoms.

I'm kinda obsessed with writing new adult sports romances that will definitely make you feel some second-hand embarrassment &may or may not keep you up reading late into the night. Sorry in advance for messing up your sleep schedule (but who are we kidding here, all of us are basically nocturnal).

JUST PRESS SEND follows a freshman college student who drunkenly texts her boyfriend pro/con list to each of her five crushes & she finds her average year turned upside down as she navigates the world of first love.

To date, I've never made pro/con lists about my crushes, but I have sent many a drunk text.

I decided to post my first draft as I go to incorporate your feedback & connect with other readers, like me! Long before I was a writer, I was a reader first. Blame Mr. Darcy for my romance obsession.

I'm currently working on Book 3 in the Just Press Send series, available now on YONDER, a new reading app from the creators of WEBTOON and Wattpad! Download YONDER here: https://bit.ly/yonderjps

title: Hollywood Heartthrob
description:
❝You know I love you, right?❞



21-year-old Kendall Morgan moves to Los Angeles where she plans to live out her dream. But there is only one problem: She doesn't even know where to start.

One fateful day, while working in a coffee shop, she meets Hollywood heartthrob, Ryan Hughes. In an instant, Ryan becomes infatuated with her. He gives her everything; a singing career, a car, and pretty much anything she's ever dreamed of having.

However, Ryan's infatuation soon morphs into lust, then love, and then obsession.

Despite all the clear warning signs and cautions from her friends, Kendall believes that Ryan's possessive behavior is just his way of showing love. But when things quickly turn dangerous, Kendall becomes determined to make it out of her toxic relationship.

Dead or alive.

title: Kingsley's Bride
description:
Scarlette Ravenswood's world is thrown into turmoil when her sister, Meredith, elopes on the day of her wedding, endangering their family's honor. In a desperate bid to salvage their reputation, Scarlette agrees to marry Darius Kingsley, a wealthy and handsome man set to inherit the dukedom. Little does she know, Darius conceals a ruthless grudge against Meredith, which colors his perception of Scarlette. Despite his cold and calculating demeanor, Scarlette resolves to soften Darius's harsh edges while steadfastly searching for her elusive sister. As she delves deeper into Meredith's disappearance, Scarlette uncovers unsettling truths about her sister's actions and the perilous web of deceit that surrounds them.

Amidst the backdrop of their tumultuous marriage, Scarlette and Darius navigate treacherous waters of suspicion and intrigue. Darius's ruthlessness is matched only by Scarlette's unwavering determination to uncover the secrets that threaten to tear them apart. As they confront their own demons and the dark forces conspiring against them, Scarlette and Darius find themselves reluctantly drawn together by shared adversity. 

In a journey fraught with revenge, betrayal and redemption, they discover that their greatest strength may lie in trusting each other.

title: The Devil's Daughter
description:
Betrayal follows her, the Angels are against her, and the Devil is on her tail. As Lucifer's Daughter Abbegael must hide her identity from both Heaven and Hell if she is to survive. All she wants is to return home but when Lucifer's plan starts to take shape she realises she is the key to destroying Heaven and she may be the only one who can save it. 

Razakiel has been the Devil's right hand man ever since the Fall. He despises Lucifer and everything he's done, but when he discovers Abbegael's secret he finally has a chance to get home. Because sacrificing the Devil's daughter could be the one thing to save him and Heaven alike.
                                                      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Trapped within the fiery depths of Hell, her only chance of escape is him; a stranger, the enemy. 

"I'm not going to hurt you," he growls in my ear, "Neither am I going to hand you over to that Bastard." I flinch at the anger in his voice and confusion rushes through me.

"What?" I squeak, attempting to get air into my constricted lungs. He sighs, the warm air brushing against my neck, sending goose bumps skittering across my skin.

"I'm not going to tell him you intend to escape. How can I when I plan to do the same thing?" My mind whirls as I attempt to understand what he is saying. He wants to escape? But he is one of Lucifer's most trusted. How does that even happen? He's lying.

"I'm not lying. I needed him to trust me or I would never find a way to get out." 

"You know a way out? Wait. Did you just read my thoughts? How did you just read my thoughts? I thought you were a shield!" Once again his sigh of exasperation leaves goose bumps on my skin and a shiver running down my spine.

"I am a shield. It just so happens that I'm a reader too. Yes, that is possible. Obviously. Now can I let you go, or are you going to try and kill me again?"


© 2013 by Froggie27. All rights reserved
Cover by @Juhiwrites
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hey guys, I'm Ellie Donnelly, an aspiring Young Adult author from Australia.

I love writing; it allows me to escape reality and enter a world of excitement and danger where anything can happen. Where I can stretch the limits of my imagination and create inspiring, action packed adventures. Angels and Demons play a large role in my books because I love the contrast of light and darkness and being able to blur the line in between.

When I'm not writing I'm immersed in the works of other brilliant authors or going on adventures with friends.

I absolutely love reading...and writing about pretty much everything.

Books: The Host and absolutely EVERYTHING by Stephen King

Quotes: "I intend to live forever, or die trying" and; "Yesterday's history, tomorrow's a mystery, and today's a gift. That's why it's called the present."

title: A Heart Like Glass [Book 1]
description:
Brennah Watson has spent her whole life running. She's run from the dark feelings spurred by a terrible past, as well as the nightmares of her present. Now, she's trying to run from the future, or rather, a destiny that isn't her own. 

After she is nearly killed by a stalker, Brennah winds up in the body of Adaliah Howell, a villainess in her favorite novel. Trapped in the magical world of earthea, she'll have to navigate the events of the story in order to avoid a tragic fate. 

But not everything is as it seems. And Brennah learns that maybe, Adaliah wasn't the villainess she was made out to be.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello everyone! I'm a new writer. My stories are mainly derived from the crazy little tales I imagine to help me fall asleep at night. Most of these stories involve fantasy and romance, but I also like myster and action too.

My most recent work is A Heart Like Glass, a fantasy/romance that has been in the works for over a year now. I'll be making more edits to it - as it is the first book in what should be a series. I have so many ideas and directions for Brennah's story, so get ready for a wild ride! Book two, Shattered Obsessions, has been in development for a while now. I think I'll go ahead and post the first few chapters or so. Hopefully, I can finish it within the next few months.

There are plenty of other story concepts that have been burning in the back of my mind. So, I might take a break here or there from the AHLG series to work on those tales.

Please keep in my that this is my first novel, and I have a lot of growing to do in my craft. While I enjoy constructive criticism, I also appreciate kindness. I decided to post my first work(s) here to get feedback. I want an idea of what needs to be changed in my writing process. So, maybe one day, I can see my book physically sit on a shelf in a story.

Happy reading!! :D

title: Road to Arcadia
description:
Kai Gilling, a transgender wanderer traversing the American West, has to trek hundreds of miles in his beat up Jeep, in order to reach an urban legend rumored to be the only settlement still thriving.

***********

It's a Wasteland, baby. In the uncomfortably not-so-distant future, the world has been ravaged by natural disasters, water shortages, and public apathy. People like Kai Gilling have flocked to the desert (once known as the American West) in hopes of finding a better life. After picking up a pair of siblings, the three come across a strange woman who claims to have a map to Arcadia, an urban legend rumored to be the only city thriving in the wreckage of the old world. Will they keep their hearts set on an oasis in the desert--even if it's just a mirage? Or will they be tempted by something else

title: The Untouchable Love
description:
Bride ha il cuore spezzato.
Ha perso la madre in un incidente ed è costretta a lasciare l'Irlanda per raggiungere suo padre che vive in Wyoming.
Sono sei anni che non mette piede a Jackson Hole.
Si sente sola, persa nel dolore della perdita che ha vissuto. Non sa però, che qualcuno aspetta il suo ritorno da molto tempo.

Jamie Callighan si sente ferito.
Dopo aver trascorso gran parte della sua infanzia a casa del padre di Bride, decide di trasferirsi definitivamente da lui quando sua madre parte per la California.
Il ritorno di Bride, risveglia in lui rancori assopiti, mettendo a dura prova la coltre di ghiaccio dentro cui ha nascosto il suo cuore.

"Tu per me, eri l'amore intoccabile. Con i tuoi capelli rossi e la pelle bianca come la neve nutrivi in me la certezza che nella vita di ognuno, esiste qualcuno disposto a tornare."

title: Good Friends - Fabio Quartararo Fanfiction
description:
Julie, a quiet girl from Nice. Her best friend, Tom, is the best friend of Fabio Quartararo. After some life changing experiences and choices, she ends up working with the MotoGP riders. 
Will she find friendship? Or love? Or both? 
Or is it one of the worst decisions of her life? 

 Read and find out.

###
This book is based on some real life events and a lot of imagination. It's a fanfic about Fabio Quartararo. It also contains other riders and MotoGP paddock personal. I don't know any of them and some information is real, other is made up. 
I hope you like the book. For me it's mostly therapeutic to write about some of the events, thoughts and feelings I went through.

title: L.O.V.E.
description:
100 years ago, amidst WW3's nuclear bombing, a deadly virus was released in the atmosphere and nearly wiping out the humanity.

It lives inside the human brain thriving on the empathy receptors, leading to irrational behaviour and ultimately brain death. To slow the damage, scientists created L.O.V.E, short for Living Off Vital Emotions, a nanovaccine that numbs the virus and switches off all strong emotions.

As a last resort and with a dying planet, the Supreme Government created the City, a place to contain the infected survivors suitable for the experiment. Those in the first stages of illness became ideal candidates to receive the neuroinhibitor. Having their feelings restrained and their memory altered, those who come of age are designated a life partner through a Selection process, thus preserving the humankind.

A few decades after the trial had started, scientists had a major breakthrough. The nanites, which are highly chemically reactive organisms, are changing their bio-engineered purpose when dopamine levels are high. With a new generation of nanoids, stronger and smarter to fight the battle, the virus doesn't have a chance. Many attempts were made to create a man-made version of synthetic dopamine and each time the outcome was a disaster.

Their goal is to create new generations, immune to the virus. These are called Purebloods, the offsprings of those who find pure love, the only cure to save them from a violent death.

Running out of time, the Experiment entered in its final stages. To minimize the threats, the Colonies have sent their best soldiers to oversee the trial and protect its key subjects. If only things were going according to plan, or better...stay hidden.

With Iron Guard, the resistance outside the walls, hunting the Purebloods too, will the trial save human race before it's too late?


#3 in #dystopianfuture (27.06.2020)

Lies. Betrayal. Secrets. Corruption. Just your average day in an American corporation.

With him and Leslie King on rocky ground and his father still trying to influence the future of Sebastian's company, Sebastian feels caught between doing the right thing and the safe thing. title: Can You Feel It?
description:
❝The FBI Agent with walls of steel and The Mafia Spy who couldn't feel.❞

🎭

"Can you feel it?"
"Feel what?"
"My love for you."

•♡•

Kaya Skeats (real name: Artemis Crawford) could not, actually, feel his love. Because she couldn't feel or express much at all.
Suffering from alexythemia, the inability to verbalise, express and place emotions; Kaya was a weapon of seduction honed by the Chicago Outfit. 
And now she had no more than four months to complete her hardest mission so far. 

Mixing FBI business with Mafia pleasure.

Erex (Rex) Di Castillo had made it his life's mission to bring down a branch of the Outfit. It was justice that the Special Agent of the FBI's Organized Crimes Department sought, not love. As a man who kept to himself, women had no place in his life, not for one night and certainly not for a lifetime. But the deadly beauty with a sharp tongue invading each aspect of his life was making him question things.

She was a blank canvas so he became the spectrum of colors in her life.
The spectrum of emotions.

But with the good...
There always comes the bad.

And for Erex and Kaya, the game of love, deceit and guns was doomed from the start.

-🎭-

Thank you for reading, don't forget to vote and comment! (Temporarily on Hold) it's HEA.

title: Tempted By Love
description:
Irina Elif Kazanova doesn't do love. She's built an empire with steel in her veins and no room for weakness. Cold, ruthless, and untouchable, she's lived her life by one rule-control everything.
That is, until the man she was supposed to marry-Maxim Ivanov's brother-abandons her for another. Now, Maxim is her reluctant fiancé. The last man she wants. The one who makes her want to feel...and never let go.
Maxim doesn't want her either. His heart belongs to someone else, and a marriage to the woman who's always looked at him like he's a ghost isn't part of the plan. But duty is a chain they can't break. And when their worlds collide, nothing will ever be the same.
The battle between duty and desire will tear them apart. But the greatest temptation may just be the one that burns them both.

title: Perfectly Pink - An It's Always Been You Romance (Complete)
description:
When city girl and perfectionist Mary is forced to move back to the small town she escaped from years ago, she is once again tempted by local bar owner Simon, the man of her dreams but who does not fit into her carefully crafted waking life. Mary has to choose between the perception of perfection or the reality of giving into love.

This romance is for you if you like:
💏 Opposites Attract
⚖️ Forced Proximity
💓 Love undercover
🙍‍♂️Guy Falls First
🌆Small Town
🔥Slow Burn

About the Story

Chasing perfection might mean running away from love.

Perfection is a perception in Mary's world - one she works hard to maintain. Constantly chasing the life she thinks she deserves, Mary has mostly resisted the temptations of the small town bartender Simon.  Until her younger sister marries Simon's brother and Mary is forced to confront her feelings.  Will she follow her head and continue dating the husband material she thinks she wants or will she listen to her heart?

Simon has never been able to resist Mary, even when it's a bad idea.  And it's usually a bad idea. When they are thrown together he plucks up the courage to make one final stand to try to win her heart. Will it cost him everything or be worth the world?

This story can be read as a stand alone book.  Some characters have been introduced in True Blue.

title: Then There's Wilbur
description:
At some point in time, Diana Coal knew she wanted to settle down.
  
  At some point in time, the guy who liked her because she reminded him of Wonder Woman, would mess up.
  
  At some point in time, she would've forgiven him if he didn't leave her for another girl a few months before their wedding.
  
  At some point in time, she knew Mr. Perfect would turn left.
  
  And during that point in time, at a bachelorette party, she might just get a lap dance from a very unlikely Mr. Right.

title: BREATHE [✔]
description:

"Breathe. ."He said.  

A word I didn't quite understand. Whether it was for him or me I didn't know either. And as I watched his lips utter that same word over and over again. All I could think of was I wonder how soft those lips are. I wonder how long he can hold his breath and if I kissed him would he breathe then?

*

Breathe - a story about strength.

title: Bleed for the Camera
description:
It's been smooth sailing for Evie Harper lately. Business at her café is booming and her new man seems to be on a mission to keep a smile on her face. But when her actions directly lead to one of her clients getting murdered her happiness quickly turns into guilt. Even worse, the older woman died before Evie could get paid! Just when she's about to cut her losses, opportunity comes knocking in the form of a woman begging Evie to find the killer before things get even more out of hand. Now, Evie's got to race against the clock to find a murderer, help a kidnap victim, and ease her guilt for causing all this in the first place. Being the good person she is, of course she takes on the case out of the goodness of her heart...not to mention a three thousand dollar bonus waiting if she succeeds.

Evie Harper Mysteries: Book 3

title: Arabella Academy: Perfectly Imperfect
description:
***NOW A WATTPAD FEATURED STORY***

[Book One of the Arabella Academy Series]

Four teenagers, one dead girl and a whole lot of secrets surrounding a school.
What happens when a murder that absolutely had nothing to do with you... simply had something to do with you?

For Marcus, the news of Sheila's death was just another unfortunate circumstance in the daily life of Arabella Academy. However, the unquenchable desire of not minding their own business gets in the way of him and his best friend Jeff, causing them to plunge themselves into the world of detectives. Pretty soon the clues start coming up, and together with two other friends they embark on a journey that receives its fair share of good and bad.

Will they be able to make it to the end and finally unmask the killer...together with finding that priceless necklace that everyone seems to be looking for?

title: Intrigued By Her (Completed)
description:
He pulls me fiercely to his chest and I hug him back. He pulls away after what seems like an eternity and I reluctantly let him go. I realize what I'm doing and try to move away but he catches my hand pulling me close to him again. He stares into my eyes and I am left in a trance.

''You are a drug Samantha. The one that I don't want to get rid of,'' He breathes near my ear with seriousness.
I close my eyes and relish his warmth.

''I am not the one for you Xavier. We are not meant to be.'' I say stuttering wishing I didn't have to say this.

''I don't care. Because I know you are the only one for me. I'll fight the world if that is what it takes to be with you.'' He says hooking his arm around my waist. I gasp as he draws me closer and leans in, his lips inches away from mine.




        Samantha Collins is a lively girl.Always smiling and laughing. But she isn't the 'all-happy' girl she pretends to be. She has her past trying to get back into her life and her present is agonizingly painful. She has lost all hopes. She thinks she is incapable of love but destiny has other plans.

         Xavier West is hot, smart, handsome and everything a girl would want in a guy. When he first sees Samantha,he only irritates her because he finds her different. But when he gets knows the actual Samantha Collins,he feels something he has has never felt before. He is drawn to her just like a moth to a flame. But with Samantha's guard always on, its difficult to break in!

Will they both fall for each other?And if yes- is the past that haunts Samantha every now and then ready to let her go? And what if Xavier has his own share of mysteries? 
Follow Samantha and Xavier on a journey with fights,pranks,struggles and romance.




And though the chapters say they are edited, they are not really edited kinda edited so excuse that for now! Editing has already begun! I am editing 3 chapters a day so thanks for being patient!

Happy reading:-) Highest Ranking #3 in Teen Fiction!

title: Wrong Time
description:
#1 in Paranormal 15/12/20 and 31/10/2021
#1 in Paranormal Love 13/04/19 and 21/10/2021

Everyone has been told at least one ghost story during their life, but it's up to them to believe it or not. I was part of that group, the sceptics. Always rational, never choosing my heart over my brain. That was it until one life-changing day. 
We have all heard of ghost stories. 
Here's mine.

                                     ******

Grace Lancaster is a completely normal 17 year-old teenager, except for one little fact. She's been having the same realistic nightmare for the past two years. It's not just a bad dream, it means something and she knows it. But what could that be? 

Archer Sutcliffe is the answer to all her prayers. However, she will face an inconvenience: He is a ghost.

Fire and ice.

Light and darkness. 

Life and death.

Sometimes the perfect person for you is who you least expected them to be, and they are the clear example of that.
But most importantly: Will they find the answers both of them are looking for?

title: The Loyal Alone
description:
Don't change. Don't fight. Don't die. 

This message has been beaten into Mira since childhood. 

There are legends abound with stories of werewolves where females are a rare species, and being rare is dangerous- but becoming a Lycan wasn't a matter of choice for Mira.

Born as a wolf and cursed with being a woman, Mira and her father struggle for her survival, peace and most of all, freedom.

After the disappearance and death of her mother, they flee, in constant fear that they will be forced to join pack life and marry Mira off... or worse. 

While traveling to Alaska in search of a sanctuary among the rogues of the wilderness, they are attacked, and Mira is left to fend for herself in unknown territory...

The Thrilling Series Begins Here.
Happy Hunting. 

*********************************
This is the first book in a three book series. If you liked the first book, please visit Amazon.com and check out my second book, The Loyal Among Us, which is a continuation of this story. Thank you!

authorBio:
A.M. Hughes is a multi-genre author specializing in Young Adult novels and all things paranormal. Whether she is reading the new up-and-coming book for personal enjoyment, or writing it herself, you will always find her submerged in the world of dark paranormal fantasy. Witches, werewolves, you name it.

As a Phi Theta Kappa Alumni with a penchant for explorational writing that pushes bounds, you'll love diving into her Young Adult novels as they analyze critical aspects of our current world with an unearthly twist.

Her debut series, The Loyal Series (Books 1,2, & 3) will be completed June 2019. With more novels being planned each day, she's guaranteed to come out with something you'll enjoy.

title: Bella Danza | #Wattys2015
description:
Isabella Minnelli always went for the wrong guys. She seemed to always find herself with some alcoholic "bad boy" that was no good for her or for anyone else. Isabella makes the wise conclusion of swearing off all men and focusing on her dancing career. She was already assistant teaching at an old dance studio in her hometown, so Isabella makes the brash decision to enter herself and her dance trainer into a national dance competition.

With her inexplicable luck, tragedy strikes her dance partner just before the first sectional dance contest. It's far too late to find a new associate, and Isabella's about ready to give up on her life-long dreams and prove to her Noni that she's not strong enough for this career-risking competition. But her trainer's frivolous and oh-so-cheerful twin brother won't let her quit. Isabella can only hope that his dancing skills contradict his personality.

title: Yes sir, Captain (Completed with trailer) [ReaderxPirate]
description:
See link for Official Book Trailer!
 ~ 
When you wake up in a village on the seaside for Pirates, tied to a pole, having just figured out you had been kidnapped, while the man who caught you is trying to sell you for gold, things get complicated.
Luckily, or maybe it's unfortunately, you're bought by a young, good-looking, modest Captain who knows EXACTLY who you are.
But what he's going to do with that knowledge, you're not so sure.
 ~ 
You, my friend, I am proud to pronounce as the Princess of Etholira.
You are currently sixteen.
And you get pretty much anything you want.
And you're the prettiest girl in Etholira.
Sounds pretty nice, right?
Well, we need something for a story.
So, sorry to break it to you, but your Dad, the King, is a bit of a jerk.
You're betrothed to an ugly, inconsiderate asswipe.
You hate being a princess.
Oh, and you've just been captured by pirates.
 ~

👋About me: I've been on wattpad and writing novels since I was 13, and coming up with fiction stories to tell or draw since I was a little kid. I started writing because of my love for fiction stories, and have continued getting better at it over time. Now I hope to make this one of my careers - to design worlds and create lives that exist as so much more than lines of text, that I can share with others so they can live beyond their own lives.

※ Written experiences can take on life through you - you learn, see, grow, and find yourself, living in ways that you never could in your reality. Fiction isn't about escaping existence, it's about grasping a new one. ※
※ Sharing stories shares life itself - so never stop reading. ※

✏️ Be advised, my older books are rookie writes, and my recent ones are still only mediocre representations of my skills. I am still working on my masterpiece works, which are not currently posted online.
